Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Prelude.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Categories.

Notation "_ ^op" was already used in scope cat.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Functors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.NaturalTransformations.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monads.Monads.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monads.Comonads.

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Core.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Total.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Functors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Constructions.

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Examples.Arrow.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Examples.Three.
Require Import UniMath.ModelCategories.Lifting.

New coercion path [fact_functor;
                   functor_data_from_functor;
                   functor_on_objects] : functorial_factorization >-> Funclass is ambiguous with existing 
[fact_section; section_disp_on_objects] : functorial_factorization >-> Funclass.
[ambiguous-paths,coercions,default]

Require Import UniMath.ModelCategories.Helpers.
Require Import UniMath.ModelCategories.Generated.LNWFSHelpers.
Require Import UniMath.ModelCategories.Generated.FFMonoidalStructure.

Local Open Scope cat.
Local Open Scope morcls.


Section LNWFS_composition.

(*
All the displayed morphisms can be finished with Qed, since the
data is always propositional. For the total category morphisms,
defining it in terms of the displayed morphisms (which are propositional)
is optimal, since then we know the morphism it lies over, which is sufficient.
*)

Context {C : category}.

(* F ⊗ F' (compose left factors)
   we flip the terms in Garner to be closer to · notation *)


C: category
F: Ff C
f, g: arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, g ⟧
arrow C ⟦ f, fact_R F g ⟧


C: category
F: Ff C
f, g: arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, g ⟧
arrow C ⟦ f, fact_R F g ⟧

  
C: category
F: Ff C
f, g: arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, g ⟧
C ⟦ pr11 f, three_ob1 (F g) ⟧
C: category
F: Ff C
f, g: arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, g ⟧
C ⟦ pr21 f, three_ob2 (F g) ⟧
C: category
F: Ff C
f, g: arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, g ⟧
?h · three_mor12 (F g) = pr2 f · ?k

  
C: category
F: Ff C
f, g: arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, g ⟧
C ⟦ pr11 f, three_ob1 (F g) ⟧
 exact (arrow_mor00 γ · fact_L F g).
  
C: category
F: Ff C
f, g: arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, g ⟧
C ⟦ pr21 f, three_ob2 (F g) ⟧
 exact (arrow_mor11 γ).
  
C: category
F: Ff C
f, g: arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, g ⟧
arrow_mor00 γ · three_mor01 (F g) · three_mor12 (F g) =
pr2 f · arrow_mor11 γ
 abstract (
      etrans; [apply assoc'|];
      etrans; [apply cancel_precomposition;
              apply (three_comp (fact_functor F g))|];
      exact (arrow_mor_comm γ)
    ).
Defined.


C: category
F: Ff C
L: lnwfs_over F
f, g: arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ fact_L F f, g ⟧
filler (arrow_mor_comm (left_reduced_lp F γ))


C: category
F: Ff C
L: lnwfs_over F
f, g: arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ fact_L F f, g ⟧
filler (arrow_mor_comm (left_reduced_lp F γ))

  
C: category
F: Ff C
L: lnwfs_over F
f, g: arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ fact_L F f, g ⟧
Fγ11:= three_mor11 (# F γ): C ⟦ pr12 (F (fact_L F f)), pr12 (F g) ⟧
filler (arrow_mor_comm (left_reduced_lp F γ))

  
C: category
F: Ff C
L: lnwfs_over F
f, g: arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ fact_L F f, g ⟧
Fγ11:= three_mor11 (# F γ): C ⟦ pr12 (F (fact_L F f)), pr12 (F g) ⟧
pr2 (fact_L F f) · (arrow_mor11 (pr1 L f) · Fγ11) =
pr11 (left_reduced_lp F γ)
× arrow_mor11 (pr1 L f) · Fγ11 · pr2 (fact_R F g) =
  pr21 (left_reduced_lp F γ)

  abstract (
    split; [
      etrans; [apply assoc|];
      etrans; [apply cancel_postcomposition;
              exact (pathsinv0 (arrow_mor_comm (pr1 L f)))|];

      etrans; [apply assoc'|];
      etrans; [apply cancel_precomposition;
              exact (pr1 (three_mor_comm (#(fact_functor F) γ)))|];

      etrans; [apply cancel_postcomposition;
              exact (lnwfs_Σ_top_map_id L f)|];
      apply id_left
      |
      etrans; [apply assoc'|];
      etrans; [apply cancel_precomposition;
              exact (pathsinv0 (pr2 (three_mor_comm (#(fact_functor F) γ))))|];

      etrans; [apply assoc|];
      etrans; [apply cancel_postcomposition;
              exact (lnwfs_Σ_bottom_map_inv L f)|];
      apply id_left
    ]
  ).
Defined.

Local Definition LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper
    (F F' : Ff C) (f : arrow C) :=
  fact_L F f · fact_L F' (fact_R F f).


C: category
F: Ff C
L: lnwfs_over F
F': Ff C
f: arrow C
arrow C ⟦ fact_L F f, LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' f ⟧


C: category
F: Ff C
L: lnwfs_over F
F': Ff C
f: arrow C
arrow C ⟦ fact_L F f, LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' f ⟧

  
C: category
F: Ff C
L: lnwfs_over F
F': Ff C
f: arrow C
C ⟦ three_ob0 (F f), three_ob0 (F f) ⟧
C: category
F: Ff C
L: lnwfs_over F
F': Ff C
f: arrow C
C ⟦ three_ob1 (F f), three_ob1 (F' (fact_R F f)) ⟧
C: category
F: Ff C
L: lnwfs_over F
F': Ff C
f: arrow C
?h · LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' f =
three_mor01 (F f) · ?k

  
C: category
F: Ff C
L: lnwfs_over F
F': Ff C
f: arrow C
C ⟦ three_ob0 (F f), three_ob0 (F f) ⟧
 exact (identity _).
  
C: category
F: Ff C
L: lnwfs_over F
F': Ff C
f: arrow C
C ⟦ three_ob1 (F f), three_ob1 (F' (fact_R F f)) ⟧
 exact (fact_L F' (fact_R F f)).
  
C: category
F: Ff C
L: lnwfs_over F
F': Ff C
f: arrow C
identity (three_ob0 (F f))
· LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' f =
three_mor01 (F f) · three_mor01 (F' (fact_R F f))
 abstract (apply id_left).
Defined.


C: category
F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'
L: lnwfs_over F
f: arrow C
arrow C ⟦ fact_L F' (fact_R F f),
fact_R F (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' f) ⟧


C: category
F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'
L: lnwfs_over F
f: arrow C
arrow C ⟦ fact_L F' (fact_R F f),
fact_R F (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' f) ⟧

  
C: category
F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'
L: lnwfs_over F
f: arrow C
L_lp:= LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F' f
:
arrow C ⟦ fact_L F f, LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' f ⟧: arrow C ⟦ fact_L F f,
LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' f ⟧
arrow C ⟦ fact_L F' (fact_R F f),
fact_R F (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' f) ⟧

  
C: category
F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'
L: lnwfs_over F
f: arrow C
L_lp:= LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F' f
:
arrow C ⟦ fact_L F f, LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' f ⟧: arrow C ⟦ fact_L F f,
LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' f ⟧
L_lift:= left_reduced_lp_lift L L_lp: filler
  (arrow_mor_comm (left_reduced_lp F L_lp))
arrow C ⟦ fact_L F' (fact_R F f),
fact_R F (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' f) ⟧


  
C: category
F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'
L: lnwfs_over F
f: arrow C
L_lp:= LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F' f
:
arrow C ⟦ fact_L F f, LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' f ⟧: arrow C ⟦ fact_L F f,
LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' f ⟧
L_lift:= left_reduced_lp_lift L L_lp: filler
  (arrow_mor_comm (left_reduced_lp F L_lp))
C ⟦ three_ob0 (F' (fact_R F f)),
three_ob1 (F (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' f)) ⟧
C: category
F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'
L: lnwfs_over F
f: arrow C
L_lp:= LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F' f
:
arrow C ⟦ fact_L F f,
LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' f ⟧: arrow C ⟦ fact_L F f,
LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' f ⟧
L_lift:= left_reduced_lp_lift L L_lp: filler
  (arrow_mor_comm (left_reduced_lp F L_lp))
C ⟦ three_ob1 (F' (fact_R F f)),
three_ob2 (F (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' f)) ⟧
C: category
F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'
L: lnwfs_over F
f: arrow C
L_lp:= LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F' f
:
arrow C ⟦ fact_L F f,
LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' f ⟧: arrow C ⟦ fact_L F f,
LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' f ⟧
L_lift:= left_reduced_lp_lift L L_lp: filler
  (arrow_mor_comm (left_reduced_lp F L_lp))
?h · three_mor12 (F (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' f)) =
three_mor01 (F' (fact_R F f)) · ?k

  
C: category
F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'
L: lnwfs_over F
f: arrow C
L_lp:= LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F' f
:
arrow C ⟦ fact_L F f, LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' f ⟧: arrow C ⟦ fact_L F f,
LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' f ⟧
L_lift:= left_reduced_lp_lift L L_lp: filler
  (arrow_mor_comm (left_reduced_lp F L_lp))
C ⟦ three_ob0 (F' (fact_R F f)),
three_ob1 (F (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' f)) ⟧
 exact (pr1 L_lift).
  
C: category
F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'
L: lnwfs_over F
f: arrow C
L_lp:= LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F' f
:
arrow C ⟦ fact_L F f, LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' f ⟧: arrow C ⟦ fact_L F f,
LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' f ⟧
L_lift:= left_reduced_lp_lift L L_lp: filler
  (arrow_mor_comm (left_reduced_lp F L_lp))
C ⟦ three_ob1 (F' (fact_R F f)),
three_ob2 (F (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' f)) ⟧
 exact (identity _).
  
C: category
F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'
L: lnwfs_over F
f: arrow C
L_lp:= LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F' f
:
arrow C ⟦ fact_L F f, LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' f ⟧: arrow C ⟦ fact_L F f,
LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' f ⟧
L_lift:= left_reduced_lp_lift L L_lp: filler
  (arrow_mor_comm (left_reduced_lp F L_lp))
pr1 L_lift
· three_mor12 (F (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' f)) =
three_mor01 (F' (fact_R F f))
· identity (three_ob1 (F' (fact_R F f)))
 abstract (
      etrans; [exact (pr22 L_lift)|];
      apply pathsinv0;
      apply id_right
    ).
Defined.



C: category
F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'
L: lnwfs_over F
nat_trans_data (fact_L (F' ⊗ F))
  (fact_L (F' ⊗ F) ∙ fact_L (F' ⊗ F))


C: category
F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'
L: lnwfs_over F
nat_trans_data (fact_L (F' ⊗ F))
  (fact_L (F' ⊗ F) ∙ fact_L (F' ⊗ F))

  
C: category
F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'
L: lnwfs_over F
f: arrow C
arrow C ⟦ fact_L (F' ⊗ F) f,
(fact_L (F' ⊗ F) ∙ fact_L (F' ⊗ F)) f ⟧


  
C: category
F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'
L: lnwfs_over F
f: arrow C
λf:= fact_L F f: arrow C
arrow C ⟦ fact_L (F' ⊗ F) f,
(fact_L (F' ⊗ F) ∙ fact_L (F' ⊗ F)) f ⟧

  
C: category
F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'
L: lnwfs_over F
f: arrow C
λf:= fact_L F f: arrow C
λ'ρf:= fact_L F' (fact_R F f): arrow C
arrow C ⟦ fact_L (F' ⊗ F) f,
(fact_L (F' ⊗ F) ∙ fact_L (F' ⊗ F)) f ⟧

  
C: category
F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'
L: lnwfs_over F
f: arrow C
λf:= fact_L F f: arrow C
λ'ρf:= fact_L F' (fact_R F f): arrow C
comp:= LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' f: C ⟦ three_ob0 (F f),
three_ob1 (F' (fact_R F f)) ⟧
arrow C ⟦ fact_L (F' ⊗ F) f,
(fact_L (F' ⊗ F) ∙ fact_L (F' ⊗ F)) f ⟧

  
C: category
F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'
L: lnwfs_over F
f: arrow C
λf:= fact_L F f: arrow C

comp:= LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' f: C ⟦ three_ob0 (F f),
three_ob1 (F' (fact_R F f)) ⟧
λcomp:= fact_L F comp: arrow C
arrow C ⟦ fact_L (F' ⊗ F) f,
(fact_L (F' ⊗ F) ∙ fact_L (F' ⊗ F)) f ⟧

  
C: category
F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'
L: lnwfs_over F
f: arrow C
λf:= fact_L F f: arrow C
λ'ρf:= fact_L F' (fact_R F f): arrow C
comp:= LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' f: C ⟦ three_ob0 (F f),
three_ob1 (F' (fact_R F f)) ⟧
λcomp:= fact_L F comp: arrow C
ρcomp:= fact_R F comp: arrow C
arrow C ⟦ fact_L (F' ⊗ F) f,
(fact_L (F' ⊗ F) ∙ fact_L (F' ⊗ F)) f ⟧


  
C: category
F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'
L: lnwfs_over F
f: arrow C
λf:= fact_L F f: arrow C
λ'ρf:= fact_L F' (fact_R F f): arrow C
comp:= LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' f: C ⟦ three_ob0 (F f),
three_ob1 (F' (fact_R F f)) ⟧
λcomp:= fact_L F comp: arrow C
ρcomp:= fact_R F comp: arrow C
L_lp:= LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F' f
:
arrow C ⟦ fact_L F f, comp ⟧: arrow C ⟦ fact_L F f, comp ⟧
arrow C ⟦ fact_L (F' ⊗ F) f,
(fact_L (F' ⊗ F) ∙ fact_L (F' ⊗ F)) f ⟧

  
C: category
F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'
L: lnwfs_over F
f: arrow C
λf:= fact_L F f: arrow C
λ'ρf:= fact_L F' (fact_R F f): arrow C
comp:= LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' f: C ⟦ three_ob0 (F f),
three_ob1 (F' (fact_R F f)) ⟧
λcomp:= fact_L F comp: arrow C
ρcomp:= fact_R F comp: arrow C
L_lp:= LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F' f
:
arrow C ⟦ fact_L F f, comp ⟧: arrow C ⟦ fact_L F f, comp ⟧
L_lift:= left_reduced_lp_lift L L_lp: filler
  (arrow_mor_comm (left_reduced_lp F L_lp))
arrow C ⟦ fact_L (F' ⊗ F) f,
(fact_L (F' ⊗ F) ∙ fact_L (F' ⊗ F)) f ⟧


  
C: category
F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'
L: lnwfs_over F
f: arrow C
λf:= fact_L F f: arrow C

:
arrow C ⟦ fact_L F f, comp ⟧: arrow C ⟦ fact_L F f, comp ⟧
L_lift:= left_reduced_lp_lift L L_lp: filler
  (arrow_mor_comm (left_reduced_lp F L_lp))
L'_lp:= LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L f
:
arrow C ⟦ λ'ρf, ρcomp ⟧: arrow C ⟦ λ'ρf, ρcomp ⟧
arrow C ⟦ fact_L (F' ⊗ F) f,
(fact_L (F' ⊗ F) ∙ fact_L (F' ⊗ F)) f ⟧

  
C: category
F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'
L: lnwfs_over F
f: arrow C
λf:= fact_L F f: arrow C
λ'ρf:= fact_L F' (fact_R F f): arrow C
comp:= LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' f: C ⟦ three_ob0 (F f),
three_ob1 (F' (fact_R F f)) ⟧
λcomp:= fact_L F comp: arrow C
ρcomp:= fact_R F comp: arrow C
L_lp:= LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F' f
:
arrow C ⟦ fact_L F f, comp ⟧: arrow C ⟦ fact_L F f, comp ⟧
L_lift:= left_reduced_lp_lift L L_lp: filler
  (arrow_mor_comm (left_reduced_lp F L_lp))
L'_lp:= LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L f
:
arrow C ⟦ λ'ρf, ρcomp ⟧: arrow C ⟦ λ'ρf, ρcomp ⟧
L'_lift:= left_reduced_lp_lift L' L'_lp: filler
  (arrow_mor_comm (left_reduced_lp F' L'_lp))
arrow C ⟦ fact_L (F' ⊗ F) f,
(fact_L (F' ⊗ F) ∙ fact_L (F' ⊗ F)) f ⟧

F', F: Ff C

f: arrow C

λcomp:= fact_L F comp: arrow C
ρcomp:= fact_R F comp: arrow C

:
arrow C ⟦ fact_L F f, comp ⟧: arrow C ⟦ fact_L F f, comp ⟧

:

  (arrow_mor_comm (left_reduced_lp F' L'_lp))
C ⟦ three_ob0 ((F' ⊗ F) f),
three_ob0 ((F' ⊗ F) (fact_L (F' ⊗ F) f)) ⟧

F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'
L: lnwfs_over F
f: arrow C
λf:= fact_L F f: arrow C

:

  (arrow_mor_comm (left_reduced_lp F L_lp))

:
arrow C ⟦ λ'ρf, ρcomp ⟧: arrow C ⟦ λ'ρf, ρcomp ⟧
L'_lift:= left_reduced_lp_lift L' L'_lp: filler
  (arrow_mor_comm (left_reduced_lp F' L'_lp))
C ⟦ three_ob1 ((F' ⊗ F) f),
three_ob1 ((F' ⊗ F) (fact_L (F' ⊗ F) f)) ⟧
C: category
F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'
L: lnwfs_over F
f: arrow C
λf:= fact_L F f: arrow C
λ'ρf:= fact_L F' (fact_R F f): arrow C
comp:= LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' f: C ⟦ three_ob0 (F f),
three_ob1 (F' (fact_R F f)) ⟧
λcomp:= fact_L F comp: arrow C
ρcomp:= fact_R F comp: arrow C
L_lp:= LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F' f
:
arrow C ⟦ fact_L F f, comp ⟧: arrow C ⟦ fact_L F f, comp ⟧
L_lift:= left_reduced_lp_lift L L_lp: filler
  (arrow_mor_comm (left_reduced_lp F L_lp))
L'_lp:= LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L f
:
arrow C ⟦ λ'ρf, ρcomp ⟧: arrow C ⟦ λ'ρf, ρcomp ⟧
L'_lift:= left_reduced_lp_lift L' L'_lp: filler
  (arrow_mor_comm (left_reduced_lp F' L'_lp))
?h · three_mor01 ((F' ⊗ F) (fact_L (F' ⊗ F) f)) =
three_mor01 ((F' ⊗ F) f) · ?k

  
C: category
F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'
L: lnwfs_over F
f: arrow C
λf:= fact_L F f: arrow C
λ'ρf:= fact_L F' (fact_R F f): arrow C
comp:= LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' f: C ⟦ three_ob0 (F f),
three_ob1 (F' (fact_R F f)) ⟧
λcomp:= fact_L F comp: arrow C
ρcomp:= fact_R F comp: arrow C
L_lp:= LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F' f
:
arrow C ⟦ fact_L F f, comp ⟧: arrow C ⟦ fact_L F f, comp ⟧
L_lift:= left_reduced_lp_lift L L_lp: filler
  (arrow_mor_comm (left_reduced_lp F L_lp))
L'_lp:= LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L f
:
arrow C ⟦ λ'ρf, ρcomp ⟧: arrow C ⟦ λ'ρf, ρcomp ⟧
L'_lift:= left_reduced_lp_lift L' L'_lp: filler
  (arrow_mor_comm (left_reduced_lp F' L'_lp))
C ⟦ three_ob0 ((F' ⊗ F) f),
three_ob0 ((F' ⊗ F) (fact_L (F' ⊗ F) f)) ⟧
 exact (identity _).
  
C: category
F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'
L: lnwfs_over F
f: arrow C
λf:= fact_L F f: arrow C
λ'ρf:= fact_L F' (fact_R F f): arrow C
comp:= LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' f: C ⟦ three_ob0 (F f),
three_ob1 (F' (fact_R F f)) ⟧
λcomp:= fact_L F comp: arrow C
ρcomp:= fact_R F comp: arrow C
L_lp:= LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F' f
:
arrow C ⟦ fact_L F f, comp ⟧: arrow C ⟦ fact_L F f, comp ⟧
L_lift:= left_reduced_lp_lift L L_lp: filler
  (arrow_mor_comm (left_reduced_lp F L_lp))
L'_lp:= LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L f
:
arrow C ⟦ λ'ρf, ρcomp ⟧: arrow C ⟦ λ'ρf, ρcomp ⟧
L'_lift:= left_reduced_lp_lift L' L'_lp: filler
  (arrow_mor_comm (left_reduced_lp F' L'_lp))
C ⟦ three_ob1 ((F' ⊗ F) f),
three_ob1 ((F' ⊗ F) (fact_L (F' ⊗ F) f)) ⟧
 exact (pr1 L'_lift).
  
C: category
F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'
L: lnwfs_over F
f: arrow C
λf:= fact_L F f: arrow C
λ'ρf:= fact_L F' (fact_R F f): arrow C
comp:= LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' f: C ⟦ three_ob0 (F f),
three_ob1 (F' (fact_R F f)) ⟧
λcomp:= fact_L F comp: arrow C
ρcomp:= fact_R F comp: arrow C
L_lp:= LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F' f
:
arrow C ⟦ fact_L F f, comp ⟧: arrow C ⟦ fact_L F f, comp ⟧
L_lift:= left_reduced_lp_lift L L_lp: filler
  (arrow_mor_comm (left_reduced_lp F L_lp))
L'_lp:= LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L f
:
arrow C ⟦ λ'ρf, ρcomp ⟧: arrow C ⟦ λ'ρf, ρcomp ⟧
L'_lift:= left_reduced_lp_lift L' L'_lp: filler
  (arrow_mor_comm (left_reduced_lp F' L'_lp))
identity (three_ob0 ((F' ⊗ F) f))
· three_mor01 ((F' ⊗ F) (fact_L (F' ⊗ F) f)) =
three_mor01 ((F' ⊗ F) f) · pr1 L'_lift
 abstract (
      etrans; [apply id_left|];
      apply pathsinv0;
      etrans;
      [
        etrans; [apply assoc'|];
        apply cancel_precomposition;
        exact (pr12 L'_lift)
      |];
      etrans;
      [
        etrans; [apply assoc|];
        apply cancel_postcomposition;
        exact (pr12 L_lift)
      |];
      etrans; [apply assoc'|];
      etrans; [apply id_left|];
      reflexivity
    ).
Defined.

(* everything used in the construction is natural, so this
   "should be trivial". Of course it's not in UniMath, but
   we just have to reverse all the naturalities we used. *)

C: category
F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'
L: lnwfs_over F
is_nat_trans (fact_L (F' ⊗ F))
  (fact_L (F' ⊗ F) ∙ fact_L (F' ⊗ F))
  (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_data L' L)


C: category
F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'
L: lnwfs_over F
is_nat_trans (fact_L (F' ⊗ F))
  (fact_L (F' ⊗ F) ∙ fact_L (F' ⊗ F))
  (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_data L' L)

  
C: category
F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'
L: lnwfs_over F
f, g: arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, g ⟧
# (fact_L (F' ⊗ F)) γ · LNWFS_lcomp_comul_data L' L g =
LNWFS_lcomp_comul_data L' L f
· # (fact_L (F' ⊗ F) ∙ fact_L (F' ⊗ F)) γ

  
C: category
F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'
L: lnwfs_over F
f, g: arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, g ⟧
arrow_mor11
  (# (fact_L (F' ⊗ F)) γ
   · LNWFS_lcomp_comul_data L' L g) =
arrow_mor11
  (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_data L' L f
   · # (fact_L (F' ⊗ F) ∙ fact_L (F' ⊗ F)) γ)

  (* work away left side (final step of comul_data was
     to use L' to get a lift in a specific diagram) *)
  
C: category
F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'
L: lnwfs_over F
f, g: arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, g ⟧
arrow_mor11
  (# (fact_L (F' ⊗ F)) γ
   · LNWFS_lcomp_comul_data L' L g) = ?b
C: category
F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'
L: lnwfs_over F
f, g: arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, g ⟧
?b =
arrow_mor11
  (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_data L' L f
   · # (fact_L (F' ⊗ F) ∙ fact_L (F' ⊗ F)) γ)

  
C: category
F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'
L: lnwfs_over F
f, g: arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, g ⟧
arrow_mor11
  (# (fact_L (F' ⊗ F)) γ
   · LNWFS_lcomp_comul_data L' L g) = ?b

    (* rewrite naturality of L' at #ρ γ *)
    
C: category
F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'
L: lnwfs_over F
f, g: arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, g ⟧
arrow_mor11
  (# (fact_L (F' ⊗ F)) γ
   · LNWFS_lcomp_comul_data L' L g) = ?b0
C: category
F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'
L: lnwfs_over F
f, g: arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, g ⟧
?b0 = ?b
 
C: category
F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'
L: lnwfs_over F
f, g: arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, g ⟧
pr21 (# (fact_L (F' ⊗ F)) γ)
· arrow_mor11 (pr1 L' (fact_R F g))
· three_mor11
    (# F'
       (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L g
        :
        arrow C ⟦ fact_L F' (fact_R F g),
        fact_R F (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' g) ⟧)) =
?b

    
C: category
F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'
L: lnwfs_over F
f, g: arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, g ⟧
L'natργ:= nat_trans_ax (pr1 L') (fact_R F f)
  (fact_R F g) (# (fact_R F) γ): # (fact_L F') (# (fact_R F) γ)
· pr1 L' (fact_R F g) =
pr1 L' (fact_R F f)
· # (fact_L F' ∙ fact_L F') (# (fact_R F) γ)
pr21 (# (fact_L (F' ⊗ F)) γ)
· arrow_mor11 (pr1 L' (fact_R F g))
· three_mor11
    (# F'
       (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L g
        :
        arrow C ⟦ fact_L F' (fact_R F g),
        fact_R F (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' g) ⟧)) =
?b

    
C: category
F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'
L: lnwfs_over F
f, g: arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, g ⟧
L'natργ:= nat_trans_ax (pr1 L') (fact_R F f)
  (fact_R F g) (# (fact_R F) γ): # (fact_L F') (# (fact_R F) γ)
· pr1 L' (fact_R F g) =
pr1 L' (fact_R F f)
· # (fact_L F' ∙ fact_L F') (# (fact_R F) γ)
L'natργ11:= pr2
  (pathsdirprodweq
     (base_paths
        (# (fact_L F') (# (fact_R F) γ)
         · pr1 L' (fact_R F g))
        (pr1 L' (fact_R F f)
         · # (fact_L F' ∙ fact_L F')
             (# (fact_R F) γ)) L'natργ)): (λ _ : pr11 (# (fact_L F')
               (# (fact_R F) γ))
       · pr11 (pr1 L' (fact_R F g)) =
       pr11 (pr1 L' (fact_R F f))
       · pr11 (# (fact_L F' ∙ fact_L F')
                 (# (fact_R F) γ)),
 pr21 (# (fact_L F') (# (fact_R F) γ))
 · pr21 (pr1 L' (fact_R F g)) =
 pr21 (pr1 L' (fact_R F f))
 · pr21 (# (fact_L F' ∙ fact_L F')
           (# (fact_R F) γ)))
  (pr1
     (pathsdirprodweq
        (base_paths
           (# (fact_L F') (# (fact_R F) γ)
            · pr1 L' (fact_R F g))
           (pr1 L' (fact_R F f)
            · # (fact_L F' ∙ fact_L F')
                (# (fact_R F) γ)) L'natργ)))
pr21 (# (fact_L (F' ⊗ F)) γ)
· arrow_mor11 (pr1 L' (fact_R F g))
· three_mor11
    (# F'
       (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L g
        :
        arrow C ⟦ fact_L F' (fact_R F g),
        fact_R F (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' g) ⟧)) =
?b

L: lnwfs_over F

            · # (fact_L F' ∙ fact_L F')
                (# (fact_R F) γ)) L'natργ)))
pr21 (# (fact_L (F' ⊗ F)) γ)
· arrow_mor11 (pr1 L' (fact_R F g))
· three_mor11 (# F' (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L g)) =

L: lnwfs_over F

         · pr1 L' (fact_R F g))
        (pr1 L' (fact_R F f)
         · # (fact_L F' ∙ fact_L F')
             (# (fact_R F) γ)) L'natργ)): (λ _ : pr11 (# (fact_L F')
               (# (fact_R F) γ))
       · pr11 (pr1 L' (fact_R F g)) =
       pr11 (pr1 L' (fact_R F f))
       · pr11 (# (fact_L F' ∙ fact_L F')
                 (# (fact_R F) γ)),
 pr21 (# (fact_L F') (# (fact_R F) γ))
 · pr21 (pr1 L' (fact_R F g)) =
 pr21 (pr1 L' (fact_R F f))
 · pr21 (# (fact_L F' ∙ fact_L F')
           (# (fact_R F) γ)))
  (pr1
     (pathsdirprodweq
        (base_paths
           (# (fact_L F') (# (fact_R F) γ)
            · pr1 L' (fact_R F g))
           (pr1 L' (fact_R F f)
            · # (fact_L F' ∙ fact_L F')
                (# (fact_R F) γ)) L'natργ)))
pr21 (pr1 L' (fact_R F f))
· (pr21 (# (fact_L F' ∙ fact_L F') (# (fact_R F) γ))
   · three_mor11
       (# F' (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L g))) = 
?b

    
C: category
F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'
L: lnwfs_over F
f, g: arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, g ⟧
L'natργ:= nat_trans_ax (pr1 L') (fact_R F f)
  (fact_R F g) (# (fact_R F) γ): # (fact_L F') (# (fact_R F) γ)
· pr1 L' (fact_R F g) =
pr1 L' (fact_R F f)
· # (fact_L F' ∙ fact_L F') (# (fact_R F) γ)
L'natργ11:= pr2
  (pathsdirprodweq
     (base_paths
        (# (fact_L F') (# (fact_R F) γ)
         · pr1 L' (fact_R F g))
        (pr1 L' (fact_R F f)
         · # (fact_L F' ∙ fact_L F')
             (# (fact_R F) γ)) L'natργ)): (λ _ : pr11 (# (fact_L F')
               (# (fact_R F) γ))
       · pr11 (pr1 L' (fact_R F g)) =
       pr11 (pr1 L' (fact_R F f))
       · pr11 (# (fact_L F' ∙ fact_L F')
                 (# (fact_R F) γ)),
 pr21 (# (fact_L F') (# (fact_R F) γ))
 · pr21 (pr1 L' (fact_R F g)) =
 pr21 (pr1 L' (fact_R F f))
 · pr21 (# (fact_L F' ∙ fact_L F')
           (# (fact_R F) γ)))
  (pr1
     (pathsdirprodweq
        (base_paths
           (# (fact_L F') (# (fact_R F) γ)
            · pr1 L' (fact_R F g))
           (pr1 L' (fact_R F f)
            · # (fact_L F' ∙ fact_L F')
                (# (fact_R F) γ)) L'natργ)))
pr21 (# (fact_L F' ∙ fact_L F') (# (fact_R F) γ))
· three_mor11 (# F' (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L g)) =
?f'


    use (pr1_section_disp_on_morphisms_comp F').
  
C: category
F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'
L: lnwfs_over F
f, g: arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, g ⟧
pr21 (pr1 L' (fact_R F f))
· pr1
    (section_disp_on_morphisms F'
       (# (fact_L F') (# (fact_R F) γ)
        · LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L g)) =
arrow_mor11
  (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_data L' L f
   · # (fact_L (F' ⊗ F) ∙ fact_L (F' ⊗ F)) γ)


  
C: category
F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'
L: lnwfs_over F
f, g: arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, g ⟧
arrow_mor11
  (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_data L' L f
   · # (fact_L (F' ⊗ F) ∙ fact_L (F' ⊗ F)) γ) =
pr21 (pr1 L' (fact_R F f))
· pr1
    (section_disp_on_morphisms F'
       (# (fact_L F') (# (fact_R F) γ)
        · LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L g))

  
C: category
F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'
L: lnwfs_over F
f, g: arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, g ⟧
arrow_mor11
  (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_data L' L f
   · # (fact_L (F' ⊗ F) ∙ fact_L (F' ⊗ F)) γ) = ?b
C: category
F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'
L: lnwfs_over F
f, g: arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, g ⟧
?b =
pr21 (pr1 L' (fact_R F f))
· pr1
    (section_disp_on_morphisms F'
       (# (fact_L F') (# (fact_R F) γ)
        · LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L g))
 
C: category
F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'
L: lnwfs_over F
f, g: arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, g ⟧
arrow_mor11 (pr1 L' (fact_R F f))
· (three_mor11
     (# F'
        (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L f
         :
         arrow C ⟦ fact_L F' (fact_R F f),
         fact_R F (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' f) ⟧))
   · pr21 (# (fact_L (F' ⊗ F) ∙ fact_L (F' ⊗ F)) γ)) =
pr21 (pr1 L' (fact_R F f))
· pr1
    (section_disp_on_morphisms F'
       (# (fact_L F') (# (fact_R F) γ)
        · LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L g))

  
C: category
F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'
L: lnwfs_over F
f, g: arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, g ⟧
three_mor11 (# F' (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L f))
· pr21 (# (fact_L (F' ⊗ F) ∙ fact_L (F' ⊗ F)) γ) =
pr1
  (section_disp_on_morphisms F'
     (# (fact_L F') (# (fact_R F) γ)
      · LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L g))


  
C: category
F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'
L: lnwfs_over F
f, g: arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, g ⟧
three_mor11 (# F' (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L f))
· pr21 (# (fact_L (F' ⊗ F) ∙ fact_L (F' ⊗ F)) γ) = 
?b
C: category
F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'
L: lnwfs_over F
f, g: arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, g ⟧
?b =
pr1
  (section_disp_on_morphisms F'
     (# (fact_L F') (# (fact_R F) γ)
      · LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L g))
 
C: category
F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'
L: lnwfs_over F
f, g: arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, g ⟧
pr1
  (section_disp_on_morphisms F'
     (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L f
      · # (fact_R F) (# (fact_L (F' ⊗ F)) γ))) =
pr1
  (section_disp_on_morphisms F'
     (# (fact_L F') (# (fact_R F) γ)
      · LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L g))

  
C: category
F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'
L: lnwfs_over F
f, g: arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, g ⟧
arrow_mor00
  (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L f
   · # (fact_R F) (# (fact_L (F' ⊗ F)) γ)) =
arrow_mor00
  (# (fact_L F') (# (fact_R F) γ)
   · LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L g)


  (* work away on right side, first step in comul_data
      was to obtain a lift using L *)
  
C: category
F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'
L: lnwfs_over F
f, g: arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, g ⟧
arrow_mor00
  (# (fact_L F') (# (fact_R F) γ)
   · LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L g) =
arrow_mor00
  (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L f
   · # (fact_R F) (# (fact_L (F' ⊗ F)) γ))

  
C: category
F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'
L: lnwfs_over F
f, g: arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, g ⟧
arrow_mor00
  (# (fact_L F') (# (fact_R F) γ)
   · LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L g) = ?b
C: category
F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'
L: lnwfs_over F
f, g: arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, g ⟧
?b =
arrow_mor00
  (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L f
   · # (fact_R F) (# (fact_L (F' ⊗ F)) γ))
 
C: category
F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'
L: lnwfs_over F
f, g: arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, g ⟧
pr11 (# (fact_L F') (# (fact_R F) γ))
· arrow_mor11 (pr1 L g)
· three_mor11
    (# F
       (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F' g
        :
        arrow C ⟦ fact_L F g,
        LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' g ⟧)) =
arrow_mor00
  (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L f
   · # (fact_R F) (# (fact_L (F' ⊗ F)) γ))

  
C: category
F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'
L: lnwfs_over F
f, g: arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, g ⟧
pr11 (# (fact_L F') (# (fact_R F) γ))
· arrow_mor11 (pr1 L g)
· three_mor11 (# F (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F' g)) =
?b
C: category
F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'
L: lnwfs_over F
f, g: arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, g ⟧
?b =
arrow_mor00
  (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L f
   · # (fact_R F) (# (fact_L (F' ⊗ F)) γ))
 
C: category
F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'
L: lnwfs_over F
f, g: arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, g ⟧
pr11 (# (fact_L F') (# (fact_R F) γ))
· arrow_mor11 (pr1 L g) = ?f'
C: category
F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'
L: lnwfs_over F
f, g: arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, g ⟧
?f'
· three_mor11 (# F (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F' g)) =
arrow_mor00
  (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L f
   · # (fact_R F) (# (fact_L (F' ⊗ F)) γ))

  
C: category
F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'
L: lnwfs_over F
f, g: arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, g ⟧
pr11 (# (fact_L F') (# (fact_R F) γ))
· arrow_mor11 (pr1 L g) = ?f'

    (* rewrite naturality of L *)
    
C: category
F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'
L: lnwfs_over F
f, g: arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, g ⟧
Lnatγ:= nat_trans_ax (pr1 L) f g γ: # (fact_L F) γ · pr1 L g =
pr1 L f · # (fact_L F ∙ fact_L F) γ
pr11 (# (fact_L F') (# (fact_R F) γ))
· arrow_mor11 (pr1 L g) = ?f'

    
C: category
F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'
L: lnwfs_over F
f, g: arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, g ⟧
Lnatγ:= nat_trans_ax (pr1 L) f g γ: # (fact_L F) γ · pr1 L g =
pr1 L f · # (fact_L F ∙ fact_L F) γ
Lnatγ11:= pr2
  (pathsdirprodweq
     (base_paths (# (fact_L F) γ · pr1 L g)
        (pr1 L f · # (fact_L F ∙ fact_L F) γ)
        Lnatγ)): (λ _ : pr11 (# (fact_L F) γ)
       · pr11 (pr1 L g) =
       pr11 (pr1 L f)
       · pr11 (# (fact_L F ∙ fact_L F) γ),
 pr21 (# (fact_L F) γ) · pr21 (pr1 L g) =
 pr21 (pr1 L f)
 · pr21 (# (fact_L F ∙ fact_L F) γ))
  (pr1
     (pathsdirprodweq
        (base_paths
           (# (fact_L F) γ · pr1 L g)
           (pr1 L f
            · # (fact_L F ∙ fact_L F) γ)
           Lnatγ)))
pr11 (# (fact_L F') (# (fact_R F) γ))
· arrow_mor11 (pr1 L g) = ?f'

    exact (Lnatγ11).
  
C: category
F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'
L: lnwfs_over F
f, g: arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, g ⟧
pr21 (pr1 L f) · pr21 (# (fact_L F ∙ fact_L F) γ)
· three_mor11 (# F (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F' g)) =
arrow_mor00
  (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L f
   · # (fact_R F) (# (fact_L (F' ⊗ F)) γ))


  
C: category
F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'
L: lnwfs_over F
f, g: arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, g ⟧
pr21 (pr1 L f) · pr21 (# (fact_L F ∙ fact_L F) γ)
· three_mor11 (# F (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F' g)) =
?b
C: category
F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'
L: lnwfs_over F
f, g: arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, g ⟧
?b =
arrow_mor00
  (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L f
   · # (fact_R F) (# (fact_L (F' ⊗ F)) γ))
 
C: category
F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'
L: lnwfs_over F
f, g: arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, g ⟧
pr21 (pr1 L f)
· (pr21 (# (fact_L F ∙ fact_L F) γ)
   · three_mor11 (# F (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F' g))) =
arrow_mor00
  (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L f
   · # (fact_R F) (# (fact_L (F' ⊗ F)) γ))

  
C: category
F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'
L: lnwfs_over F
f, g: arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, g ⟧
arrow_mor00
  (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L f
   · # (fact_R F) (# (fact_L (F' ⊗ F)) γ)) =
pr21 (pr1 L f)
· (pr21 (# (fact_L F ∙ fact_L F) γ)
   · three_mor11 (# F (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F' g)))

  
C: category
F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'
L: lnwfs_over F
f, g: arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, g ⟧
arrow_mor00
  (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L f
   · # (fact_R F) (# (fact_L (F' ⊗ F)) γ)) = ?b
C: category
F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'
L: lnwfs_over F
f, g: arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, g ⟧
?b =
pr21 (pr1 L f)
· (pr21 (# (fact_L F ∙ fact_L F) γ)
   · three_mor11 (# F (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F' g)))
 
C: category
F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'
L: lnwfs_over F
f, g: arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, g ⟧
arrow_mor11 (pr1 L f)
· (three_mor11
     (# F
        (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F' f
         :
         arrow C ⟦ fact_L F f,
         LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' f ⟧))
   · pr11 (# (fact_R F) (# (fact_L (F' ⊗ F)) γ))) =
pr21 (pr1 L f)
· (pr21 (# (fact_L F ∙ fact_L F) γ)
   · three_mor11 (# F (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F' g)))

  
C: category
F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'
L: lnwfs_over F
f, g: arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, g ⟧
three_mor11 (# F (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F' f))
· pr11 (# (fact_R F) (# (fact_L (F' ⊗ F)) γ)) =
pr21 (# (fact_L F ∙ fact_L F) γ)
· three_mor11 (# F (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F' g))


  
C: category
F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'
L: lnwfs_over F
f, g: arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, g ⟧
three_mor11 (# F (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F' f))
· pr11 (# (fact_R F) (# (fact_L (F' ⊗ F)) γ)) = ?b
C: category
F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'
L: lnwfs_over F
f, g: arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, g ⟧
?b =
pr21 (# (fact_L F ∙ fact_L F) γ)
· three_mor11 (# F (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F' g))
 
C: category
F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'
L: lnwfs_over F
f, g: arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, g ⟧
pr1
  (section_disp_on_morphisms F
     (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F' f
      · # (fact_L (F' ⊗ F)) γ)) =
pr21 (# (fact_L F ∙ fact_L F) γ)
· three_mor11 (# F (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F' g))

  
C: category
F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'
L: lnwfs_over F
f, g: arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, g ⟧
pr21 (# (fact_L F ∙ fact_L F) γ)
· three_mor11 (# F (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F' g)) =
pr1
  (section_disp_on_morphisms F
     (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F' f
      · # (fact_L (F' ⊗ F)) γ))

  
C: category
F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'
L: lnwfs_over F
f, g: arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, g ⟧
pr21 (# (fact_L F ∙ fact_L F) γ)
· three_mor11 (# F (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F' g)) =
?b
C: category
F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'
L: lnwfs_over F
f, g: arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, g ⟧
?b =
pr1
  (section_disp_on_morphisms F
     (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F' f
      · # (fact_L (F' ⊗ F)) γ))
 
C: category
F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'
L: lnwfs_over F
f, g: arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, g ⟧
pr1
  (section_disp_on_morphisms F
     (# (fact_L F) γ · LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F' g)) =
pr1
  (section_disp_on_morphisms F
     (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F' f
      · # (fact_L (F' ⊗ F)) γ))

  
C: category
F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'
L: lnwfs_over F
f, g: arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, g ⟧
arrow_mor11
  (# (fact_L F) γ · LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F' g) =
arrow_mor11
  (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F' f
   · # (fact_L (F' ⊗ F)) γ)


  (* cbn.
  unfold three_mor11, three_mor01.
  cbn. *)
  (* commutativity of F' on morphism #ρ γ *)
  (* middle step was composing a diagram in a specific way *)
  
C: category
F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'
L: lnwfs_over F
f, g: arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, g ⟧
arrow_mor11
  (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F' f
   · # (fact_L (F' ⊗ F)) γ) =
arrow_mor11
  (# (fact_L F) γ · LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F' g)

  exact (pr1 (three_mor_comm (#(fact_functor F') (#(fact_R F ) γ)))).
Qed.

Definition LNWFS_lcomp_comul {F' F : Ff C} (L' : lnwfs_over F') (L : lnwfs_over F) :
    (fact_L (F' ⊗ F)) ⟹ ((fact_L (F' ⊗ F)) ∙ (fact_L (F' ⊗ F))) :=
  (_,, LNWFS_lcomp_comul_axioms L' L).

Global Opaque left_reduced_lp.
Global Opaque left_reduced_lp_lift.
Global Opaque LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp.
Global Opaque LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp.

(* This is perhaps the most interesting proof, proving that
   the comultiplication is associative on the middle morphisms. *)

C: category
F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'
L: lnwfs_over F
a: arrow C
arrow_mor11
  (disp_δ
     (L_monad_data (F' ⊗ F) (LNWFS_lcomp_comul L' L))
     a
   · # (fact_L (F' ⊗ F))
       (disp_δ
          (L_monad_data (F' ⊗ F)
             (LNWFS_lcomp_comul L' L)) a)) =
arrow_mor11
  (disp_δ
     (L_monad_data (F' ⊗ F) (LNWFS_lcomp_comul L' L))
     a
   · disp_δ
       (L_monad_data (F' ⊗ F) (LNWFS_lcomp_comul L' L))
       (fact_L (F' ⊗ F) a))


C: category
F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'
L: lnwfs_over F
a: arrow C
arrow_mor11
  (disp_δ
     (L_monad_data (F' ⊗ F) (LNWFS_lcomp_comul L' L))
     a
   · # (fact_L (F' ⊗ F))
       (disp_δ
          (L_monad_data (F' ⊗ F)
             (LNWFS_lcomp_comul L' L)) a)) =
arrow_mor11
  (disp_δ
     (L_monad_data (F' ⊗ F) (LNWFS_lcomp_comul L' L))
     a
   · disp_δ
       (L_monad_data (F' ⊗ F) (LNWFS_lcomp_comul L' L))
       (fact_L (F' ⊗ F) a))

  
C: category
F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'
L: lnwfs_over F
a: arrow C
law3:= Comonad_law3: ∏ c : arrow C,
δ (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L)) c
· # (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L))
    (δ (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L)) c) =
δ (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L)) c
· δ (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L))
    (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L) c)
arrow_mor11
  (disp_δ
     (L_monad_data (F' ⊗ F) (LNWFS_lcomp_comul L' L))
     a
   · # (fact_L (F' ⊗ F))
       (disp_δ
          (L_monad_data (F' ⊗ F)
             (LNWFS_lcomp_comul L' L)) a)) =
arrow_mor11
  (disp_δ
     (L_monad_data (F' ⊗ F) (LNWFS_lcomp_comul L' L))
     a
   · disp_δ
       (L_monad_data (F' ⊗ F) (LNWFS_lcomp_comul L' L))
       (fact_L (F' ⊗ F) a))

  
C: category
F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'
L: lnwfs_over F
a: arrow C
law3:= Comonad_law3: ∏ c : arrow C,
δ (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L)) c
· # (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L))
    (δ (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L)) c) =
δ (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L)) c
· δ (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L))
    (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L) c)
law3':= Comonad_law3: ∏ c : arrow C,
δ (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L')) c
· # (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L'))
    (δ (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L')) c) =
δ (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L')) c
· δ (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L'))
    (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L') c)
arrow_mor11
  (disp_δ
     (L_monad_data (F' ⊗ F) (LNWFS_lcomp_comul L' L))
     a
   · # (fact_L (F' ⊗ F))
       (disp_δ
          (L_monad_data (F' ⊗ F)
             (LNWFS_lcomp_comul L' L)) a)) =
arrow_mor11
  (disp_δ
     (L_monad_data (F' ⊗ F) (LNWFS_lcomp_comul L' L))
     a
   · disp_δ
       (L_monad_data (F' ⊗ F) (LNWFS_lcomp_comul L' L))
       (fact_L (F' ⊗ F) a))


  (* First we want to rewrite the associativity law for F' *)
  
C: category
F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'
L: lnwfs_over F
a: arrow C
law3:= Comonad_law3: ∏ c : arrow C,
δ (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L)) c
· # (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L))
    (δ (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L)) c) =
δ (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L)) c
· δ (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L))
    (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L) c)
law3':= Comonad_law3: ∏ c : arrow C,
δ (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L')) c
· # (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L'))
    (δ (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L')) c) =
δ (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L')) c
· δ (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L'))
    (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L') c)
arrow_mor11
  (disp_δ
     (L_monad_data (F' ⊗ F) (LNWFS_lcomp_comul L' L))
     a
   · disp_δ
       (L_monad_data (F' ⊗ F) (LNWFS_lcomp_comul L' L))
       (fact_L (F' ⊗ F) a)) =
arrow_mor11
  (disp_δ
     (L_monad_data (F' ⊗ F) (LNWFS_lcomp_comul L' L))
     a
   · # (fact_L (F' ⊗ F))
       (disp_δ
          (L_monad_data (F' ⊗ F)
             (LNWFS_lcomp_comul L' L)) a))

  
C: category
F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'
L: lnwfs_over F
a: arrow C
law3:= Comonad_law3: ∏ c : arrow C,
δ (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L)) c
· # (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L))
    (δ (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L)) c) =
δ (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L)) c
· δ (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L))
    (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L) c)
law3':= Comonad_law3: ∏ c : arrow C,
δ (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L')) c
· # (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L'))
    (δ (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L')) c) =
δ (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L')) c
· δ (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L'))
    (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L') c)
arrow_mor11
  (disp_δ
     (L_monad_data (F' ⊗ F) (LNWFS_lcomp_comul L' L))
     a
   · disp_δ
       (L_monad_data (F' ⊗ F) (LNWFS_lcomp_comul L' L))
       (fact_L (F' ⊗ F) a)) = ?b
C: category
F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'
L: lnwfs_over F
a: arrow C
law3:= Comonad_law3: ∏ c : arrow C,
δ (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L)) c
· # (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L))
    (δ (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L)) c) =
δ (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L)) c
· δ (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L))
    (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L) c)
law3':= Comonad_law3: ∏ c : arrow C,
δ (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L')) c
· # (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L'))
    (δ (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L')) c) =
δ (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L')) c
· δ (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L'))
    (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L') c)
?b =
arrow_mor11
  (disp_δ
     (L_monad_data (F' ⊗ F) (LNWFS_lcomp_comul L' L))
     a
   · # (fact_L (F' ⊗ F))
       (disp_δ
          (L_monad_data (F' ⊗ F)
             (LNWFS_lcomp_comul L' L)) a))
 
C: category
F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'
L: lnwfs_over F
a: arrow C
law3:= Comonad_law3: ∏ c : arrow C,
δ (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L)) c
· # (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L))
    (δ (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L)) c) =
δ (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L)) c
· δ (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L))
    (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L) c)
law3':= Comonad_law3: ∏ c : arrow C,
δ (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L')) c
· # (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L'))
    (δ (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L')) c) =
δ (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L')) c
· δ (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L'))
    (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L') c)
arrow_mor11 (pr1 L' (fact_R F a))
· (three_mor11
     (# F'
        (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L a
         :
         arrow C ⟦ fact_L F' (fact_R F a),
         fact_R F (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' a) ⟧))
   · pr21 (disp_δ
             (L_monad_data (F' ⊗ F)
                (LNWFS_lcomp_comul L' L))
             (fact_L (F' ⊗ F) a))) =
arrow_mor11
  (disp_δ
     (L_monad_data (F' ⊗ F) (LNWFS_lcomp_comul L' L))
     a
   · # (fact_L (F' ⊗ F))
       (disp_δ
          (L_monad_data (F' ⊗ F)
             (LNWFS_lcomp_comul L' L)) a))

F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'
L: lnwfs_over F
a: arrow C
law3:= Comonad_law3: ∏ c : arrow C,
δ (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L)) c
· # (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L))
    (δ (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L)) c) =
δ (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L)) c
· δ (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L))
    (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L) c)

    (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L') c)

· (three_mor11 (# F' (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L a))
   · pr21 (disp_δ
             (L_monad_data (F' ⊗ F)
                (LNWFS_lcomp_comul L' L))
             (fact_L (F' ⊗ F) a))) = ?b

    (δ (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L)) c) =

· δ (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L))
    (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L) c)
law3':= Comonad_law3: ∏ c : arrow C,
δ (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L')) c
· # (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L'))
    (δ (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L')) c) =

· δ (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L'))
    (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L') c)
?b =
arrow_mor11
  (disp_δ
     (L_monad_data (F' ⊗ F) (LNWFS_lcomp_comul L' L))
     a
   · # (fact_L (F' ⊗ F))
       (disp_δ
          (L_monad_data (F' ⊗ F)
             (LNWFS_lcomp_comul L' L)) a))
 
C: category
F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'
L: lnwfs_over F
a: arrow C
law3:= Comonad_law3: ∏ c : arrow C,
δ (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L)) c
· # (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L))
    (δ (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L)) c) =
δ (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L)) c
· δ (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L))
    (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L) c)
law3':= Comonad_law3: ∏ c : arrow C,
δ (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L')) c
· # (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L'))
    (δ (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L')) c) =
δ (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L')) c
· δ (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L'))
    (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L') c)
arrow_mor11 (pr1 L' (fact_R F a))
· (three_mor11 (# F' (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L a))
   · arrow_mor11
       (pr1 L' (fact_R F (fact_L (F' ⊗ F) a)))
   · three_mor11
       (# F'
          (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L
             (fact_L (F' ⊗ F) a)
           :
           arrow C
           ⟦ fact_L F' (fact_R F (fact_L (F' ⊗ F) a)),
           fact_R F
             (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F'
                (fact_L (F' ⊗ F) a)) ⟧))) =
arrow_mor11
  (disp_δ
     (L_monad_data (F' ⊗ F) (LNWFS_lcomp_comul L' L))
     a
   · # (fact_L (F' ⊗ F))
       (disp_δ
          (L_monad_data (F' ⊗ F)
             (LNWFS_lcomp_comul L' L)) a))

F', F: Ff C

L: lnwfs_over F
a: arrow C

          (L_monad_data (F' ⊗ F)
             (LNWFS_lcomp_comul L' L)) a)) =

· (three_mor11 (# F' (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L a))
   · arrow_mor11
       (pr1 L' (fact_R F (fact_L (F' ⊗ F) a)))
   · three_mor11

    (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L) c)
law3':= Comonad_law3: ∏ c : arrow C,
δ (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L')) c
· # (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L'))
    (δ (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L')) c) =
δ (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L')) c
· δ (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L'))
    (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L') c)
arrow_mor11 (pr1 L' (fact_R F a)) · ?f' =
arrow_mor11 (pr1 L' (fact_R F a))
· (three_mor11 (# F' (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L a))
   · arrow_mor11
       (pr1 L' (fact_R F (fact_L (F' ⊗ F) a)))
   · three_mor11
       (# F'
          (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L
             (fact_L (F' ⊗ F) a))))

· pr21 (# (fact_L (F' ⊗ F))
          (disp_δ
             (L_monad_data (F' ⊗ F)
                (LNWFS_lcomp_comul L' L)) a)) = ?f'

    apply (pr1_section_disp_on_morphisms_comp F').

δ (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L')) c
· δ (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L'))
    (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L') c)
natL'L'_lp:= nat_trans_ax (pr1 L')
  (fact_L F' (fact_R F a))
  (fact_R F
     (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' a))
  (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L a): # (fact_L F')
  (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L a)
· pr1 L'
    (fact_R F
       (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' a)) =
pr1 L' (fact_L F' (fact_R F a))
· # (fact_L F' ∙ fact_L F')
    (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L a)
arrow_mor11 (pr1 L' (fact_R F a))
· (pr21 (pr1 L' (fact_L F' (fact_R F a)))
   · pr21 (# (fact_L F' ∙ fact_L F')
             (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L a)))
· three_mor11
    (# F'
       (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L
          (fact_L (F' ⊗ F) a))) =
arrow_mor11 (pr1 L' (fact_R F a))
· pr1
    (section_disp_on_morphisms F'
       (pr1 (# F' (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L a))
        · pr1
            (# F'
               (# (fact_R F)
                  (disp_δ
                     (L_monad_data (F' ⊗ F)
                        (LNWFS_lcomp_comul L' L)) a)))))

pr1 L' (fact_L F' (fact_R F a))
· # (fact_L F' ∙ fact_L F')
    (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L a)
pr21 (δ (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L')) (fact_R F a))
· pr21 (# (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L'))
          (δ (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L'))
             (fact_R F a)))
· (pr21 (# (fact_L F' ∙ fact_L F')
           (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L a))
   · three_mor11
       (# F'
          (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L
             (fact_L (F' ⊗ F) a)))) =
arrow_mor11 (pr1 L' (fact_R F a))
· pr1
    (section_disp_on_morphisms F'
       (pr1 (# F' (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L a))
        · pr1
            (# F'
               (# (fact_R F)
                  (disp_δ
                     (L_monad_data (F' ⊗ F)
                        (LNWFS_lcomp_comul L' L)) a)))))

  
C: category
F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'
L: lnwfs_over F
a: arrow C
law3:= Comonad_law3: ∏ c : arrow C,
δ (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L)) c
· # (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L))
    (δ (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L)) c) =
δ (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L)) c
· δ (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L))
    (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L) c)
law3':= Comonad_law3: ∏ c : arrow C,
δ (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L')) c
· # (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L'))
    (δ (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L')) c) =
δ (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L')) c
· δ (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L'))
    (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L') c)
natL'L'_lp:= nat_trans_ax (pr1 L')
  (fact_L F' (fact_R F a))
  (fact_R F
     (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' a))
  (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L a): # (fact_L F')
  (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L a)
· pr1 L'
    (fact_R F
       (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' a)) =
pr1 L' (fact_L F' (fact_R F a))
· # (fact_L F' ∙ fact_L F')
    (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L a)
pr21 (δ (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L')) (fact_R F a))
· pr21 (# (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L'))
          (δ (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L'))
             (fact_R F a)))
· (pr21 (# (fact_L F' ∙ fact_L F')
           (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L a))
   · three_mor11
       (# F'
          (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L
             (fact_L (F' ⊗ F) a)))) = ?b

  (fact_L F' (fact_R F a))

  (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L a): # (fact_L F')
  (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L a)
· pr1 L'
    (fact_R F
       (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' a)) =

· # (fact_L F' ∙ fact_L F')
    (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L a)
?b =
arrow_mor11 (pr1 L' (fact_R F a))
· pr1
    (section_disp_on_morphisms F'
       (pr1 (# F' (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L a))
        · pr1
            (# F'

  (* What is left is F' applied to the associativity law of F *)

pr1 L' (fact_L F' (fact_R F a))
· # (fact_L F' ∙ fact_L F')
    (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L a)
?b =
pr1
  (section_disp_on_morphisms F'
     (pr1 (# F' (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L a))
      · pr1
          (# F'
             (# (fact_R F)
                (disp_δ
                   (L_monad_data 
                      (F' ⊗ F)
                      (LNWFS_lcomp_comul L' L)) a)))))

         :
         arrow C ⟦ fact_L F a,
         LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' a ⟧))
   · pr111 (# F'
              (# (fact_R F)
                 (disp_δ
                    (L_monad_data (F' ⊗ F)
                       (LNWFS_lcomp_comul L' L)) a)))) =
pr111 (# F'
         (δ (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L'))
            (fact_R F a)))
· pr111 (# F'
           (# (fact_L F')
              (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L a)))
· pr111 (# F'
           (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L
              (fact_L (F' ⊗ F) a)))

    
C: category
F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'
L: lnwfs_over F
a: arrow C
law3:= Comonad_law3: ∏ c : arrow C,
δ (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L)) c
· # (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L))
    (δ (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L)) c) =
δ (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L)) c
· δ (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L))
    (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L) c)
law3':= Comonad_law3: ∏ c : arrow C,
δ (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L')) c
· # (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L'))
    (δ (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L')) c) =
δ (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L')) c
· δ (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L'))
    (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L') c)
natL'L'_lp:= nat_trans_ax (pr1 L')
  (fact_L F' (fact_R F a))
  (fact_R F
     (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' a))
  (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L a): # (fact_L F')
  (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L a)
· pr1 L'
    (fact_R F
       (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' a)) =
pr1 L' (fact_L F' (fact_R F a))
· # (fact_L F' ∙ fact_L F')
    (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L a)
pr111 (# F'
         (δ (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L'))
            (fact_R F a)))
· pr111 (# F'
           (# (fact_L F')
              (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L a)))
· pr111 (# F'
           (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L
              (fact_L (F' ⊗ F) a))) =
arrow_mor11 (pr1 L a)
· (three_mor11 (# F (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F' a))
   · pr111 (# F'
              (# (fact_R F)
                 (disp_δ
                    (L_monad_data (F' ⊗ F)
                       (LNWFS_lcomp_comul L' L)) a))))

· pr1 L'
    (fact_R F
       (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' a)) =
pr1 L' (fact_L F' (fact_R F a))
· # (fact_L F' ∙ fact_L F')
    (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L a)
arrow_mor11 (pr1 L a)
· (three_mor11
     (# F
        (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F' a
         :
         arrow C ⟦ fact_L F a,
         LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' a ⟧))
   · pr111 (# F'
              (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L
                 (fact_L (F' ⊗ F) a)))) =
arrow_mor11 (pr1 L a)
· (three_mor11 (# F (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F' a))
   · pr111 (# F'
              (# (fact_R F)
                 (disp_δ
                    (L_monad_data (F' ⊗ F)
                       (LNWFS_lcomp_comul L' L)) a))))

  (fact_L F' (fact_R F a))

     (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' a))
  (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L a): # (fact_L F')

· # (fact_L F' ∙ fact_L F')

  (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' a)
  (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F' a): # (fact_L F)
  (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F' a)
· pr1 L (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' a) =
pr1 L (fact_L F a)
· # (fact_L F ∙ fact_L F)
    (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F' a)
arrow_mor11 (pr1 L a)
· (three_mor11
     (# F
        (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F' a
         :
         arrow C ⟦ fact_L F a,
         LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' a ⟧))
   · pr111 (# F'
              (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L
                 (fact_L (F' ⊗ F) a)))) =
arrow_mor11 (pr1 L a)
· (three_mor11 (# F (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F' a))
   · pr111 (# F'
              (# (fact_R F)
                 (disp_δ
                    (L_monad_data (F' ⊗ F)
                       (LNWFS_lcomp_comul L' L)) a))))

δ (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L')) c
· # (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L'))
    (δ (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L')) c) =
δ (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L')) c
· δ (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L'))
    (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L') c)
natL'L'_lp:= nat_trans_ax (pr1 L')
  (fact_L F' (fact_R F a))
  (fact_R F
     (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' a))
  (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L a): # (fact_L F')
  (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L a)
· pr1 L'
    (fact_R F
       (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' a)) =
pr1 L' (fact_L F' (fact_R F a))
· # (fact_L F' ∙ fact_L F')
    (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L a)
natLL_lp:= nat_trans_ax (pr1 L) (fact_L F a)
  (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' a)
  (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F' a): # (fact_L F)
  (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F' a)
· pr1 L (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' a) =
pr1 L (fact_L F a)
· # (fact_L F ∙ fact_L F)
    (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F' a)
arrow_mor11 (pr1 L a)
· (?f'
   · three_mor11
       (# F
          (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F'
             (fact_L (F' ⊗ F) a)))) =
arrow_mor11 (pr1 L a)
· (three_mor11 (# F (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F' a))
   · pr111 (# F'
              (# (fact_R F)
                 (disp_δ
                    (L_monad_data 
                       (F' ⊗ F)
                       (LNWFS_lcomp_comul L' L)) a))))

             (fact_L (F' ⊗ F) a)))) =

   · pr111 (# F'

                    (L_monad_data (F' ⊗ F)
                       (LNWFS_lcomp_comul L' L)) a))))

  (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' a)
  (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F' a): # (fact_L F)
  (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F' a)
· pr1 L (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' a) =
pr1 L (fact_L F a)
· # (fact_L F ∙ fact_L F)
    (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F' a)
?b =
arrow_mor11 (pr1 L a)
· (three_mor11 (# F (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F' a))
   · pr111 (# F'
              (# (fact_R F)
                 (disp_δ
                    (L_monad_data 
                       (F' ⊗ F)
                       (LNWFS_lcomp_comul L' L)) a))))

                    (L_monad_data (F' ⊗ F)
                       (LNWFS_lcomp_comul L' L)) a))))

    
C: category
F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'
L: lnwfs_over F
a: arrow C
law3:= Comonad_law3: ∏ c : arrow C,
δ (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L)) c
· # (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L))
    (δ (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L)) c) =
δ (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L)) c
· δ (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L))
    (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L) c)
law3':= Comonad_law3: ∏ c : arrow C,
δ (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L')) c
· # (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L'))
    (δ (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L')) c) =
δ (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L')) c
· δ (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L'))
    (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L') c)
natL'L'_lp:= nat_trans_ax (pr1 L')
  (fact_L F' (fact_R F a))
  (fact_R F
     (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' a))
  (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L a): # (fact_L F')
  (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L a)
· pr1 L'
    (fact_R F
       (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' a)) =
pr1 L' (fact_L F' (fact_R F a))
· # (fact_L F' ∙ fact_L F')
    (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L a)
natLL_lp:= nat_trans_ax (pr1 L) (fact_L F a)
  (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' a)
  (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F' a): # (fact_L F)
  (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F' a)
· pr1 L (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' a) =
pr1 L (fact_L F a)
· # (fact_L F ∙ fact_L F)
    (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F' a)
pr21 (# (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L))
        (δ (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L)) a))
· (pr21 (# (fact_L F ∙ fact_L F)
           (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F' a))
   · three_mor11
       (# F
          (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F'
             (fact_L (F' ⊗ F) a)))) =
three_mor11 (# F (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F' a))
· pr111 (# F'
           (# (fact_R F)
              (disp_δ
                 (L_monad_data (F' ⊗ F)
                    (LNWFS_lcomp_comul L' L)) a)))


    (* what is left is F applied to some morphism *)
    
C: category
F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'
L: lnwfs_over F
a: arrow C
law3:= Comonad_law3: ∏ c : arrow C,
δ (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L)) c
· # (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L))
    (δ (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L)) c) =
δ (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L)) c
· δ (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L))
    (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L) c)
law3':= Comonad_law3: ∏ c : arrow C,
δ (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L')) c
· # (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L'))
    (δ (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L')) c) =
δ (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L')) c
· δ (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L'))
    (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L') c)
natL'L'_lp:= nat_trans_ax (pr1 L')
  (fact_L F' (fact_R F a))
  (fact_R F
     (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' a))
  (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L a): # (fact_L F')
  (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L a)
· pr1 L'
    (fact_R F
       (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' a)) =
pr1 L' (fact_L F' (fact_R F a))
· # (fact_L F' ∙ fact_L F')
    (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L a)
natLL_lp:= nat_trans_ax (pr1 L) (fact_L F a)
  (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' a)
  (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F' a): # (fact_L F)
  (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F' a)
· pr1 L (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' a) =
pr1 L (fact_L F a)
· # (fact_L F ∙ fact_L F)
    (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F' a)
pr21 (# (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L))
        (δ (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L)) a))
· (pr21 (# (fact_L F ∙ fact_L F)
           (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F' a))
   · three_mor11
       (# F
          (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F'
             (fact_L (F' ⊗ F) a)))) = ?b
C: category
F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'
L: lnwfs_over F
a: arrow C
law3:= Comonad_law3: ∏ c : arrow C,
δ (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L)) c
· # (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L))
    (δ (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L)) c) =
δ (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L)) c
· δ (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L))
    (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L) c)
law3':= Comonad_law3: ∏ c : arrow C,
δ (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L')) c
· # (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L'))
    (δ (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L')) c) =
δ (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L')) c
· δ (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L'))
    (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L') c)
natL'L'_lp:= nat_trans_ax (pr1 L')
  (fact_L F' (fact_R F a))
  (fact_R F
     (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' a))
  (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L a): # (fact_L F')
  (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L a)
· pr1 L'
    (fact_R F
       (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' a)) =
pr1 L' (fact_L F' (fact_R F a))
· # (fact_L F' ∙ fact_L F')
    (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L a)
natLL_lp:= nat_trans_ax (pr1 L) (fact_L F a)
  (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' a)
  (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F' a): # (fact_L F)
  (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F' a)
· pr1 L (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' a) =
pr1 L (fact_L F a)
· # (fact_L F ∙ fact_L F)
    (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F' a)
?b =
three_mor11 (# F (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F' a))
· pr111 (# F'
           (# (fact_R F)
              (disp_δ
                 (L_monad_data 
                    (F' ⊗ F) 
                    (LNWFS_lcomp_comul L' L)) a)))

  (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F' a): # (fact_L F)

· three_mor11
    (# F
       (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F'
          (fact_L (F' ⊗ F) a))) = ?f'
C: category
F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'
L: lnwfs_over F
a: arrow C
law3:= Comonad_law3: ∏ c : arrow C,
δ (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L)) c

· δ (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L))
    (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L) c)

δ (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L')) c
· # (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L'))
    (δ (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L')) c) =

· δ (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L'))
    (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L') c)
natL'L'_lp:= nat_trans_ax (pr1 L')
  (fact_L F' (fact_R F a))
  (fact_R F
     (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' a))
  (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L a): # (fact_L F')
  (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L a)
· pr1 L'
    (fact_R F
       (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' a)) =
pr1 L' (fact_L F' (fact_R F a))
· # (fact_L F' ∙ fact_L F')
    (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L a)
natLL_lp:= nat_trans_ax (pr1 L) (fact_L F a)
  (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' a)
  (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F' a): # (fact_L F)
  (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F' a)
· pr1 L (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' a) =

· # (fact_L F ∙ fact_L F)
    (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F' a)
pr21 (# (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L))
        (δ (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L)) a)) · 
?f' =
three_mor11 (# F (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F' a))
· pr111 (# F'
           (# (fact_R F)
              (disp_δ
                 (L_monad_data 
                    (F' ⊗ F) 
                    (LNWFS_lcomp_comul L' L)) a)))

            
C: category
F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'
L: lnwfs_over F
a: arrow C
law3:= Comonad_law3: ∏ c : arrow C,
δ (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L)) c
· # (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L))
    (δ (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L)) c) =
δ (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L)) c
· δ (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L))
    (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L) c)
law3':= Comonad_law3: ∏ c : arrow C,
δ (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L')) c
· # (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L'))
    (δ (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L')) c) =
δ (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L')) c
· δ (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L'))
    (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L') c)
natL'L'_lp:= nat_trans_ax (pr1 L')
  (fact_L F' (fact_R F a))
  (fact_R F
     (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' a))
  (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L a): # (fact_L F')
  (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L a)
· pr1 L'
    (fact_R F
       (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' a)) =
pr1 L' (fact_L F' (fact_R F a))
· # (fact_L F' ∙ fact_L F')
    (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L a)
natLL_lp:= nat_trans_ax (pr1 L) (fact_L F a)
  (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' a)
  (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F' a): # (fact_L F)
  (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F' a)
· pr1 L (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' a) =
pr1 L (fact_L F a)
· # (fact_L F ∙ fact_L F)
    (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F' a)
pr21 (# (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L))
        (δ (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L)) a))
· pr1
    (section_disp_on_morphisms F
       (pr1
          (# F
             (# (fact_L F)
                (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F' a)))
        · pr1
            (# F
               (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F'
                  (fact_L (F' ⊗ F) a))))) =
three_mor11 (# F (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F' a))
· pr111 (# F'
           (# (fact_R F)
              (disp_δ
                 (L_monad_data (F' ⊗ F)
                    (LNWFS_lcomp_comul L' L)) a)))

a: arrow C
law3:= Comonad_law3: ∏ c : arrow C,

        (δ (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L)) a))
· pr1
    (section_disp_on_morphisms F
       (pr1
          (# F

                (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F' a)))
        · pr1
            (# F
               (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F'
                  (fact_L (F' ⊗ F) a))))) = ?b

C: category
F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'
L: lnwfs_over F
a: arrow C
law3:= Comonad_law3: ∏ c : arrow C,
δ (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L)) c
· # (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L))
    (δ (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L)) c) =
δ (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L)) c
· δ (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L))
    (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L) c)
law3':= Comonad_law3: ∏ c : arrow C,
δ (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L')) c
· # (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L'))
    (δ (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L')) c) =
δ (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L')) c
· δ (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L'))
    (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L') c)
natL'L'_lp:= nat_trans_ax (pr1 L')
  (fact_L F' (fact_R F a))
  (fact_R F
     (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' a))
  (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L a): # (fact_L F')
  (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L a)
· pr1 L'
    (fact_R F
       (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' a)) =

· # (fact_L F' ∙ fact_L F')
    (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L a)

  (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' a)
  (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F' a): # (fact_L F)
  (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F' a)
· pr1 L (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' a) =
pr1 L (fact_L F a)
· # (fact_L F ∙ fact_L F)
    (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F' a)
pr1
  (section_disp_on_morphisms F
     (pr1 (# F (δ (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L)) a))
      · (pr1
           (# F
              (# (fact_L F)
                 (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F' a)))
         · pr1
             (# F
                (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F'
                   (fact_L (F' ⊗ F) a)))))) =
three_mor11 (# F (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F' a))
· pr111 (# F'
           (# (fact_R F)
              (disp_δ
                 (L_monad_data (F' ⊗ F)
                    (LNWFS_lcomp_comul L' L)) a)))

· δ (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L))
    (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L) c)
law3':= Comonad_law3: ∏ c : arrow C,
δ (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L')) c

    (δ (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L')) c) =
δ (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L')) c
· δ (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L'))
    (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L') c)
natL'L'_lp:= nat_trans_ax (pr1 L')
  (fact_L F' (fact_R F a))
  (fact_R F
     (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' a))
  (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L a): # (fact_L F')
  (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L a)
· pr1 L'
    (fact_R F
       (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' a)) =
pr1 L' (fact_L F' (fact_R F a))
· # (fact_L F' ∙ fact_L F')
    (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L a)
natLL_lp:= nat_trans_ax (pr1 L) (fact_L F a)
  (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' a)
  (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F' a): # (fact_L F)
  (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F' a)
· pr1 L (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' a) =
pr1 L (fact_L F a)
· # (fact_L F ∙ fact_L F)
    (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F' a)
three_mor11 (# F (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F' a))
· pr111 (# F'
           (# (fact_R F)
              (disp_δ
                 (L_monad_data (F' ⊗ F)
                    (LNWFS_lcomp_comul L' L)) a))) =
pr1
  (section_disp_on_morphisms F
     (pr1 (# F (δ (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L)) a))
      · (pr1
           (# F
              (# (fact_L F)
                 (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F' a)))
         · pr1
             (# F
                (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F'
                   (fact_L (F' ⊗ F) a))))))

F', F: Ff C

L: lnwfs_over F
a: arrow C
law3:= Comonad_law3: ∏ c : arrow C,

· # (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L))

· δ (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L))
    (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L) c)
law3':= Comonad_law3: ∏ c : arrow C,

  (fact_L F' (fact_R F a))

  (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L a): # (fact_L F')

  (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' a)
  (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F' a): # (fact_L F)

    (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F' a)

· pr111 (# F'
           (# (fact_R F)
              (disp_δ
                 (L_monad_data (F' ⊗ F)
                    (LNWFS_lcomp_comul L' L)) a))) =
?b

F', F: Ff C

L: lnwfs_over F
a: arrow C
law3:= Comonad_law3: ∏ c : arrow C,

  (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L a): # (fact_L F')

    (fact_R F

pr1
  (section_disp_on_morphisms F
     (pr1 (# F (δ (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L)) a))
      · (pr1
           (# F
              (# (fact_L F)
                 (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F' a)))
         · pr1
             (# F
                (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F'
                   (fact_L (F' ⊗ F) a))))))

  (fact_R F
     (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' a))
  (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L a): # (fact_L F')
  (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L a)
· pr1 L'
    (fact_R F
       (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' a)) =
pr1 L' (fact_L F' (fact_R F a))
· # (fact_L F' ∙ fact_L F')
    (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L a)
natLL_lp:= nat_trans_ax (pr1 L) (fact_L F a)
  (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' a)
  (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F' a): # (fact_L F)
  (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F' a)
· pr1 L (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' a) =
pr1 L (fact_L F a)
· # (fact_L F ∙ fact_L F)
    (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F' a)
?b =
arrow_mor00
  (pr1 (# F (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F' a))
   · pr1
       (# F
          (disp_δ
             (L_monad_data 
                (F' ⊗ F) 
                (LNWFS_lcomp_comul L' L)) a)))

a: arrow C

  (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' a)
  (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F' a): # (fact_L F)
  (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F' a)
· pr1 L (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' a) =

· # (fact_L F ∙ fact_L F)
    (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F' a)
pr111 (# F (δ (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L)) a)) = ?f'

  (fact_R F
     (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' a))
  (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L a): # (fact_L F')

    (fact_R F
       (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' a)) =

· # (fact_L F' ∙ fact_L F')

natLL_lp:= nat_trans_ax (pr1 L) (fact_L F a)
  (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' a)
  (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F' a): # (fact_L F)
  (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F' a)
· pr1 L (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' a) =

· # (fact_L F ∙ fact_L F)
    (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F' a)
?f'
· pr11 (pr1
          (# F
             (# (fact_L F)
                (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F' a)))
        · pr1
            (# F
               (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F'
                  (fact_L (F' ⊗ F) a)))) =
arrow_mor00
  (pr1 (# F (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F' a))
   · pr1
       (# F
          (disp_δ
             (L_monad_data 
                (F' ⊗ F) 
                (LNWFS_lcomp_comul L' L)) a)))

F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'
L: lnwfs_over F
a: arrow C
law3:= Comonad_law3: ∏ c : arrow C,

δ (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L')) c
· # (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L'))
    (δ (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L')) c) =

· δ (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L'))
    (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L') c)
natL'L'_lp:= nat_trans_ax (pr1 L')
  (fact_L F' (fact_R F a))
  (fact_R F
     (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' a))
  (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L a): # (fact_L F')
  (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L a)
· pr1 L'
    (fact_R F
       (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' a)) =
pr1 L' (fact_L F' (fact_R F a))
· # (fact_L F' ∙ fact_L F')
    (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L a)
natLL_lp:= nat_trans_ax (pr1 L) (fact_L F a)
  (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' a)
  (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F' a): # (fact_L F)
  (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F' a)
· pr1 L (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' a) =
pr1 L (fact_L F a)
· # (fact_L F ∙ fact_L F)
    (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F' a)
identity (pr11 (fact_L F a))
· pr11 (pr1
          (# F
             (# (fact_L F)
                (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F' a)))
        · pr1
            (# F
               (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F'
                  (fact_L (F' ⊗ F) a)))) =
arrow_mor00
  (pr1 (# F (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F' a))
   · pr1
       (# F
          (disp_δ
             (L_monad_data (F' ⊗ F)
                (LNWFS_lcomp_comul L' L)) a)))

      apply id_left.

  (fact_L F' (fact_R F a))

  (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L a): # (fact_L F')

· arrow_mor11 (pr1 L' (fact_R F a))
· three_mor11
    (# F'

                (fact_L (F' ⊗ F) a)))))
 
C: category
F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'
L: lnwfs_over F
a: arrow C
law3:= Comonad_law3: ∏ c : arrow C,
δ (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L)) c
· # (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L))
    (δ (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L)) c) =
δ (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L)) c
· δ (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L))
    (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L) c)
law3':= Comonad_law3: ∏ c : arrow C,
δ (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L')) c
· # (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L'))
    (δ (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L')) c) =
δ (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L')) c
· δ (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L'))
    (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L') c)
natL'L'_lp:= nat_trans_ax (pr1 L')
  (fact_L F' (fact_R F a))
  (fact_R F
     (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' a))
  (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L a): # (fact_L F')
  (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L a)
· pr1 L'
    (fact_R F
       (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' a)) =
pr1 L' (fact_L F' (fact_R F a))
· # (fact_L F' ∙ fact_L F')
    (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L a)
natLL_lp:= nat_trans_ax (pr1 L) (fact_L F a)
  (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' a)
  (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F' a): # (fact_L F)
  (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F' a)
· pr1 L (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' a) =
pr1 L (fact_L F a)
· # (fact_L F ∙ fact_L F)
    (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F' a)
pr211 (# F (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F' a))
· arrow_mor11 (pr1 L' (fact_R F a)) = ?f'
C: category
F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'
L: lnwfs_over F
a: arrow C
law3:= Comonad_law3: ∏ c : arrow C,
δ (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L)) c
· # (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L))
    (δ (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L)) c) =
δ (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L)) c
· δ (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L))
    (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L) c)
law3':= Comonad_law3: ∏ c : arrow C,
δ (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L')) c
· # (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L'))
    (δ (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L')) c) =
δ (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L')) c
· δ (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L'))
    (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L') c)
natL'L'_lp:= nat_trans_ax (pr1 L')
  (fact_L F' (fact_R F a))
  (fact_R F
     (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' a))
  (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L a): # (fact_L F')
  (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L a)
· pr1 L'
    (fact_R F
       (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' a)) =
pr1 L' (fact_L F' (fact_R F a))
· # (fact_L F' ∙ fact_L F')
    (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L a)
natLL_lp:= nat_trans_ax (pr1 L) (fact_L F a)
  (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' a)
  (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F' a): # (fact_L F)
  (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F' a)
· pr1 L (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' a) =
pr1 L (fact_L F a)
· # (fact_L F ∙ fact_L F)
    (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F' a)
?f'
· three_mor11 (# F' (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L a)) =
arrow_mor11
  (pr1 (# F (δ (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L)) a))
   · (pr1
        (# F
           (# (fact_L F)
              (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F' a)))
      · pr1
          (# F
             (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F'
                (fact_L (F' ⊗ F) a)))))

    (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L) c)
law3':= Comonad_law3: ∏ c : arrow C,
δ (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L')) c
· # (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L'))
    (δ (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L')) c) =
δ (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L')) c
· δ (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L'))
    (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L') c)
natL'L'_lp:= nat_trans_ax (pr1 L')
  (fact_L F' (fact_R F a))
  (fact_R F
     (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' a))
  (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L a): # (fact_L F')
  (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L a)
· pr1 L'
    (fact_R F
       (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' a)) =
pr1 L' (fact_L F' (fact_R F a))
· # (fact_L F' ∙ fact_L F')
    (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L a)
natLL_lp:= nat_trans_ax (pr1 L) (fact_L F a)
  (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' a)
  (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F' a): # (fact_L F)
  (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F' a)
· pr1 L (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' a) =
pr1 L (fact_L F a)
· # (fact_L F ∙ fact_L F)
    (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F' a)
Σ'ρa:= pr1 L' (fact_R F a): arrow C ⟦ fact_L F' (fact_R F a),
(fact_L F' ∙ fact_L F') (fact_R F a) ⟧
?f'0 · pr2 ((fact_L F' ∙ fact_L F') (fact_R F a)) =
?f'

  (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' a)
  (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F' a): # (fact_L F)
  (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F' a)

(fact_L F' ∙ fact_L F') (fact_R F a) ⟧
identity (pr11 (fact_L F' (fact_R F a)))
· pr2 ((fact_L F' ∙ fact_L F') (fact_R F a)) = ?f'

        apply id_left.
      
C: category
F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'
L: lnwfs_over F
a: arrow C
law3:= Comonad_law3: ∏ c : arrow C,
δ (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L)) c
· # (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L))
    (δ (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L)) c) =
δ (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L)) c
· δ (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L))
    (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L) c)
law3':= Comonad_law3: ∏ c : arrow C,
δ (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L')) c
· # (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L'))
    (δ (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L')) c) =
δ (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L')) c
· δ (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L'))
    (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L') c)
natL'L'_lp:= nat_trans_ax (pr1 L')
  (fact_L F' (fact_R F a))
  (fact_R F
     (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' a))
  (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L a): # (fact_L F')
  (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L a)
· pr1 L'
    (fact_R F
       (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' a)) =
pr1 L' (fact_L F' (fact_R F a))
· # (fact_L F' ∙ fact_L F')
    (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L a)
natLL_lp:= nat_trans_ax (pr1 L) (fact_L F a)
  (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' a)
  (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F' a): # (fact_L F)
  (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F' a)
· pr1 L (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' a) =
pr1 L (fact_L F a)
· # (fact_L F ∙ fact_L F)
    (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F' a)
pr2 ((fact_L F' ∙ fact_L F') (fact_R F a))
· three_mor11 (# F' (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L a)) =
arrow_mor11
  (pr1 (# F (δ (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L)) a))
   · (pr1
        (# F
           (# (fact_L F)
              (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F' a)))
      · pr1
          (# F
             (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F'
                (fact_L (F' ⊗ F) a)))))

             (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F'
                (fact_L (F' ⊗ F) a))))) =
pr2 ((fact_L F' ∙ fact_L F') (fact_R F a))
· three_mor11 (# F' (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L a))

F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'

a: arrow C

  (fact_L F' (fact_R F a))

  (pr1
     (# F'

              (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L a)))
      · pr1

             (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L
                (fact_L (F' ⊗ F) a))))) =
arrow_mor11
  (pr1 (# F' (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L a))
   · pr1
       (# F'
          (# (fact_R F)
             (disp_δ
                (L_monad_data (F' ⊗ F)
                   (LNWFS_lcomp_comul L' L)) a))))
