· # (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L'))
    (δ (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L')) c) =
δ (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L')) c
· δ (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L'))
    (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L') c)
natL'L'_lp:= nat_trans_ax (pr1 L')
  (fact_L F' (fact_R F a))
  (fact_R F
     (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' a))
  (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L a): # (fact_L F')
  (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L a)
· pr1 L'
    (fact_R F
       (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' a)) =
pr1 L' (fact_L F' (fact_R F a))
· # (fact_L F' ∙ fact_L F')
    (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L a)
pr21 (pr1
        (# F'
           (# (fact_L F')
              (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L a)))
      · pr1
          (# F'
             (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L
                (fact_L (F' ⊗ F) a)))) = ?f'
C: category
F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'
L: lnwfs_over F
a: arrow C
law3:= Comonad_law3: ∏ c : arrow C,
δ (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L)) c
· # (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L))
    (δ (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L)) c) =
δ (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L)) c
· δ (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L))
    (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L) c)
law3':= Comonad_law3: ∏ c : arrow C,
δ (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L')) c
· # (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L'))
    (δ (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L')) c) =
δ (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L')) c
· δ (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L'))
    (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L') c)
natL'L'_lp:= nat_trans_ax (pr1 L')
  (fact_L F' (fact_R F a))
  (fact_R F
     (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' a))
  (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L a): # (fact_L F')
  (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L a)
· pr1 L'
    (fact_R F
       (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' a)) =
pr1 L' (fact_L F' (fact_R F a))
· # (fact_L F' ∙ fact_L F')
    (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L a)
pr211 (# F'
         (δ (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L'))
            (fact_R F a))) · 
?f' =
arrow_mor11
  (pr1 (# F' (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L a))
   · pr1
       (# F'
          (# (fact_R F)
             (disp_δ
                (L_monad_data 
                   (F' ⊗ F) 
                   (LNWFS_lcomp_comul L' L)) a))))

            
C: category
F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'
L: lnwfs_over F
a: arrow C
law3:= Comonad_law3: ∏ c : arrow C,
δ (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L)) c
· # (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L))
    (δ (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L)) c) =
δ (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L)) c
· δ (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L))
    (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L) c)
law3':= Comonad_law3: ∏ c : arrow C,
δ (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L')) c
· # (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L'))
    (δ (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L')) c) =
δ (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L')) c
· δ (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L'))
    (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L') c)
natL'L'_lp:= nat_trans_ax (pr1 L')
  (fact_L F' (fact_R F a))
  (fact_R F
     (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' a))
  (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L a): # (fact_L F')
  (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L a)
· pr1 L'
    (fact_R F
       (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' a)) =
pr1 L' (fact_L F' (fact_R F a))
· # (fact_L F' ∙ fact_L F')
    (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L a)
pr211 (# F'
         (δ (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L'))
            (fact_R F a)))
· pr211 (# F'
           (# (fact_L F')
              (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L a))) =
arrow_mor11
  (pr1 (# F' (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L a))
   · pr1
       (# F'
          (# (fact_R F)
             (disp_δ
                (L_monad_data (F' ⊗ F)
                   (LNWFS_lcomp_comul L' L)) a))))

    
C: category
F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'
L: lnwfs_over F
a: arrow C
law3:= Comonad_law3: ∏ c : arrow C,
δ (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L)) c
· # (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L))
    (δ (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L)) c) =
δ (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L)) c
· δ (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L))
    (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L) c)
law3':= Comonad_law3: ∏ c : arrow C,
δ (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L')) c
· # (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L'))
    (δ (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L')) c) =
δ (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L')) c
· δ (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L'))
    (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L') c)
natL'L'_lp:= nat_trans_ax (pr1 L')
  (fact_L F' (fact_R F a))
  (fact_R F
     (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' a))
  (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L a): # (fact_L F')
  (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L a)
· pr1 L'
    (fact_R F
       (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' a)) =
pr1 L' (fact_L F' (fact_R F a))
· # (fact_L F' ∙ fact_L F')
    (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L a)
arrow_mor11
  (pr1 (# F' (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L a))
   · pr1
       (# F'
          (# (fact_R F)
             (disp_δ
                (L_monad_data (F' ⊗ F)
                   (LNWFS_lcomp_comul L' L)) a)))) =
pr211 (# F'
         (δ (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L'))
            (fact_R F a)))
· pr211 (# F'
           (# (fact_L F')
              (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L a)))

    apply id_left.
Qed.


C: category
F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'
L: lnwfs_over F
disp_Comonad_laws
  (L_monad_data (F' ⊗ F) (LNWFS_lcomp_comul L' L))


C: category
F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'
L: lnwfs_over F
disp_Comonad_laws
  (L_monad_data (F' ⊗ F) (LNWFS_lcomp_comul L' L))

  
C: category
F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'
L: lnwfs_over F
a: arrow C
disp_δ
  (L_monad_data (F' ⊗ F) (LNWFS_lcomp_comul L' L)) a
· disp_ε
    (L_monad_data (F' ⊗ F) (LNWFS_lcomp_comul L' L))
    (fact_L (F' ⊗ F) a) = identity (fact_L (F' ⊗ F) a)
C: category
F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'
L: lnwfs_over F
a: arrow C
disp_δ
  (L_monad_data (F' ⊗ F) (LNWFS_lcomp_comul L' L)) a
· # (fact_L (F' ⊗ F))
    (disp_ε
       (L_monad_data (F' ⊗ F) (LNWFS_lcomp_comul L' L))
       a) = identity (fact_L (F' ⊗ F) a)
C: category
F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'
L: lnwfs_over F
a: arrow C
disp_δ
  (L_monad_data (F' ⊗ F) (LNWFS_lcomp_comul L' L)) a
· # (fact_L (F' ⊗ F))
    (disp_δ
       (L_monad_data (F' ⊗ F) (LNWFS_lcomp_comul L' L))
       a) =
disp_δ
  (L_monad_data (F' ⊗ F) (LNWFS_lcomp_comul L' L)) a
· disp_δ
    (L_monad_data (F' ⊗ F) (LNWFS_lcomp_comul L' L))
    (fact_L (F' ⊗ F) a)

  
C: category
F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'
L: lnwfs_over F
a: arrow C
disp_δ
  (L_monad_data (F' ⊗ F) (LNWFS_lcomp_comul L' L)) a
· disp_ε
    (L_monad_data (F' ⊗ F) (LNWFS_lcomp_comul L' L))
    (fact_L (F' ⊗ F) a) = identity (fact_L (F' ⊗ F) a)
 
C: category
F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'
L: lnwfs_over F
a: arrow C
arrow_mor11
  (disp_δ
     (L_monad_data (F' ⊗ F) (LNWFS_lcomp_comul L' L))
     a
   · disp_ε
       (L_monad_data (F' ⊗ F) (LNWFS_lcomp_comul L' L))
       (fact_L (F' ⊗ F) a)) =
arrow_mor11 (identity (fact_L (F' ⊗ F) a))

    
C: category
F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'
L: lnwfs_over F
a: arrow C
arrow_mor11
  (disp_δ
     (L_monad_data (F' ⊗ F) (LNWFS_lcomp_comul L' L))
     a
   · disp_ε
       (L_monad_data (F' ⊗ F) (LNWFS_lcomp_comul L' L))
       (fact_L (F' ⊗ F) a)) = ?b
C: category
F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'
L: lnwfs_over F
a: arrow C
?b = arrow_mor11 (identity (fact_L (F' ⊗ F) a))
 
C: category
F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'
L: lnwfs_over F
a: arrow C
arrow_mor11 (pr1 L' (fact_R F a))
· (three_mor11
     (# F'
        (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L a
         :
         arrow C ⟦ fact_L F' (fact_R F a),
         fact_R F (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' a) ⟧))
   · pr21 (disp_ε
             (L_monad_data (F' ⊗ F)
                (LNWFS_lcomp_comul L' L))
             (fact_L (F' ⊗ F) a))) =
arrow_mor11 (identity (fact_L (F' ⊗ F) a))

    
C: category
F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'
L: lnwfs_over F
a: arrow C
arrow_mor11 (identity (fact_L (F' ⊗ F) a)) =
arrow_mor11 (pr1 L' (fact_R F a))
· (three_mor11 (# F' (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L a))
   · pr21 (disp_ε
             (L_monad_data (F' ⊗ F)
                (LNWFS_lcomp_comul L' L))
             (fact_L (F' ⊗ F) a)))

    
C: category
F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'
L: lnwfs_over F
a: arrow C
arrow_mor11 (identity (fact_L (F' ⊗ F) a)) = ?b
C: category
F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'
L: lnwfs_over F
a: arrow C
?b =
arrow_mor11 (pr1 L' (fact_R F a))
· (three_mor11 (# F' (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L a))
   · pr21 (disp_ε
             (L_monad_data (F' ⊗ F)
                (LNWFS_lcomp_comul L' L))
             (fact_L (F' ⊗ F) a)))
 
C: category
F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'
L: lnwfs_over F
a: arrow C
arrow_mor11 (pr1 L' (fact_R F a))
· fact_R F' (fact_L F' (fact_R F a)) =
arrow_mor11 (pr1 L' (fact_R F a))
· (three_mor11 (# F' (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L a))
   · pr21 (disp_ε
             (L_monad_data (F' ⊗ F)
                (LNWFS_lcomp_comul L' L))
             (fact_L (F' ⊗ F) a)))

    
C: category
F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'
L: lnwfs_over F
a: arrow C
fact_R F' (fact_L F' (fact_R F a)) =
three_mor11 (# F' (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L a))
· pr21 (disp_ε
          (L_monad_data (F' ⊗ F)
             (LNWFS_lcomp_comul L' L))
          (fact_L (F' ⊗ F) a))

    
C: category
F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'
L: lnwfs_over F
a: arrow C
three_mor11 (# F' (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L a))
· pr21 (disp_ε
          (L_monad_data (F' ⊗ F)
             (LNWFS_lcomp_comul L' L))
          (fact_L (F' ⊗ F) a)) =
fact_R F' (fact_L F' (fact_R F a))


    
C: category
F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'
L: lnwfs_over F
a: arrow C
F'L'_lp:= # F' (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L a): three C ⟦ F' (fact_L F' (fact_R F a)),
F'
  (fact_R F (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' a))
⟧
three_mor11 F'L'_lp
· pr21 (disp_ε
          (L_monad_data (F' ⊗ F)
             (LNWFS_lcomp_comul L' L))
          (fact_L (F' ⊗ F) a)) =
fact_R F' (fact_L F' (fact_R F a))

    
C: category
F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'
L: lnwfs_over F
a: arrow C
F'L'_lp:= # F' (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L a): three C ⟦ F' (fact_L F' (fact_R F a)),
F'
  (fact_R F (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' a))
⟧
three_mor11 F'L'_lp
· pr21 (disp_ε
          (L_monad_data (F' ⊗ F)
             (LNWFS_lcomp_comul L' L))
          (fact_L (F' ⊗ F) a)) = ?b
C: category
F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'
L: lnwfs_over F
a: arrow C
F'L'_lp:= # F' (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L a): three C ⟦ F' (fact_L F' (fact_R F a)),
F'
  (fact_R F (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' a))
⟧
?b = fact_R F' (fact_L F' (fact_R F a))
 
C: category
F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'
L: lnwfs_over F
a: arrow C
F'L'_lp:= # F' (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L a): three C ⟦ F' (fact_L F' (fact_R F a)),
F'
  (fact_R F (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' a))
⟧
pr122 (pr2 (F' (fact_L F' (fact_R F a))))
· pr211 F'L'_lp = fact_R F' (fact_L F' (fact_R F a))

    apply id_right.
  
C: category
F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'
L: lnwfs_over F
a: arrow C
disp_δ
  (L_monad_data (F' ⊗ F) (LNWFS_lcomp_comul L' L)) a
· # (fact_L (F' ⊗ F))
    (disp_ε
       (L_monad_data (F' ⊗ F) (LNWFS_lcomp_comul L' L))
       a) = identity (fact_L (F' ⊗ F) a)

F', F: Ff C

L: lnwfs_over F
a: arrow C
arrow_mor11
  (disp_δ
     (L_monad_data (F' ⊗ F) (LNWFS_lcomp_comul L' L))
     a
   · # (fact_L (F' ⊗ F))
       (disp_ε
          (L_monad_data (F' ⊗ F)
             (LNWFS_lcomp_comul L' L)) a)) =
arrow_mor11 (identity (fact_L (F' ⊗ F) a))

    
C: category
F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'
L: lnwfs_over F
a: arrow C
law2:= Comonad_law2: ∏ c : arrow C,
δ (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L')) c
· # (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L'))
    (ε (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L')) c) =
identity (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L') c)
arrow_mor11
  (disp_δ
     (L_monad_data (F' ⊗ F) (LNWFS_lcomp_comul L' L))
     a
   · # (fact_L (F' ⊗ F))
       (disp_ε
          (L_monad_data (F' ⊗ F)
             (LNWFS_lcomp_comul L' L)) a)) =
arrow_mor11 (identity (fact_L (F' ⊗ F) a))

    
C: category
F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'
L: lnwfs_over F
a: arrow C
law2:= Comonad_law2: ∏ c : arrow C,
δ (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L')) c
· # (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L'))
    (ε (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L')) c) =
identity (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L') c)
arrow_mor11 (identity (fact_L (F' ⊗ F) a)) =
arrow_mor11
  (disp_δ
     (L_monad_data (F' ⊗ F) (LNWFS_lcomp_comul L' L))
     a
   · # (fact_L (F' ⊗ F))
       (disp_ε
          (L_monad_data (F' ⊗ F)
             (LNWFS_lcomp_comul L' L)) a))

    
C: category
F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'
L: lnwfs_over F
a: arrow C
law2:= Comonad_law2: ∏ c : arrow C,
δ (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L')) c
· # (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L'))
    (ε (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L')) c) =
identity (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L') c)
arrow_mor11 (identity (fact_L (F' ⊗ F) a)) = ?b
C: category
F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'
L: lnwfs_over F
a: arrow C
law2:= Comonad_law2: ∏ c : arrow C,
δ (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L')) c
· # (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L'))
    (ε (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L')) c) =
identity (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L') c)
?b =
arrow_mor11
  (disp_δ
     (L_monad_data (F' ⊗ F) (LNWFS_lcomp_comul L' L))
     a
   · # (fact_L (F' ⊗ F))
       (disp_ε
          (L_monad_data (F' ⊗ F)
             (LNWFS_lcomp_comul L' L)) a))
 
C: category
F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'
L: lnwfs_over F
a: arrow C
law2:= Comonad_law2: ∏ c : arrow C,
δ (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L')) c
· # (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L'))
    (ε (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L')) c) =
identity (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L') c)
pr21 (δ (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L')) (fact_R F a))
· pr21 (# (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L'))
          (ε (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L'))
             (fact_R F a))) =
arrow_mor11
  (disp_δ
     (L_monad_data (F' ⊗ F) (LNWFS_lcomp_comul L' L))
     a
   · # (fact_L (F' ⊗ F))
       (disp_ε
          (L_monad_data (F' ⊗ F)
             (LNWFS_lcomp_comul L' L)) a))

    (* cbn. *)

L: lnwfs_over F
a: arrow C
law2:= Comonad_law2: ∏ c : arrow C,

· # (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L'))

    (ε (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L')) c) =
identity (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L') c)
?b =
pr21 (δ (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L')) (fact_R F a))
· pr21 (# (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L'))
          (ε (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L'))
             (fact_R F a)))
 
C: category
F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'
L: lnwfs_over F
a: arrow C
law2:= Comonad_law2: ∏ c : arrow C,
δ (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L')) c
· # (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L'))
    (ε (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L')) c) =
identity (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L') c)
arrow_mor11 (pr1 L' (fact_R F a))
· (three_mor11
     (# F'
        (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L a
         :
         arrow C ⟦ fact_L F' (fact_R F a),
         fact_R F (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' a) ⟧))
   · pr21 (# (fact_L (F' ⊗ F))
             (disp_ε
                (L_monad_data (F' ⊗ F)
                   (LNWFS_lcomp_comul L' L)) a))) =
pr21 (δ (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L')) (fact_R F a))
· pr21 (# (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L'))
          (ε (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L'))
             (fact_R F a)))

L: lnwfs_over F
a: arrow C

· # (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L'))
    (ε (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L')) c) =
identity (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L') c)
three_mor11 (# F' (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L a))
· pr21 (# (fact_L (F' ⊗ F))
          (disp_ε
             (L_monad_data (F' ⊗ F)
                (LNWFS_lcomp_comul L' L)) a)) =
pr21 (# (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L'))
        (ε (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L')) (fact_R F a)))

· pr21 (# (fact_L (F' ⊗ F))
          (disp_ε
             (L_monad_data (F' ⊗ F)
                (LNWFS_lcomp_comul L' L)) a)) = ?b

        (ε (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L')) (fact_R F a)))

a: arrow C

    (ε (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L')) c) =
identity (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L') c)
pr1
  (section_disp_on_morphisms F'
     (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L a
      · # (fact_R F)
          (disp_ε
             (L_monad_data (F' ⊗ F)
                (LNWFS_lcomp_comul L' L)) a))) =
pr21 (# (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L'))
        (ε (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L')) (fact_R F a)))

    (ε (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L')) c) =
identity (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L') c)
arrow_mor00
  (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L a
   · # (fact_R F)
       (disp_ε
          (L_monad_data (F' ⊗ F)
             (LNWFS_lcomp_comul L' L)) a)) =
arrow_mor00
  (ε (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L')) (fact_R F a))

             (LNWFS_lcomp_comul L' L)) a)) = ?b

L: lnwfs_over F

C: category

L: lnwfs_over F

    (ε (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L')) c) =
identity (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L') c)
arrow_mor11 (pr1 L a)
· (three_mor11
     (# F
        (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F' a
         :
         arrow C ⟦ fact_L F a,
         LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F F' a ⟧))
   · pr11 (# (fact_R F)
             (disp_ε
                (L_monad_data (F' ⊗ F)
                   (LNWFS_lcomp_comul L' L)) a))) =

L: lnwfs_over F

    (ε (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L')) c) =
identity (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L') c)

· (three_mor11 (# F (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F' a))
   · pr11 (# (fact_R F)
             (disp_ε
                (L_monad_data (F' ⊗ F)
                   (LNWFS_lcomp_comul L' L)) a))) =

          (disp_ε

                (LNWFS_lcomp_comul L' L)) a)) = ?f'

F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'

a: arrow C

δ (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L')) c
· # (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L'))
    (ε (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L')) c) =

  (ε (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L')) (fact_R F a))

            
C: category
F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'
L: lnwfs_over F

δ (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L')) c
· # (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L'))
    (ε (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L')) c) =

arrow_mor11 (pr1 L a)
· pr1
    (section_disp_on_morphisms F
       (pr1 (# F (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F' a))
        · pr1
            (# F
               (disp_ε
                  (L_monad_data (F' ⊗ F)
                     (LNWFS_lcomp_comul L' L)) a)))) =
arrow_mor00
  (ε (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L')) (fact_R F a))

F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'
L: lnwfs_over F

    (ε (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L')) c) =
identity (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L') c)
arrow_mor00
  (ε (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L')) (fact_R F a)) =
arrow_mor11 (pr1 L a)
· pr1
    (section_disp_on_morphisms F
       (pr1 (# F (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F' a))
        · pr1
            (# F
               (disp_ε
                  (L_monad_data (F' ⊗ F)

F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'

a: arrow C

δ (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L')) c
· # (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L'))
    (ε (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L')) c) =

· # (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L))
    (ε (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L)) c) =
identity (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L) c)
arrow_mor00
  (ε (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L')) (fact_R F a)) =

· pr1

       (pr1 (# F (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F' a))
        · pr1

    (ε (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L)) c) =

C: category
F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'
L: lnwfs_over F
a: arrow C

δ (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L')) c
· # (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L'))
    (ε (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L')) c) =

δ (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L)) c
· # (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L))
    (ε (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L)) c) =
identity (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L) c)
?b =
arrow_mor11 (pr1 L a)
· pr1
    (section_disp_on_morphisms F
       (pr1 (# F (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F' a))
        · pr1

                     (LNWFS_lcomp_comul L' L)) a))))
 
C: category
F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'
L: lnwfs_over F
a: arrow C
law2:= Comonad_law2: ∏ c : arrow C,
δ (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L')) c
· # (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L'))
    (ε (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L')) c) =
identity (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L') c)
law2F:= Comonad_law2: ∏ c : arrow C,
δ (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L)) c
· # (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L))
    (ε (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L)) c) =
identity (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L) c)
pr21 (δ (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L)) a)
· pr21 (# (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L))
          (ε (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L)) a)) =
arrow_mor11 (pr1 L a)
· pr1
    (section_disp_on_morphisms F
       (pr1 (# F (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F' a))
        · pr1
            (# F
               (disp_ε
                  (L_monad_data (F' ⊗ F)
                     (LNWFS_lcomp_comul L' L)) a))))

    
C: category
F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'
L: lnwfs_over F
a: arrow C
law2:= Comonad_law2: ∏ c : arrow C,
δ (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L')) c
· # (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L'))
    (ε (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L')) c) =
identity (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L') c)
law2F:= Comonad_law2: ∏ c : arrow C,
δ (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L)) c
· # (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L))
    (ε (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L)) c) =
identity (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L) c)
pr21 (# (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L))
        (ε (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L)) a)) =
pr1
  (section_disp_on_morphisms F
     (pr1 (# F (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F' a))
      · pr1
          (# F
             (disp_ε
                (L_monad_data (F' ⊗ F)
                   (LNWFS_lcomp_comul L' L)) a))))

    
C: category
F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'
L: lnwfs_over F
a: arrow C
law2:= Comonad_law2: ∏ c : arrow C,
δ (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L')) c
· # (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L'))
    (ε (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L')) c) =
identity (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L') c)
law2F:= Comonad_law2: ∏ c : arrow C,
δ (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L)) c
· # (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L))
    (ε (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L)) c) =
identity (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L) c)
arrow_mor11 (ε (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L)) a) =
arrow_mor11
  (pr1 (# F (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F' a))
   · pr1
       (# F
          (disp_ε
             (L_monad_data (F' ⊗ F)
                (LNWFS_lcomp_comul L' L)) a)))

    
C: category
F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'
L: lnwfs_over F
a: arrow C
law2:= Comonad_law2: ∏ c : arrow C,
δ (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L')) c
· # (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L'))
    (ε (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L')) c) =
identity (L_monad F' (pr1 L') (pr2 L') c)
law2F:= Comonad_law2: ∏ c : arrow C,
δ (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L)) c
· # (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L))
    (ε (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L)) c) =
identity (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L) c)
arrow_mor11
  (pr1 (# F (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L F' a))
   · pr1
       (# F
          (disp_ε
             (L_monad_data (F' ⊗ F)
                (LNWFS_lcomp_comul L' L)) a))) =
arrow_mor11 (ε (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L)) a)

    exact (three_comp (fact_functor F' (fact_R F a))).
  
C: category
F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'
L: lnwfs_over F
a: arrow C
disp_δ
  (L_monad_data (F' ⊗ F) (LNWFS_lcomp_comul L' L)) a
· # (fact_L (F' ⊗ F))
    (disp_δ
       (L_monad_data (F' ⊗ F) (LNWFS_lcomp_comul L' L))
       a) =
disp_δ
  (L_monad_data (F' ⊗ F) (LNWFS_lcomp_comul L' L)) a
· disp_δ
    (L_monad_data (F' ⊗ F) (LNWFS_lcomp_comul L' L))
    (fact_L (F' ⊗ F) a)
 
C: category
F', F: Ff C
L': lnwfs_over F'
L: lnwfs_over F
a: arrow C
arrow_mor11
  (disp_δ
     (L_monad_data (F' ⊗ F) (LNWFS_lcomp_comul L' L))
     a
   · # (fact_L (F' ⊗ F))
       (disp_δ
          (L_monad_data (F' ⊗ F)
             (LNWFS_lcomp_comul L' L)) a)) =
arrow_mor11
  (disp_δ
     (L_monad_data (F' ⊗ F) (LNWFS_lcomp_comul L' L))
     a
   · disp_δ
       (L_monad_data (F' ⊗ F) (LNWFS_lcomp_comul L' L))
       (fact_L (F' ⊗ F) a))

    exact (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_mul_law11 L' L a).
Qed.

Definition LNWFS_lcomp {F' F : Ff C} (L' : LNWFS C F') (L : LNWFS C F) :
    LNWFS C (F' ⊗ F) :=
  (LNWFS_lcomp_comul L' L,, LNWFS_lcomp_comul_monad_laws L' L).

Definition LNWFS_tot_lcomp (L' L : total_category (LNWFS C)) :
    total_category (LNWFS C) :=
  (_,, LNWFS_lcomp (pr2 L') (pr2 L)).

Notation "l L⊗ l'" := (LNWFS_lcomp l l') (at level 50).
Notation "l Ltot⊗ l'" := (LNWFS_tot_lcomp l l') (at level 50).

(* I *)

C: category
nat_trans_data (fact_L Ff_lcomp_unit)
  (fact_L Ff_lcomp_unit ∙ fact_L Ff_lcomp_unit)


C: category
nat_trans_data (fact_L Ff_lcomp_unit)
  (fact_L Ff_lcomp_unit ∙ fact_L Ff_lcomp_unit)

  
C: category
f: arrow C
arrow C ⟦ fact_L Ff_lcomp_unit f,
(fact_L Ff_lcomp_unit ∙ fact_L Ff_lcomp_unit) f ⟧

  
C: category
f: arrow C
pr2 (fact_L Ff_lcomp_unit f) -->[
identity (pr1 (fact_L Ff_lcomp_unit f))] pr2
                                           ((fact_L
                                               Ff_lcomp_unit
                                             ∙ fact_L
                                                 Ff_lcomp_unit)
                                              f)

  reflexivity.
Defined.


C: category
is_nat_trans (fact_L Ff_lcomp_unit)
  (fact_L Ff_lcomp_unit ∙ fact_L Ff_lcomp_unit)
  LNWFS_lcomp_unit_comul_data


C: category
is_nat_trans (fact_L Ff_lcomp_unit)
  (fact_L Ff_lcomp_unit ∙ fact_L Ff_lcomp_unit)
  LNWFS_lcomp_unit_comul_data

  
C: category
f, g: arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, g ⟧
# (fact_L Ff_lcomp_unit) γ
· LNWFS_lcomp_unit_comul_data g =
LNWFS_lcomp_unit_comul_data f
· # (fact_L Ff_lcomp_unit ∙ fact_L Ff_lcomp_unit) γ

  
C: category
f, g: arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, g ⟧
arrow_mor00
  (# (fact_L Ff_lcomp_unit) γ
   · LNWFS_lcomp_unit_comul_data g) =
arrow_mor00
  (LNWFS_lcomp_unit_comul_data f
   · # (fact_L Ff_lcomp_unit ∙ fact_L Ff_lcomp_unit) γ)
C: category
f, g: arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, g ⟧
arrow_mor11
  (# (fact_L Ff_lcomp_unit) γ
   · LNWFS_lcomp_unit_comul_data g) =
arrow_mor11
  (LNWFS_lcomp_unit_comul_data f

Definition LNWFS_lcomp_unit_comul :

  (_,, LNWFS_lcomp_unit_comul_axioms).

Definition LNWFS_lcomp_unit :
    LNWFS C (@Ff_lcomp_unit C) :=
  (LNWFS_lcomp_unit_comul,, LNWFS_lcomp_unit_comul_monad_laws).

Definition LNWFS_tot_lcomp_unit :
    total_category (LNWFS C) :=
  (_,, LNWFS_lcomp_unit).

a: arrow C

· (three_mor11
     (# F
        (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L Ff_lcomp_unit a
         :

         LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F Ff_lcomp_unit a ⟧))
   · pr21 (# (pr1
                (L_monad (Ff_lcomp_unit ⊗ F)
                   (pr1 (LNWFS_lcomp_unit L⊗ L))
                   (pr2 (LNWFS_lcomp_unit L⊗ L))))
             (lnwfs_mor (LNWFS_lcomp_unit L⊗ L) L
                (Ff_l_id_left F) a))) =
pr21 (disp_δ (lnwfs_L_monad_data L) a)

a: arrow C
arrow_mor11 (pr1 L a)
· (three_mor11
     (# F (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L Ff_lcomp_unit a))
   · pr21 (# (pr1
                (L_monad (Ff_lcomp_unit ⊗ F)
                   (pr1 (LNWFS_lcomp_unit L⊗ L))
                   (pr2 (LNWFS_lcomp_unit L⊗ L))))
             (lnwfs_mor (LNWFS_lcomp_unit L⊗ L) L
                (Ff_l_id_left F) a))) = ?b

?b = pr21 (disp_δ (lnwfs_L_monad_data L) a)

· pr1 (id_disp (pr1 F (fact_L F a))) =

    (LNWFS_tot_lcomp_unit Ltot⊗ L) --> L :=
  (_,, LNWFS_l_id_left (pr2 L)).

L: LNWFS C F
a: arrow C
three_mor11
  (# Ff_lcomp_unit
     (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp LNWFS_lcomp_unit L a
      :
      arrow C ⟦ fact_L Ff_lcomp_unit (fact_R F a),
      fact_R F
        (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F Ff_lcomp_unit a) ⟧)) =
arrow_mor11
  (disp_δ (lnwfs_L_monad_data L) a
   · # (pr1 (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L)))
       (lnwfs_mor L (LNWFS_lcomp_unit L⊗ L)
          (Ff_l_id_left_rev F) a)
   · lnwfs_mor L (LNWFS_lcomp_unit L⊗ L)
       (Ff_l_id_left_rev F)
       (pr1

             (pr2 (LNWFS_lcomp_unit L⊗ L))) a))

             (pr2 (LNWFS_lcomp_unit L⊗ L))) a)) =
three_mor11
  (# Ff_lcomp_unit
     (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp LNWFS_lcomp_unit L a))

             (Ff_l_id_left_rev F) a)) =

     (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp LNWFS_lcomp_unit L a))

    (* cbn.
    unfold three_mor11.
    cbn. *)
    
C: category
F: Ff C
L: LNWFS C F
a: arrow C
pr21 (# (pr1 (L_monad F (pr1 L) (pr2 L)))
        (lnwfs_mor L (LNWFS_lcomp_unit L⊗ L)
           (Ff_l_id_left_rev F) a)) =
three_mor11
  (# F (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L Ff_lcomp_unit a))

    use (section_disp_on_eq_morphisms F); reflexivity.
  
C: category
F: Ff C
L: LNWFS C F
a: arrow C
arrow_mor00
  (lnwfs_mor L (LNWFS_lcomp_unit L⊗ L)
     (Ff_l_id_left_rev F) a
   · disp_ε
       (lnwfs_L_monad_data (LNWFS_lcomp_unit L⊗ L)) a) =
arrow_mor00 (disp_ε (lnwfs_L_monad_data L) a)
 apply id_left.
  
C: category
F: Ff C
L: LNWFS C F
a: arrow C
arrow_mor11
  (lnwfs_mor L (LNWFS_lcomp_unit L⊗ L)
     (Ff_l_id_left_rev F) a
   · disp_ε
       (lnwfs_L_monad_data (LNWFS_lcomp_unit L⊗ L)) a) =
arrow_mor11 (disp_ε (lnwfs_L_monad_data L) a)
 apply id_left.
Qed.

Definition LNWFS_tot_l_id_left_rev (L : total_category (LNWFS C)) :
    L --> (LNWFS_tot_lcomp_unit Ltot⊗ L) :=
  (_,, LNWFS_l_id_left_rev (pr2 L)).

· pr1

    apply id_right.

  (disp_ε (lnwfs_L_monad_data (L L⊗ LNWFS_lcomp_unit))
     a)
 apply id_left.
Qed.

Definition LNWFS_tot_l_id_right (L : total_category (LNWFS C)) :
    (L Ltot⊗ LNWFS_tot_lcomp_unit) --> L :=
  (_,, LNWFS_l_id_right (pr2 L)).

F: Ff C
L: LNWFS C F
L -->[ Ff_l_id_right_rev F] (L L⊗ LNWFS_lcomp_unit)

Qed.

Definition LNWFS_tot_l_id_right_rev (L : total_category (LNWFS C)) :
    L --> (L Ltot⊗ LNWFS_tot_lcomp_unit) :=
  (_,, LNWFS_l_id_right_rev (pr2 L)).



C: category
F, F', F'': Ff C
L: LNWFS C F
L': LNWFS C F'
L'': LNWFS C F''
L L⊗ (L' L⊗ L'') -->[
Ff_l_assoc_rev F F' F''] ((L L⊗ L') L⊗ L'')


C: category
F, F', F'': Ff C
L: LNWFS C F
L': LNWFS C F'
L'': LNWFS C F''
L L⊗ (L' L⊗ L'') -->[
Ff_l_assoc_rev F F' F''] ((L L⊗ L') L⊗ L'')

  
C: category
F, F', F'': Ff C
L: LNWFS C F
L': LNWFS C F'
L'': LNWFS C F''
a: arrow C
arrow_mor00
  (lnwfs_mor (L L⊗ (L' L⊗ L'')) ((L L⊗ L') L⊗ L'')
     (Ff_l_assoc_rev F F' F'') a
   · disp_δ (lnwfs_L_monad_data ((L L⊗ L') L⊗ L'')) a) =
arrow_mor00
  (disp_δ (lnwfs_L_monad_data (L L⊗ (L' L⊗ L''))) a
   · # (pr1
          (L_monad (F ⊗ (F' ⊗ F''))
             (pr1 (L L⊗ (L' L⊗ L'')))
             (pr2 (L L⊗ (L' L⊗ L'')))))
       (lnwfs_mor (L L⊗ (L' L⊗ L''))
          ((L L⊗ L') L⊗ L'') (Ff_l_assoc_rev F F' F'')
          a)
   · lnwfs_mor (L L⊗ (L' L⊗ L'')) ((L L⊗ L') L⊗ L'')
       (Ff_l_assoc_rev F F' F'')
       (pr1
          (L_monad (F ⊗ F' ⊗ F'')
             (pr1 ((L L⊗ L') L⊗ L''))
             (pr2 ((L L⊗ L') L⊗ L''))) a))
C: category

L'': LNWFS C F''
a: arrow C
arrow_mor11
  (lnwfs_mor (L L⊗ (L' L⊗ L'')) ((L L⊗ L') L⊗ L'')

   · disp_δ (lnwfs_L_monad_data ((L L⊗ L') L⊗ L'')) a) =
arrow_mor11

   · # (pr1
          (L_monad (F ⊗ (F' ⊗ F''))
             (pr1 (L L⊗ (L' L⊗ L'')))
             (pr2 (L L⊗ (L' L⊗ L'')))))
       (lnwfs_mor (L L⊗ (L' L⊗ L''))
          ((L L⊗ L') L⊗ L'') (Ff_l_assoc_rev F F' F'')
          a)
   · lnwfs_mor (L L⊗ (L' L⊗ L'')) ((L L⊗ L') L⊗ L'')
       (Ff_l_assoc_rev F F' F'')
       (pr1
          (L_monad (F ⊗ F' ⊗ F'')
             (pr1 ((L L⊗ L') L⊗ L''))
             (pr2 ((L L⊗ L') L⊗ L''))) a))

             (pr2 (L L⊗ (L' L⊗ L'')))))
       (lnwfs_mor (L L⊗ (L' L⊗ L''))
          ((L L⊗ L') L⊗ L'') (Ff_l_assoc_rev F F' F'')
          a)
   · lnwfs_mor (L L⊗ (L' L⊗ L'')) ((L L⊗ L') L⊗ L'')
       (Ff_l_assoc_rev F F' F'')
       (pr1
          (L_monad (F ⊗ F' ⊗ F'')
             (pr1 ((L L⊗ L') L⊗ L''))
             (pr2 ((L L⊗ L') L⊗ L''))) a))

C: category
F, F', F'': Ff C
L: LNWFS C F
L': LNWFS C F'
L'': LNWFS C F''
a: arrow C
arrow_mor11 (pr1 L (fact_R (F' ⊗ F'') a))
· (three_mor11
     (# F
        (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L (L' L⊗ L'') a
         :
         arrow C ⟦ fact_L F (fact_R (F' ⊗ F'') a),
         fact_R (F' ⊗ F'')
           (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper (F' ⊗ F'') F a) ⟧))
   · pr21 (# (pr1
                (L_monad (F ⊗ (F' ⊗ F''))
                   (pr1 (L L⊗ (L' L⊗ L'')))
                   (pr2 (L L⊗ (L' L⊗ L'')))))
             (lnwfs_mor (L L⊗ (L' L⊗ L''))
                ((L L⊗ L') L⊗ L'')
                (Ff_l_assoc_rev F F' F'') a))) =
pr21 (disp_δ (lnwfs_L_monad_data ((L L⊗ L') L⊗ L'')) a)

    
C: category
F, F', F'': Ff C
L: LNWFS C F
L': LNWFS C F'
L'': LNWFS C F''
a: arrow C
arrow_mor11 (pr1 L (fact_R (F' ⊗ F'') a))
· (three_mor11
     (# F (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L (L' L⊗ L'') a))
   · pr21 (# (pr1
                (L_monad (F ⊗ (F' ⊗ F''))
                   (pr1 (L L⊗ (L' L⊗ L'')))
                   (pr2 (L L⊗ (L' L⊗ L'')))))
             (lnwfs_mor (L L⊗ (L' L⊗ L''))
                ((L L⊗ L') L⊗ L'')
                (Ff_l_assoc_rev F F' F'') a))) = ?b

L'': LNWFS C F''
a: arrow C
three_mor11
  (# F (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L (L' L⊗ L'') a))
· pr21 (# (pr1
             (L_monad (F ⊗ (F' ⊗ F''))
                (pr1 (L L⊗ (L' L⊗ L'')))
                (pr2 (L L⊗ (L' L⊗ L'')))))
          (lnwfs_mor (L L⊗ (L' L⊗ L''))
             ((L L⊗ L') L⊗ L'')
             (Ff_l_assoc_rev F F' F'') a)) = ?f'
C: category
F, F', F'': Ff C
L: LNWFS C F
L': LNWFS C F'
L'': LNWFS C F''
a: arrow C
arrow_mor11 (pr1 L (fact_R (F' ⊗ F'') a)) · ?f' =
pr21 (disp_δ (lnwfs_L_monad_data ((L L⊗ L') L⊗ L'')) a)

            
C: category
F, F', F'': Ff C
L: LNWFS C F
L': LNWFS C F'
L'': LNWFS C F''
a: arrow C
arrow_mor11 (pr1 L (fact_R (F' ⊗ F'') a))
· pr1
    (section_disp_on_morphisms F
       (pr1
          (# F
             (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L (L' L⊗ L'') a))
        · pr1
            (# F
               (# (fact_R (F' ⊗ F''))
                  (lnwfs_mor (L L⊗ (L' L⊗ L''))
                     ((L L⊗ L') L⊗ L'')
                     (Ff_l_assoc_rev F F' F'') a))))) =
pr21 (disp_δ (lnwfs_L_monad_data ((L L⊗ L') L⊗ L'')) a)

    
C: category
F, F', F'': Ff C
L: LNWFS C F
L': LNWFS C F'
L'': LNWFS C F''
a: arrow C
pr21 (disp_δ (lnwfs_L_monad_data ((L L⊗ L') L⊗ L'')) a) =
arrow_mor11 (pr1 L (fact_R (F' ⊗ F'') a))
· pr1
    (section_disp_on_morphisms F
       (pr1
          (# F
             (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L (L' L⊗ L'') a))
        · pr1
            (# F
               (# (fact_R (F' ⊗ F''))
                  (lnwfs_mor (L L⊗ (L' L⊗ L''))
                     ((L L⊗ L') L⊗ L'')
                     (Ff_l_assoc_rev F F' F'') a)))))

· pr1

             (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L (L' L⊗ L'') a))
        · pr1

                     ((L L⊗ L') L⊗ L'')
                     (Ff_l_assoc_rev F F' F'') a)))))
 
C: category
F, F', F'': Ff C
L: LNWFS C F
L': LNWFS C F'
L'': LNWFS C F''
a: arrow C
arrow_mor11 (pr1 L (fact_R F' (fact_R F'' a)))
· (three_mor11
     (# F
        (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L L' (fact_R F'' a)
         :
         arrow C
         ⟦ fact_L F (fact_R F' (fact_R F'' a)),
         fact_R F'
           (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F' F
              (fact_R F'' a)) ⟧))
   · three_mor11
       (# (F ⊗ F')
          (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp (L L⊗ L') L'' a
           :
           arrow C ⟦ fact_L (F ⊗ F') (fact_R F'' a),
           fact_R F''
             (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F'' (F ⊗ F') a)
           ⟧))) =
arrow_mor11 (pr1 L (fact_R (F' ⊗ F'') a))
· pr1
    (section_disp_on_morphisms F
       (pr1
          (# F
             (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L (L' L⊗ L'') a))
        · pr1
            (# F
               (# (fact_R (F' ⊗ F''))
                  (lnwfs_mor (L L⊗ (L' L⊗ L''))
                     ((L L⊗ L') L⊗ L'')
                     (Ff_l_assoc_rev F F' F'') a)))))

    
C: category
F, F', F'': Ff C
L: LNWFS C F
L': LNWFS C F'
L'': LNWFS C F''
a: arrow C
three_mor11
  (# F (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L L' (fact_R F'' a)))
· three_mor11
    (# (F ⊗ F')
       (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp (L L⊗ L') L'' a)) =
pr1
  (section_disp_on_morphisms F
     (pr1
        (# F (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L (L' L⊗ L'') a))
      · pr1
          (# F
             (# (fact_R (F' ⊗ F''))
                (lnwfs_mor (L L⊗ (L' L⊗ L''))
                   ((L L⊗ L') L⊗ L'')
                   (Ff_l_assoc_rev F F' F'') a)))))

    
C: category
F, F', F'': Ff C

L': LNWFS C F'
L'': LNWFS C F''
a: arrow C
three_mor11
  (# F (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L L' (fact_R F'' a)))
· three_mor11
    (# (F ⊗ F')
       (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp (L L⊗ L') L'' a)) = 
?b
C: category
F, F', F'': Ff C
L: LNWFS C F
L': LNWFS C F'
L'': LNWFS C F''
a: arrow C
?b =
pr1
  (section_disp_on_morphisms F
     (pr1
        (# F (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L (L' L⊗ L'') a))
      · pr1
          (# F
             (# (fact_R (F' ⊗ F''))
                (lnwfs_mor (L L⊗ (L' L⊗ L''))
                   ((L L⊗ L') L⊗ L'')
                   (Ff_l_assoc_rev F F' F'') a)))))
 
C: category
F, F', F'': Ff C
L: LNWFS C F
L': LNWFS C F'
L'': LNWFS C F''
a: arrow C
pr1
  (section_disp_on_morphisms F
     (pr1
        (# F
           (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L L'
              (fact_R F'' a)))
      · pr1
          (# F
             (# (fact_R F')
                (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp (L L⊗ L') L''
                   a))))) =
pr1
  (section_disp_on_morphisms F
     (pr1
        (# F (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L (L' L⊗ L'') a))
      · pr1
          (# F
             (# (fact_R (F' ⊗ F''))
                (lnwfs_mor (L L⊗ (L' L⊗ L''))
                   ((L L⊗ L') L⊗ L'')
                   (Ff_l_assoc_rev F F' F'') a)))))

a: arrow C
arrow_mor00
  (pr1

   · pr1
       (# F
          (# (fact_R F')
             (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp (L L⊗ L') L'' a)))) =
arrow_mor00

   · pr1

             (lnwfs_mor (L L⊗ (L' L⊗ L''))
                ((L L⊗ L') L⊗ L'')
                (Ff_l_assoc_rev F F' F'') a))))

C: category
F, F', F'': Ff C
L: LNWFS C F
L': LNWFS C F'
L'': LNWFS C F''
a: arrow C
arrow_mor11 (pr1 L' (fact_R F'' a))
· (three_mor11
     (# F'
        (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L' F (fact_R F'' a)
         :
         arrow C ⟦ fact_L F' (fact_R F'' a),
         LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F' F (fact_R F'' a) ⟧))
   · pr111 (# F
              (# (fact_R F')
                 (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp (L L⊗ L')
                    L'' a)))) =

   · pr1

· (three_mor11
     (# (F' ⊗ F'')

         :
         arrow C ⟦ fact_L (F' ⊗ F'') a,
         LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper (F' ⊗ F'') F a ⟧))
   · pr111 (# F
              (# (fact_R (F' ⊗ F''))

                    ((L L⊗ L') L⊗ L'')

arrow_mor11
  (lnwfs_mor (L L⊗ (L' L⊗ L'')) ((L L⊗ L') L⊗ L'')
     (Ff_l_assoc_rev F F' F'') a
   · disp_ε (lnwfs_L_monad_data ((L L⊗ L') L⊗ L'')) a) =
arrow_mor11
  (disp_ε (lnwfs_L_monad_data (L L⊗ (L' L⊗ L''))) a)
 apply id_left.
Qed.

Definition LNWFS_tot_l_assoc_rev (L L' L'' : total_category (LNWFS C)) :
    (L Ltot⊗ (L' Ltot⊗ L'')) --> ((L Ltot⊗ L') Ltot⊗ L'') :=
  (_,, LNWFS_l_assoc_rev (pr2 L) (pr2 L') (pr2 L'')).

L': LNWFS C F'
L'': LNWFS C F''
(L L⊗ L') L⊗ L'' -->[
Ff_l_assoc F F' F''] (L L⊗ (L' L⊗ L''))

arrow_mor11 (pr1 (L L⊗ L') (fact_R F'' a))
· pr1
    (section_disp_on_morphisms F
       (pr1
          (# F

                (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp (L L⊗ L') L''
                   a)))
        · pr1
            (# F
               (# (fact_R F')
                  (# (fact_R F'')
                     (lnwfs_mor ((L L⊗ L') L⊗ L'')
                        (L L⊗ (L' L⊗ L''))
                        (Ff_l_assoc F F' F'') a)))))) =
pr21 (disp_δ (lnwfs_L_monad_data (L L⊗ (L' L⊗ L''))) a)

         :

a: arrow C
arrow_mor11 (pr1 L' (fact_R F'' a))
· (three_mor11
     (# F'
        (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L'' a
         :
         arrow C ⟦ fact_L F' (fact_R F'' a),
         fact_R F'' (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F'' F' a)
         ⟧))
   · three_mor11
       (# (F' ⊗ F'')
          (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp (L' L⊗ L'') F a
           :
           arrow C ⟦ fact_L (F' ⊗ F'') a,
           LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper (F' ⊗ F'') F a ⟧))) =

· (three_mor11
     (# F'

                      L'' a)))

                           (L L⊗ (L' L⊗ L''))
                           (Ff_l_assoc F F' F'') a))))))

          (# F'
             (# (fact_R F'')
                (lnwfs_mor ((L L⊗ L') L⊗ L'')
                   (L L⊗ (L' L⊗ L''))
                   (Ff_l_assoc F F' F'') a)))) = ?f'
C: category
F, F', F'': Ff C
L: LNWFS C F
L': LNWFS C F'
L'': LNWFS C F''
a: arrow C
pr211 (# F'
         (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L' F (fact_R F'' a)))
· ?f' =
arrow_mor11
  (pr1 (# F' (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L'' a))
   · pr1
       (# F'
          (# (fact_R F'')
             (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp (L' L⊗ L'') F a))))

                
C: category
F, F', F'': Ff C
L: LNWFS C F
L': LNWFS C F'
L'': LNWFS C F''
a: arrow C
pr211 (# F'
         (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L' F (fact_R F'' a)))
· pr211 (# F'
           (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp (L L⊗ L') L'' a)) =
arrow_mor11
  (pr1 (# F' (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L'' a))
   · pr1
       (# F'
          (# (fact_R F'')
             (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp (L' L⊗ L'') F a))))

a: arrow C
pr211 (# F'
         (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L' F (fact_R F'' a)))
· pr211 (# F'
           (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp (L L⊗ L') L'' a)) =
?b

   · pr1

C: category
F, F', F'': Ff C

L': LNWFS C F'

a: arrow C
arrow_mor11
  (pr1 (# F' (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L' L'' a))
   · pr1
       (# F'
          (# (fact_R F'')
             (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp (L' L⊗ L'') F a)))) =
pr211 (# F'
         (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L' F (fact_R F'' a)))

        apply id_left.
    
C: category
F, F', F'': Ff C
L: LNWFS C F
L': LNWFS C F'
L'': LNWFS C F''
a: arrow C
arrow_mor11
  (pr1
     (# F
        (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L L' (fact_R F'' a)))
   · (pr1
        (# F
           (# (fact_R F')
              (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp (L L⊗ L') L'' a)))
      · pr1
          (# F
             (# (fact_R F')
                (# (fact_R F'')
                   (lnwfs_mor ((L L⊗ L') L⊗ L'')
                      (L L⊗ (L' L⊗ L''))
                      (Ff_l_assoc F F' F'') a)))))) =
arrow_mor11 (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L (L' L⊗ L'') a)
 
C: category

L': LNWFS C F'

a: arrow C
arrow_mor11
  (pr1
     (# F
        (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L L' (fact_R F'' a)))
   · (pr1
        (# F
           (# (fact_R F')
              (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp (L L⊗ L') L'' a)))
      · pr1
          (# F
             (# (fact_R F')
                (# (fact_R F'')
                   (lnwfs_mor ((L L⊗ L') L⊗ L'')
                      (L L⊗ (L' L⊗ L''))
                      (Ff_l_assoc F F' F'') a)))))) =
?b

· pr211 (# F
           (# (fact_R F')
              (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp (L L⊗ L') L'' a)))
· pr211 (# F
           (# (fact_R F')
              (# (fact_R F'')
                 (lnwfs_mor ((L L⊗ L') L⊗ L'')
                    (L L⊗ (L' L⊗ L''))
                    (Ff_l_assoc F F' F'') a)))) =
arrow_mor11 (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L (L' L⊗ L'') a)

· pr211 (# F

              (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp (L L⊗ L') L'' a)))
· pr211 (# F
           (# (fact_R F')
              (# (fact_R F'')
                 (lnwfs_mor ((L L⊗ L') L⊗ L'')
                    (L L⊗ (L' L⊗ L''))

L': LNWFS C F'
L'': LNWFS C F''
a: arrow C
pr211 (# F
         (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L L' (fact_R F'' a)))
· pr211 (# F
           (# (fact_R F')
              (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp (L L⊗ L') L'' a))) =
arrow_mor11 (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L (L' L⊗ L'') a)

      apply id_right.
  
C: category
F, F', F'': Ff C
L: LNWFS C F
L': LNWFS C F'
L'': LNWFS C F''
a: arrow C
arrow_mor00
  (lnwfs_mor ((L L⊗ L') L⊗ L'') (L L⊗ (L' L⊗ L''))
     (Ff_l_assoc F F' F'') a
   · disp_ε (lnwfs_L_monad_data (L L⊗ (L' L⊗ L''))) a) =
arrow_mor00
  (disp_ε (lnwfs_L_monad_data ((L L⊗ L') L⊗ L'')) a)
 apply id_left.
  
C: category
F, F', F'': Ff C
L: LNWFS C F
L': LNWFS C F'
L'': LNWFS C F''
a: arrow C
arrow_mor11
  (lnwfs_mor ((L L⊗ L') L⊗ L'') (L L⊗ (L' L⊗ L''))
     (Ff_l_assoc F F' F'') a
   · disp_ε (lnwfs_L_monad_data (L L⊗ (L' L⊗ L''))) a) =
arrow_mor11
  (disp_ε (lnwfs_L_monad_data ((L L⊗ L') L⊗ L'')) a)
 apply id_left.
Qed.

Definition LNWFS_tot_l_assoc (L L' L'' : total_category (LNWFS C)) :
    ((L Ltot⊗ L') Ltot⊗ L'' ) --> (L Ltot⊗ (L' Ltot⊗ L'')) :=
  (_,, LNWFS_l_assoc (pr2 L) (pr2 L') (pr2 L'')).


C: category
F, G, G': Ff C
Λ: LNWFS C G
Λ': LNWFS C G'
τG: Ff C ⟦ G, G' ⟧
τ: Λ -->[ τG] Λ'
L: LNWFS C F
Λ L⊗ L -->[ τG ⊗post F] (Λ' L⊗ L)


C: category
F, G, G': Ff C
Λ: LNWFS C G
Λ': LNWFS C G'
τG: Ff C ⟦ G, G' ⟧
τ: Λ -->[ τG] Λ'
L: LNWFS C F
Λ L⊗ L -->[ τG ⊗post F] (Λ' L⊗ L)

  
C: category
F, G, G': Ff C
Λ: LNWFS C G
Λ': LNWFS C G'
τG: Ff C ⟦ G, G' ⟧
τ: Λ -->[ τG] Λ'
L: LNWFS C F
a: arrow C
arrow_mor00
  (lnwfs_mor (Λ L⊗ L) (Λ' L⊗ L) (τG ⊗post F) a
   · disp_δ (lnwfs_L_monad_data (Λ' L⊗ L)) a) =
arrow_mor00
  (disp_δ (lnwfs_L_monad_data (Λ L⊗ L)) a
   · # (pr1
          (L_monad (G ⊗ F) (pr1 (Λ L⊗ L))
             (pr2 (Λ L⊗ L))))
       (lnwfs_mor (Λ L⊗ L) (Λ' L⊗ L) (τG ⊗post F) a)
   · lnwfs_mor (Λ L⊗ L) (Λ' L⊗ L) (τG ⊗post F)
       (pr1
          (L_monad (G' ⊗ F) (pr1 (Λ' L⊗ L))
             (pr2 (Λ' L⊗ L))) a))
C: category
F, G, G': Ff C
Λ: LNWFS C G
Λ': LNWFS C G'
τG: Ff C ⟦ G, G' ⟧
τ: Λ -->[ τG] Λ'
L: LNWFS C F
a: arrow C
arrow_mor11
  (lnwfs_mor (Λ L⊗ L) (Λ' L⊗ L) (τG ⊗post F) a
   · disp_δ (lnwfs_L_monad_data (Λ' L⊗ L)) a) =
arrow_mor11
  (disp_δ (lnwfs_L_monad_data (Λ L⊗ L)) a
   · # (pr1
          (L_monad (G ⊗ F) (pr1 (Λ L⊗ L))
             (pr2 (Λ L⊗ L))))
       (lnwfs_mor (Λ L⊗ L) (Λ' L⊗ L) (τG ⊗post F) a)
   · lnwfs_mor (Λ L⊗ L) (Λ' L⊗ L) (τG ⊗post F)
       (pr1
          (L_monad (G' ⊗ F) (pr1 (Λ' L⊗ L))
             (pr2 (Λ' L⊗ L))) a))
C: category
F, G, G': Ff C
Λ: LNWFS C G
Λ': LNWFS C G'
τG: Ff C ⟦ G, G' ⟧
τ: Λ -->[ τG] Λ'
L: LNWFS C F
a: arrow C
arrow_mor00
  (lnwfs_mor (Λ L⊗ L) (Λ' L⊗ L) (τG ⊗post F) a
   · disp_ε (lnwfs_L_monad_data (Λ' L⊗ L)) a) =
arrow_mor00 (disp_ε (lnwfs_L_monad_data (Λ L⊗ L)) a)
C: category

Λ': LNWFS C G'
τG: Ff C ⟦ G, G' ⟧

  (lnwfs_mor (Λ L⊗ L) (Λ' L⊗ L) (τG ⊗post F) a
   · disp_ε (lnwfs_L_monad_data (Λ' L⊗ L)) a) =
arrow_mor11 (disp_ε (lnwfs_L_monad_data (Λ L⊗ L)) a)

   · lnwfs_mor (Λ L⊗ L) (Λ' L⊗ L) (τG ⊗post F)

a: arrow C
arrow_mor00
  (lnwfs_mor (Λ L⊗ L) (Λ' L⊗ L) (τG ⊗post F) a
   · disp_δ (lnwfs_L_monad_data (Λ' L⊗ L)) a) = ?b

       (pr1
          (L_monad (G' ⊗ F) (pr1 (Λ' L⊗ L))
             (pr2 (Λ' L⊗ L))) a)) =
pr11 (disp_δ (lnwfs_L_monad_data (Λ' L⊗ L)) a)

      · # (pr1

                (pr2 (Λ L⊗ L))))
          (lnwfs_mor (Λ L⊗ L) (Λ' L⊗ L) (τG ⊗post F) a)) =
pr11 (disp_δ (lnwfs_L_monad_data (Λ' L⊗ L)) a)

    apply id_right.

   · disp_δ (lnwfs_L_monad_data (Λ' L⊗ L)) a) =

             (pr2 (Λ L⊗ L))))

  (lnwfs_mor (Λ L⊗ L) (Λ' L⊗ L) (τG ⊗post F) a
   · disp_δ (lnwfs_L_monad_data (Λ' L⊗ L)) a) = ?b

τG: Ff C ⟦ G, G' ⟧

?b =

  (disp_δ (lnwfs_L_monad_data (Λ L⊗ L)) a
   · # (pr1
          (L_monad (G ⊗ F) (pr1 (Λ L⊗ L))
             (pr2 (Λ L⊗ L))))
       (lnwfs_mor (Λ L⊗ L) (Λ' L⊗ L) (τG ⊗post F) a)
   · lnwfs_mor (Λ L⊗ L) (Λ' L⊗ L) (τG ⊗post F)

Λ': LNWFS C G'
τG: Ff C ⟦ G, G' ⟧

L: LNWFS C F
a: arrow C
arrow_mor11
  (lnwfs_mor (Λ L⊗ L) (Λ' L⊗ L) (τG ⊗post F) a
   · disp_δ (lnwfs_L_monad_data (Λ' L⊗ L)) a) = ?b

      (* lnwfs_mor_axioms of τ at fact_R F a *)
      
C: category
F, G, G': Ff C
Λ: LNWFS C G
Λ': LNWFS C G'
τG: Ff C ⟦ G, G' ⟧
τ: Λ -->[ τG] Λ'
L: LNWFS C F
a: arrow C
arrow_mor11
  (lnwfs_mor (Λ L⊗ L) (Λ' L⊗ L) (τG ⊗post F) a
   · disp_δ (lnwfs_L_monad_data (Λ' L⊗ L)) a) = ?b0
C: category
F, G, G': Ff C
Λ: LNWFS C G
Λ': LNWFS C G'
τG: Ff C ⟦ G, G' ⟧
τ: Λ -->[ τG] Λ'
L: LNWFS C F
a: arrow C
?b0 = ?b
 
C: category
F, G, G': Ff C
Λ: LNWFS C G
Λ': LNWFS C G'
τG: Ff C ⟦ G, G' ⟧
τ: Λ -->[ τG] Λ'
L: LNWFS C F
a: arrow C
pr21 (lnwfs_mor (Λ L⊗ L) (Λ' L⊗ L) (τG ⊗post F) a)
· arrow_mor11 (pr1 Λ' (fact_R F a))
· three_mor11
    (# G'
       (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp Λ' L a
        :
        arrow C ⟦ fact_L G' (fact_R F a),
        fact_R F (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F G' a) ⟧)) =
?b

      
C: category
F, G, G': Ff C
Λ: LNWFS C G
Λ': LNWFS C G'
τG: Ff C ⟦ G, G' ⟧
τ: Λ -->[ τG] Λ'
L: LNWFS C F
a: arrow C
pr21 (lnwfs_mor (Λ L⊗ L) (Λ' L⊗ L) (τG ⊗post F) a)
· arrow_mor11 (pr1 Λ' (fact_R F a)) = ?f'

      exact (pr2 (pathsdirprodweq (base_paths _ _ (pr1 τ (fact_R F a))))).
    
C: category
F, G, G': Ff C
Λ: LNWFS C G
Λ': LNWFS C G'
τG: Ff C ⟦ G, G' ⟧
τ: Λ -->[ τG] Λ'
L: LNWFS C F
a: arrow C
pr21 (disp_δ (lnwfs_L_monad_data Λ) (fact_R F a)
      · # (pr1 (L_monad G (pr1 Λ) (pr2 Λ)))
          (lnwfs_mor Λ Λ' τG (fact_R F a)))
· pr21 (lnwfs_mor Λ Λ' τG
          (pr1 (L_monad G' (pr1 Λ') (pr2 Λ'))
             (fact_R F a)))
· three_mor11
    (# G'
       (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp Λ' L a
        :
        arrow C ⟦ fact_L G' (fact_R F a),
        fact_R F (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F G' a) ⟧)) =
arrow_mor11
  (disp_δ (lnwfs_L_monad_data (Λ L⊗ L)) a
   · # (pr1
          (L_monad (G ⊗ F) (pr1 (Λ L⊗ L))
             (pr2 (Λ L⊗ L))))
       (lnwfs_mor (Λ L⊗ L) (Λ' L⊗ L) (τG ⊗post F) a)
   · lnwfs_mor (Λ L⊗ L) (Λ' L⊗ L) (τG ⊗post F)
       (pr1
          (L_monad (G' ⊗ F) (pr1 (Λ' L⊗ L))
             (pr2 (Λ' L⊗ L))) a))

Λ': LNWFS C G'
τG: Ff C ⟦ G, G' ⟧
τ: Λ -->[ τG] Λ'
L: LNWFS C F
a: arrow C
pr21 (disp_δ (lnwfs_L_monad_data Λ) (fact_R F a)
      · # (pr1 (L_monad G (pr1 Λ) (pr2 Λ)))
          (lnwfs_mor Λ Λ' τG (fact_R F a)))
· pr21 (lnwfs_mor Λ Λ' τG
          (pr1 (L_monad G' (pr1 Λ') (pr2 Λ'))
             (fact_R F a)))
· three_mor11 (# G' (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp Λ' L a)) =
?b

   · (pr21 (lnwfs_mor Λ Λ' τG

C: category
F, G, G': Ff C
Λ: LNWFS C G
Λ': LNWFS C G'
τG: Ff C ⟦ G, G' ⟧
τ: Λ -->[ τG] Λ'
L: LNWFS C F
a: arrow C
arrow_mor11 (pr1 Λ (fact_R F a))
· (three_mor11
     (# G
        (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp Λ L a
         :
         arrow C ⟦ fact_L G (fact_R F a),
         fact_R F (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F G a) ⟧))
   · (pr21 (# (pr1
                 (L_monad (G ⊗ F) (pr1 (Λ L⊗ L))
                    (pr2 (Λ L⊗ L))))
              (lnwfs_mor (Λ L⊗ L) (Λ' L⊗ L)
                 (τG ⊗post F) a))
      · pr21 (lnwfs_mor (Λ L⊗ L) (Λ' L⊗ L)
                (τG ⊗post F)
                (pr1
                   (L_monad (G' ⊗ F) (pr1 (Λ' L⊗ L))
                      (pr2 (Λ' L⊗ L))) a)))) =
pr21 (disp_δ (lnwfs_L_monad_data Λ) (fact_R F a))
· (pr21 (# (pr1 (L_monad G (pr1 Λ) (pr2 Λ)))
           (lnwfs_mor Λ Λ' τG (fact_R F a)))
   · (pr21 (lnwfs_mor Λ Λ' τG
              (pr1 (L_monad G' (pr1 Λ') (pr2 Λ'))
                 (fact_R F a)))
      · three_mor11
          (# G' (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp Λ' L a))))

a: arrow C

· (pr21 (# (pr1

                 (pr2 (Λ L⊗ L))))

   · pr21 (lnwfs_mor (Λ L⊗ L) (Λ' L⊗ L) (τG ⊗post F)

· (pr21 (lnwfs_mor Λ Λ' τG

              (fact_R F a)))
   · three_mor11
       (# G' (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp Λ' L a)))


    (* naturality of τG at
        (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L Λ' a)
    *)

Λ': LNWFS C G'
τG: Ff C ⟦ G, G' ⟧
τ: Λ -->[ τG] Λ'
L: LNWFS C F
a: arrow C
pr1
  (section_disp_on_morphisms G
     (pr1 (# G (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp Λ L a))
      · pr1
          (# G
             (# (fact_R F)
                (lnwfs_mor (Λ L⊗ L) (Λ' L⊗ L)
                   (τG ⊗post F) a)))))
· pr21 (lnwfs_mor (Λ L⊗ L) (Λ' L⊗ L) (τG ⊗post F)
          (pr1

· (pr21 (lnwfs_mor Λ Λ' τG
           (pr1 (L_monad G' (pr1 Λ') (pr2 Λ'))
              (fact_R F a)))
   · three_mor11
       (# G' (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp Λ' L a)))


    
C: category
F, G, G': Ff C
Λ: LNWFS C G
Λ': LNWFS C G'
τG: Ff C ⟦ G, G' ⟧
τ: Λ -->[ τG] Λ'
L: LNWFS C F
a: arrow C
pr21 (# (pr1 (L_monad G (pr1 Λ) (pr2 Λ)))
        (lnwfs_mor Λ Λ' τG (fact_R F a)))
· (pr21 (lnwfs_mor Λ Λ' τG
           (pr1 (L_monad G' (pr1 Λ') (pr2 Λ'))
              (fact_R F a)))
   · three_mor11
       (# G' (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp Λ' L a))) =
pr1
  (section_disp_on_morphisms G
     (pr1 (# G (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp Λ L a))
      · pr1
          (# G
             (# (fact_R F)
                (lnwfs_mor (Λ L⊗ L) (Λ' L⊗ L)
                   (τG ⊗post F) a)))))
· pr21 (lnwfs_mor (Λ L⊗ L) (Λ' L⊗ L) (τG ⊗post F)
          (pr1
             (L_monad (G' ⊗ F) (pr1 (Λ' L⊗ L))
                (pr2 (Λ' L⊗ L))) a))

Λ': LNWFS C G'
τG: Ff C ⟦ G, G' ⟧

L: LNWFS C F
a: arrow C
pr21 (# (pr1 (L_monad G (pr1 Λ) (pr2 Λ)))
        (lnwfs_mor Λ Λ' τG (fact_R F a)))
· (pr21 (lnwfs_mor Λ Λ' τG
           (pr1 (L_monad G' (pr1 Λ') (pr2 Λ'))
              (fact_R F a)))
   · three_mor11
       (# G' (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp Λ' L a))) = 
?b

F, G, G': Ff C

C: category
F, G, G': Ff C
Λ: LNWFS C G
Λ': LNWFS C G'
τG: Ff C ⟦ G, G' ⟧
τ: Λ -->[ τG] Λ'
L: LNWFS C F
a: arrow C
τGnat:= pr2 τG: (λ nt : section_nat_trans_disp_data G G',
 section_nat_trans_disp_axioms nt) 
  (pr1 τG)
pr21 (lnwfs_mor Λ Λ' τG
        (pr1 (L_monad G' (pr1 Λ') (pr2 Λ'))
           (fact_R F a)))
· three_mor11 (# G' (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp Λ' L a)) =
?f'

      exact (pathsinv0 (base_paths _ _ (τGnat _ _ (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp Λ' L a)))).
    
C: category
F, G, G': Ff C
Λ: LNWFS C G
Λ': LNWFS C G'
τG: Ff C ⟦ G, G' ⟧
τ: Λ -->[ τG] Λ'
L: LNWFS C F
a: arrow C
pr21 (# (pr1 (L_monad G (pr1 Λ) (pr2 Λ)))
        (lnwfs_mor Λ Λ' τG (fact_R F a)))
· pr1
    (transportf
       (mor_disp (G (fact_L G' (fact_R F a)))
          (G'
             (fact_R F
                (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F G' a))))
       (id_right (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp Λ' L a) @
        ! id_left (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp Λ' L a))
       (section_disp_on_morphisms G
          (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp Λ' L a) ;; pr1 τG
                                                (fact_R
                                                 F
                                                 (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper
                                                 F G'
                                                 a)))%mor_disp) =
pr1
  (section_disp_on_morphisms G
     (pr1 (# G (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp Λ L a))
      · pr1
          (# G
             (# (fact_R F)
                (lnwfs_mor (Λ L⊗ L) (Λ' L⊗ L)
                   (τG ⊗post F) a)))))
· pr21 (lnwfs_mor (Λ L⊗ L) (Λ' L⊗ L) (τG ⊗post F)
          (pr1
             (L_monad (G' ⊗ F) (pr1 (Λ' L⊗ L))
                (pr2 (Λ' L⊗ L))) a))

       (mor_disp (G (fact_L G' (fact_R F a)))

          (# (fact_R F)
             (lnwfs_mor (Λ L⊗ L) (Λ' L⊗ L)
                (τG ⊗post F) a)))) =
pr11 (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp Λ' L a)

      
C: category
F, G, G': Ff C
Λ: LNWFS C G
Λ': LNWFS C G'
τG: Ff C ⟦ G, G' ⟧
τ: Λ -->[ τG] Λ'
L: LNWFS C F
a: arrow C
arrow_mor00
  (pr1 (# G (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp Λ L a))
   · pr1
       (# G
          (# (fact_R F)
             (lnwfs_mor (Λ L⊗ L) (Λ' L⊗ L)
                (τG ⊗post F) a)))) = ?b
C: category
F, G, G': Ff C
Λ: LNWFS C G
Λ': LNWFS C G'
τG: Ff C ⟦ G, G' ⟧
τ: Λ -->[ τG] Λ'
L: LNWFS C F
a: arrow C
?b = pr11 (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp Λ' L a)
 
C: category
F, G, G': Ff C
Λ: LNWFS C G
Λ': LNWFS C G'
τG: Ff C ⟦ G, G' ⟧
τ: Λ -->[ τG] Λ'
L: LNWFS C F
a: arrow C
arrow_mor11 (pr1 L a)
· (three_mor11
     (# F
        (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L G a
         :
         arrow C ⟦ fact_L F a,
         LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper F G a ⟧))
   · pr111 (# G
              (# (fact_R F)
                 (lnwfs_mor (Λ L⊗ L) (Λ' L⊗ L)
                    (τG ⊗post F) a)))) =
pr11 (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp Λ' L a)

      
C: category
F, G, G': Ff C
Λ: LNWFS C G
Λ': LNWFS C G'
τG: Ff C ⟦ G, G' ⟧
τ: Λ -->[ τG] Λ'
L: LNWFS C F
a: arrow C
three_mor11 (# F (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L G a))
· pr111 (# G
           (# (fact_R F)
              (lnwfs_mor (Λ L⊗ L) (Λ' L⊗ L)
                 (τG ⊗post F) a))) =
three_mor11 (# F (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L G' a))

      (* unfold three_mor11. *)
      (* cbn. *)
      
C: category
F, G, G': Ff C
Λ: LNWFS C G
Λ': LNWFS C G'
τG: Ff C ⟦ G, G' ⟧
τ: Λ -->[ τG] Λ'
L: LNWFS C F
a: arrow C
three_mor11 (# F (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L G a))
· pr111 (# G
           (# (fact_R F)
              (lnwfs_mor (Λ L⊗ L) (Λ' L⊗ L)
                 (τG ⊗post F) a))) = ?b
C: category
F, G, G': Ff C
Λ: LNWFS C G
Λ': LNWFS C G'
τG: Ff C ⟦ G, G' ⟧
τ: Λ -->[ τG] Λ'
L: LNWFS C F
a: arrow C
?b = three_mor11 (# F (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L G' a))
 
C: category
F, G, G': Ff C
Λ: LNWFS C G
Λ': LNWFS C G'
τG: Ff C ⟦ G, G' ⟧
τ: Λ -->[ τG] Λ'
L: LNWFS C F
a: arrow C
pr1
  (section_disp_on_morphisms F
     (pr1 (# F (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L G a))
      · pr1
          (# F
             (lnwfs_mor (Λ L⊗ L) (Λ' L⊗ L)
                (τG ⊗post F) a)))) =
three_mor11 (# F (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L G' a))

      
C: category
F, G, G': Ff C
Λ: LNWFS C G
Λ': LNWFS C G'
τG: Ff C ⟦ G, G' ⟧
τ: Λ -->[ τG] Λ'
L: LNWFS C F
a: arrow C
arrow_mor00
  (pr1 (# F (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L G a))
   · pr1
       (# F
          (lnwfs_mor (Λ L⊗ L) (Λ' L⊗ L) (τG ⊗post F) a))) =
arrow_mor00 (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L G' a)
C: category
F, G, G': Ff C
Λ: LNWFS C G
Λ': LNWFS C G'
τG: Ff C ⟦ G, G' ⟧
τ: Λ -->[ τG] Λ'
L: LNWFS C F
a: arrow C
arrow_mor11
  (pr1 (# F (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L G a))
   · pr1
       (# F
          (lnwfs_mor (Λ L⊗ L) (Λ' L⊗ L) (τG ⊗post F) a))) =
arrow_mor11 (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L G' a)

      
C: category
F, G, G': Ff C
Λ: LNWFS C G
Λ': LNWFS C G'
τG: Ff C ⟦ G, G' ⟧
τ: Λ -->[ τG] Λ'
L: LNWFS C F
a: arrow C
arrow_mor00
  (pr1 (# F (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L G a))
   · pr1
       (# F
          (lnwfs_mor (Λ L⊗ L) (Λ' L⊗ L) (τG ⊗post F) a))) =
arrow_mor00 (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L G' a)
 apply id_left.
      
C: category
F, G, G': Ff C
Λ: LNWFS C G
Λ': LNWFS C G'
τG: Ff C ⟦ G, G' ⟧
τ: Λ -->[ τG] Λ'
L: LNWFS C F
a: arrow C
arrow_mor11
  (pr1 (# F (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L G a))
   · pr1
       (# F
          (lnwfs_mor (Λ L⊗ L) (Λ' L⊗ L) (τG ⊗post F) a))) =
arrow_mor11 (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L G' a)
 
C: category
F, G, G': Ff C
Λ: LNWFS C G
Λ': LNWFS C G'
τG: Ff C ⟦ G, G' ⟧
τ: Λ -->[ τG] Λ'
L: LNWFS C F
a: arrow C
arrow_mor11
  (pr1 (# F (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L G a))
   · pr1
       (# F
          (lnwfs_mor (Λ L⊗ L) (Λ' L⊗ L) (τG ⊗post F) a))) =
?b
C: category
F, G, G': Ff C
Λ: LNWFS C G
Λ': LNWFS C G'
τG: Ff C ⟦ G, G' ⟧
τ: Λ -->[ τG] Λ'
L: LNWFS C F
a: arrow C
?b = arrow_mor11 (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L G' a)
 
C: category
F, G, G': Ff C
Λ: LNWFS C G
Λ': LNWFS C G'
τG: Ff C ⟦ G, G' ⟧
τ: Λ -->[ τG] Λ'
L: LNWFS C F
a: arrow C
pr111 (section_nat_trans τG (fact_R F a))
· pr122 (section_functor G' (fact_R F a)) =
arrow_mor11 (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp L G' a)

        apply id_left.
    
C: category
F, G, G': Ff C
Λ: LNWFS C G
Λ': LNWFS C G'
τG: Ff C ⟦ G, G' ⟧
τ: Λ -->[ τG] Λ'
L: LNWFS C F
a: arrow C
arrow_mor11
  (pr1 (# G (lnwfs_mor Λ Λ' τG (fact_R F a)))
   · LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp Λ' L a) =
arrow_mor11
  (pr1 (# G (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp Λ L a))
   · pr1
       (# G
          (# (fact_R F)
             (lnwfs_mor (Λ L⊗ L) (Λ' L⊗ L)
                (τG ⊗post F) a))))
 
C: category
F, G, G': Ff C
Λ: LNWFS C G
Λ': LNWFS C G'
τG: Ff C ⟦ G, G' ⟧
τ: Λ -->[ τG] Λ'
L: LNWFS C F
a: arrow C
arrow_mor11
  (pr1 (# G (lnwfs_mor Λ Λ' τG (fact_R F a)))
   · LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp Λ' L a) = ?b
C: category
F, G, G': Ff C
Λ: LNWFS C G
Λ': LNWFS C G'
τG: Ff C ⟦ G, G' ⟧
τ: Λ -->[ τG] Λ'
L: LNWFS C F
a: arrow C
?b =
arrow_mor11
  (pr1 (# G (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp Λ L a))
   · pr1
       (# G
          (# (fact_R F)
             (lnwfs_mor (Λ L⊗ L) (Λ' L⊗ L)
                (τG ⊗post F) a))))
 
C: category
F, G, G': Ff C
Λ: LNWFS C G
Λ': LNWFS C G'
τG: Ff C ⟦ G, G' ⟧
τ: Λ -->[ τG] Λ'
L: LNWFS C F
a: arrow C
pr211 (# G (lnwfs_mor Λ Λ' τG (fact_R F a))) =
arrow_mor11
  (pr1 (# G (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp Λ L a))
   · pr1
       (# G
          (# (fact_R F)
             (lnwfs_mor (Λ L⊗ L) (Λ' L⊗ L)
                (τG ⊗post F) a))))

      
C: category
F, G, G': Ff C
Λ: LNWFS C G
Λ': LNWFS C G'
τG: Ff C ⟦ G, G' ⟧
τ: Λ -->[ τG] Λ'
L: LNWFS C F
a: arrow C
arrow_mor11
  (pr1 (# G (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp Λ L a))
   · pr1
       (# G
          (# (fact_R F)
             (lnwfs_mor (Λ L⊗ L) (Λ' L⊗ L)
                (τG ⊗post F) a)))) =
pr211 (# G (lnwfs_mor Λ Λ' τG (fact_R F a)))

      apply id_left.
  
C: category
F, G, G': Ff C
Λ: LNWFS C G
Λ': LNWFS C G'
τG: Ff C ⟦ G, G' ⟧
τ: Λ -->[ τG] Λ'
L: LNWFS C F
a: arrow C
arrow_mor00
  (lnwfs_mor (Λ L⊗ L) (Λ' L⊗ L) (τG ⊗post F) a
   · disp_ε (lnwfs_L_monad_data (Λ' L⊗ L)) a) =
arrow_mor00 (disp_ε (lnwfs_L_monad_data (Λ L⊗ L)) a)
 apply id_left.
  
C: category
F, G, G': Ff C
Λ: LNWFS C G
Λ': LNWFS C G'
τG: Ff C ⟦ G, G' ⟧
τ: Λ -->[ τG] Λ'
L: LNWFS C F
a: arrow C
arrow_mor11
  (lnwfs_mor (Λ L⊗ L) (Λ' L⊗ L) (τG ⊗post F) a
   · disp_ε (lnwfs_L_monad_data (Λ' L⊗ L)) a) =
arrow_mor11 (disp_ε (lnwfs_L_monad_data (Λ L⊗ L)) a)
 
C: category
F, G, G': Ff C
Λ: LNWFS C G
Λ': LNWFS C G'
τG: Ff C ⟦ G, G' ⟧
τ: Λ -->[ τG] Λ'
L: LNWFS C F
a: arrow C
arrow_mor11
  (lnwfs_mor (Λ L⊗ L) (Λ' L⊗ L) (τG ⊗post F) a
   · disp_ε (lnwfs_L_monad_data (Λ' L⊗ L)) a) = ?b
C: category
F, G, G': Ff C
Λ: LNWFS C G
Λ': LNWFS C G'
τG: Ff C ⟦ G, G' ⟧
τ: Λ -->[ τG] Λ'
L: LNWFS C F
a: arrow C
?b =
arrow_mor11 (disp_ε (lnwfs_L_monad_data (Λ L⊗ L)) a)
 
C: category
F, G, G': Ff C
Λ: LNWFS C G
Λ': LNWFS C G'
τG: Ff C ⟦ G, G' ⟧
τ: Λ -->[ τG] Λ'
L: LNWFS C F
a: arrow C
pr122 (pr2 (section_functor G (fact_R F a)))
· pr211 (section_nat_trans τG (fact_R F a)) =
arrow_mor11 (disp_ε (lnwfs_L_monad_data (Λ L⊗ L)) a)

    apply id_right.
Qed.

Definition LNWFS_tot_l_rightwhisker
    {Λ Λ' : total_category (LNWFS C)}
    (τ : Λ --> Λ') (L : total_category (LNWFS C)) :
  (Λ Ltot⊗ L) --> (Λ' Ltot⊗ L) :=
    (_,, LNWFS_l_rightwhisker (pr2 τ) (pr2 L)).

Notation "τ L⊗post l" := (LNWFS_l_rightwhisker τ l) (at level 50).
Notation "τ Ltot⊗post l" := (LNWFS_tot_l_rightwhisker τ l) (at level 50).

(* todo: we _could_ do this for LNWFS (displayed) as well, but
   it involves a bunch of transportf's, and I don't know if we
   want to even use this *)

C: category
Λ, L: total_category (LNWFS C)
identity Λ Ltot⊗post L = identity (Λ Ltot⊗ L)


C: category
Λ, L: total_category (LNWFS C)
identity Λ Ltot⊗post L = identity (Λ Ltot⊗ L)

  
C: category
Λ, L: total_category (LNWFS C)
pr1 (identity Λ Ltot⊗post L) =
pr1 (identity (Λ Ltot⊗ L))

  (* cbn. *)
  
C: category
Λ, L: total_category (LNWFS C)
pr1 (identity Λ Ltot⊗post L) = ?b
C: category
Λ, L: total_category (LNWFS C)
?b = pr1 (identity (Λ Ltot⊗ L))
 
C: category
Λ, L: total_category (LNWFS C)
identity (pr1 Λ ⊗ pr1 L) = pr1 (identity (Λ Ltot⊗ L))

  reflexivity.
Qed.


C: category
Λ, Λ', Λ'': total_category (LNWFS C)
τ: total_category (LNWFS C) ⟦ Λ, Λ' ⟧
τ': total_category (LNWFS C) ⟦ Λ', Λ'' ⟧
L: total_category (LNWFS C)
τ · τ' Ltot⊗post L =
(τ Ltot⊗post L) · (τ' Ltot⊗post L)


C: category
Λ, Λ', Λ'': total_category (LNWFS C)
τ: total_category (LNWFS C) ⟦ Λ, Λ' ⟧
τ': total_category (LNWFS C) ⟦ Λ', Λ'' ⟧
L: total_category (LNWFS C)
τ · τ' Ltot⊗post L =
(τ Ltot⊗post L) · (τ' Ltot⊗post L)

  
C: category
Λ, Λ', Λ'': total_category (LNWFS C)
τ: total_category (LNWFS C) ⟦ Λ, Λ' ⟧
τ': total_category (LNWFS C) ⟦ Λ', Λ'' ⟧
L: total_category (LNWFS C)
pr1 (τ · τ' Ltot⊗post L) =
pr1 ((τ Ltot⊗post L) · (τ' Ltot⊗post L))

  (* cbn. *)
  
C: category
Λ, Λ', Λ'': total_category (LNWFS C)
τ: total_category (LNWFS C) ⟦ Λ, Λ' ⟧
τ': total_category (LNWFS C) ⟦ Λ', Λ'' ⟧
L: total_category (LNWFS C)
pr1 (τ · τ' Ltot⊗post L) = ?b
C: category
Λ, Λ', Λ'': total_category (LNWFS C)
τ: total_category (LNWFS C) ⟦ Λ, Λ' ⟧
τ': total_category (LNWFS C) ⟦ Λ', Λ'' ⟧
L: total_category (LNWFS C)
?b = pr1 ((τ Ltot⊗post L) · (τ' Ltot⊗post L))
 
C: category
Λ, Λ', Λ'': total_category (LNWFS C)
τ: total_category (LNWFS C) ⟦ Λ, Λ' ⟧
τ': total_category (LNWFS C) ⟦ Λ', Λ'' ⟧
L: total_category (LNWFS C)
(pr1 τ ⊗post pr1 L) · (pr1 τ' ⊗post pr1 L) =
pr1 ((τ Ltot⊗post L) · (τ' Ltot⊗post L))

  reflexivity.
Qed.


C: category
F, G, G': Ff C
Λ: LNWFS C G
Λ': LNWFS C G'
τG: Ff C ⟦ G, G' ⟧
L: LNWFS C F
τ: Λ -->[ τG] Λ'
L L⊗ Λ -->[ F ⊗pre τG] (L L⊗ Λ')


C: category
F, G, G': Ff C
Λ: LNWFS C G
Λ': LNWFS C G'
τG: Ff C ⟦ G, G' ⟧
L: LNWFS C F
τ: Λ -->[ τG] Λ'
L L⊗ Λ -->[ F ⊗pre τG] (L L⊗ Λ')

  
C: category
F, G, G': Ff C
Λ: LNWFS C G
Λ': LNWFS C G'
τG: Ff C ⟦ G, G' ⟧
L: LNWFS C F
τ: Λ -->[ τG] Λ'
a: arrow C
arrow_mor00
  (lnwfs_mor (L L⊗ Λ) (L L⊗ Λ') (F ⊗pre τG) a
   · disp_δ (lnwfs_L_monad_data (L L⊗ Λ')) a) =
arrow_mor00
  (disp_δ (lnwfs_L_monad_data (L L⊗ Λ)) a
   · # (pr1
          (L_monad (F ⊗ G) (pr1 (L L⊗ Λ))
             (pr2 (L L⊗ Λ))))
       (lnwfs_mor (L L⊗ Λ) (L L⊗ Λ') (F ⊗pre τG) a)
   · lnwfs_mor (L L⊗ Λ) (L L⊗ Λ') (F ⊗pre τG)
       (pr1
          (L_monad (F ⊗ G') (pr1 (L L⊗ Λ'))
             (pr2 (L L⊗ Λ'))) a))
C: category
F, G, G': Ff C
Λ: LNWFS C G
Λ': LNWFS C G'
τG: Ff C ⟦ G, G' ⟧
L: LNWFS C F
τ: Λ -->[ τG] Λ'
a: arrow C
arrow_mor11
  (lnwfs_mor (L L⊗ Λ) (L L⊗ Λ') (F ⊗pre τG) a
   · disp_δ (lnwfs_L_monad_data (L L⊗ Λ')) a) =
arrow_mor11
  (disp_δ (lnwfs_L_monad_data (L L⊗ Λ)) a
   · # (pr1
          (L_monad (F ⊗ G) (pr1 (L L⊗ Λ))
             (pr2 (L L⊗ Λ))))
       (lnwfs_mor (L L⊗ Λ) (L L⊗ Λ') (F ⊗pre τG) a)
   · lnwfs_mor (L L⊗ Λ) (L L⊗ Λ') (F ⊗pre τG)
       (pr1
          (L_monad (F ⊗ G') (pr1 (L L⊗ Λ'))
             (pr2 (L L⊗ Λ'))) a))
C: category
F, G, G': Ff C
Λ: LNWFS C G
Λ': LNWFS C G'
τG: Ff C ⟦ G, G' ⟧
L: LNWFS C F
τ: Λ -->[ τG] Λ'
a: arrow C
arrow_mor00
  (lnwfs_mor (L L⊗ Λ) (L L⊗ Λ') (F ⊗pre τG) a
   · disp_ε (lnwfs_L_monad_data (L L⊗ Λ')) a) =
arrow_mor00 (disp_ε (lnwfs_L_monad_data (L L⊗ Λ)) a)
C: category
F, G, G': Ff C
Λ: LNWFS C G
Λ': LNWFS C G'
τG: Ff C ⟦ G, G' ⟧
L: LNWFS C F
τ: Λ -->[ τG] Λ'
a: arrow C
arrow_mor11
  (lnwfs_mor (L L⊗ Λ) (L L⊗ Λ') (F ⊗pre τG) a
   · disp_ε (lnwfs_L_monad_data (L L⊗ Λ')) a) =
arrow_mor11 (disp_ε (lnwfs_L_monad_data (L L⊗ Λ)) a)

  
C: category
F, G, G': Ff C
Λ: LNWFS C G
Λ': LNWFS C G'
τG: Ff C ⟦ G, G' ⟧
L: LNWFS C F
τ: Λ -->[ τG] Λ'
a: arrow C
arrow_mor00
  (lnwfs_mor (L L⊗ Λ) (L L⊗ Λ') (F ⊗pre τG) a
   · disp_δ (lnwfs_L_monad_data (L L⊗ Λ')) a) =
arrow_mor00
  (disp_δ (lnwfs_L_monad_data (L L⊗ Λ)) a
   · # (pr1
          (L_monad (F ⊗ G) (pr1 (L L⊗ Λ))
             (pr2 (L L⊗ Λ))))
       (lnwfs_mor (L L⊗ Λ) (L L⊗ Λ') (F ⊗pre τG) a)
   · lnwfs_mor (L L⊗ Λ) (L L⊗ Λ') (F ⊗pre τG)
       (pr1
          (L_monad (F ⊗ G') (pr1 (L L⊗ Λ'))
             (pr2 (L L⊗ Λ'))) a))
 
C: category
F, G, G': Ff C
Λ: LNWFS C G
Λ': LNWFS C G'
τG: Ff C ⟦ G, G' ⟧
L: LNWFS C F
τ: Λ -->[ τG] Λ'
a: arrow C
arrow_mor00
  (lnwfs_mor (L L⊗ Λ) (L L⊗ Λ') (F ⊗pre τG) a
   · disp_δ (lnwfs_L_monad_data (L L⊗ Λ')) a) = ?b
C: category
F, G, G': Ff C
Λ: LNWFS C G
Λ': LNWFS C G'
τG: Ff C ⟦ G, G' ⟧
L: LNWFS C F
τ: Λ -->[ τG] Λ'
a: arrow C
?b =
arrow_mor00
  (disp_δ (lnwfs_L_monad_data (L L⊗ Λ)) a
   · # (pr1
          (L_monad (F ⊗ G) (pr1 (L L⊗ Λ))
             (pr2 (L L⊗ Λ))))
       (lnwfs_mor (L L⊗ Λ) (L L⊗ Λ') (F ⊗pre τG) a)
   · lnwfs_mor (L L⊗ Λ) (L L⊗ Λ') (F ⊗pre τG)
       (pr1
          (L_monad (F ⊗ G') (pr1 (L L⊗ Λ'))
             (pr2 (L L⊗ Λ'))) a))
 
C: category
F, G, G': Ff C
Λ: LNWFS C G
Λ': LNWFS C G'
τG: Ff C ⟦ G, G' ⟧
L: LNWFS C F
τ: Λ -->[ τG] Λ'
a: arrow C
pr11 (disp_δ (lnwfs_L_monad_data (L L⊗ Λ')) a) =
arrow_mor00
  (disp_δ (lnwfs_L_monad_data (L L⊗ Λ)) a
   · # (pr1
          (L_monad (F ⊗ G) (pr1 (L L⊗ Λ))
             (pr2 (L L⊗ Λ))))
       (lnwfs_mor (L L⊗ Λ) (L L⊗ Λ') (F ⊗pre τG) a)
   · lnwfs_mor (L L⊗ Λ) (L L⊗ Λ') (F ⊗pre τG)
       (pr1
          (L_monad (F ⊗ G') (pr1 (L L⊗ Λ'))
             (pr2 (L L⊗ Λ'))) a))

    
C: category
F, G, G': Ff C
Λ: LNWFS C G
Λ': LNWFS C G'
τG: Ff C ⟦ G, G' ⟧
L: LNWFS C F
τ: Λ -->[ τG] Λ'
a: arrow C
arrow_mor00
  (disp_δ (lnwfs_L_monad_data (L L⊗ Λ)) a
   · # (pr1
          (L_monad (F ⊗ G) (pr1 (L L⊗ Λ))
             (pr2 (L L⊗ Λ))))
       (lnwfs_mor (L L⊗ Λ) (L L⊗ Λ') (F ⊗pre τG) a)
   · lnwfs_mor (L L⊗ Λ) (L L⊗ Λ') (F ⊗pre τG)
       (pr1
          (L_monad (F ⊗ G') (pr1 (L L⊗ Λ'))
             (pr2 (L L⊗ Λ'))) a)) =
pr11 (disp_δ (lnwfs_L_monad_data (L L⊗ Λ')) a)

Λ': LNWFS C G'
τG: Ff C ⟦ G, G' ⟧
L: LNWFS C F
τ: Λ -->[ τG] Λ'
a: arrow C
arrow_mor00
  (disp_δ (lnwfs_L_monad_data (L L⊗ Λ)) a
   · # (pr1
          (L_monad (F ⊗ G) (pr1 (L L⊗ Λ))
             (pr2 (L L⊗ Λ))))
       (lnwfs_mor (L L⊗ Λ) (L L⊗ Λ') (F ⊗pre τG) a)
   · lnwfs_mor (L L⊗ Λ) (L L⊗ Λ') (F ⊗pre τG)
       (pr1
          (L_monad (F ⊗ G') (pr1 (L L⊗ Λ'))
             (pr2 (L L⊗ Λ'))) a)) = ?b

F, G, G': Ff C
Λ: LNWFS C G
Λ': LNWFS C G'
τG: Ff C ⟦ G, G' ⟧
L: LNWFS C F
τ: Λ -->[ τG] Λ'
a: arrow C
?b = pr11 (disp_δ (lnwfs_L_monad_data (L L⊗ Λ')) a)
 
C: category
F, G, G': Ff C

Λ': LNWFS C G'
τG: Ff C ⟦ G, G' ⟧
L: LNWFS C F
τ: Λ -->[ τG] Λ'
a: arrow C
pr11 (disp_δ (lnwfs_L_monad_data (L L⊗ Λ)) a
      · # (pr1
             (L_monad (F ⊗ G) (pr1 (L L⊗ Λ))
                (pr2 (L L⊗ Λ))))
          (lnwfs_mor (L L⊗ Λ) (L L⊗ Λ') (F ⊗pre τG) a)) =
pr11 (disp_δ (lnwfs_L_monad_data (L L⊗ Λ')) a)

    apply id_right.
  
C: category
F, G, G': Ff C
Λ: LNWFS C G
Λ': LNWFS C G'
τG: Ff C ⟦ G, G' ⟧
L: LNWFS C F
τ: Λ -->[ τG] Λ'
a: arrow C
arrow_mor11
  (lnwfs_mor (L L⊗ Λ) (L L⊗ Λ') (F ⊗pre τG) a
   · disp_δ (lnwfs_L_monad_data (L L⊗ Λ')) a) =
arrow_mor11
  (disp_δ (lnwfs_L_monad_data (L L⊗ Λ)) a
   · # (pr1
          (L_monad (F ⊗ G) (pr1 (L L⊗ Λ))
             (pr2 (L L⊗ Λ))))
       (lnwfs_mor (L L⊗ Λ) (L L⊗ Λ') (F ⊗pre τG) a)
   · lnwfs_mor (L L⊗ Λ) (L L⊗ Λ') (F ⊗pre τG)
       (pr1
          (L_monad (F ⊗ G') (pr1 (L L⊗ Λ'))
             (pr2 (L L⊗ Λ'))) a))

  (disp_δ (lnwfs_L_monad_data (L L⊗ Λ)) a

             (pr2 (L L⊗ Λ))))

       (pr1

             (pr2 (L L⊗ Λ'))) a)) =

· (pr21 (# (pr1
              (L_monad (F ⊗ G) (pr1 (L L⊗ Λ))
                 (pr2 (L L⊗ Λ))))

C: category
F, G, G': Ff C

Λ': LNWFS C G'
τG: Ff C ⟦ G, G' ⟧
L: LNWFS C F
τ: Λ -->[ τG] Λ'
a: arrow C
pr21 (# (pr1
           (L_monad (F ⊗ G) (pr1 (L L⊗ Λ))
              (pr2 (L L⊗ Λ))))
        (lnwfs_mor (L L⊗ Λ) (L L⊗ Λ') (F ⊗pre τG) a))
· pr21 (lnwfs_mor (L L⊗ Λ) (L L⊗ Λ') (F ⊗pre τG)
          (pr1
             (L_monad (F ⊗ G') (pr1 (L L⊗ Λ'))
                (pr2 (L L⊗ Λ'))) a)) = ?f'
C: category
F, G, G': Ff C
Λ: LNWFS C G
Λ': LNWFS C G'
τG: Ff C ⟦ G, G' ⟧
L: LNWFS C F
τ: Λ -->[ τG] Λ'
a: arrow C
pr21 (disp_δ (lnwfs_L_monad_data (L L⊗ Λ)) a) · ?f' =
?b

              
C: category
F, G, G': Ff C
Λ: LNWFS C G
Λ': LNWFS C G'
τG: Ff C ⟦ G, G' ⟧
L: LNWFS C F
τ: Λ -->[ τG] Λ'
a: arrow C
pr21 (disp_δ (lnwfs_L_monad_data (L L⊗ Λ)) a)
· pr1
    (section_disp_on_morphisms F
       (# (fact_R G)
          (lnwfs_mor (L L⊗ Λ) (L L⊗ Λ') (F ⊗pre τG) a)
        · three_mor_mor12
            (section_nat_trans τG
               (pr1
                  (L_monad (F ⊗ G') (pr1 (L L⊗ Λ'))
                     (pr2 (L L⊗ Λ'))) a)))) = ?b

      
C: category
F, G, G': Ff C
Λ: LNWFS C G
Λ': LNWFS C G'
τG: Ff C ⟦ G, G' ⟧
L: LNWFS C F
τ: Λ -->[ τG] Λ'
a: arrow C
pr21 (disp_δ (lnwfs_L_monad_data (L L⊗ Λ)) a)
· pr1
    (section_disp_on_morphisms F
       (# (fact_R G)
          (lnwfs_mor (L L⊗ Λ) (L L⊗ Λ') (F ⊗pre τG) a)
        · three_mor_mor12
            (section_nat_trans τG
               (pr1
                  (L_monad (F ⊗ G') (pr1 (L L⊗ Λ'))
                     (pr2 (L L⊗ Λ'))) a)))) = ?b0
C: category
F, G, G': Ff C
Λ: LNWFS C G
Λ': LNWFS C G'
τG: Ff C ⟦ G, G' ⟧
L: LNWFS C F
τ: Λ -->[ τG] Λ'
a: arrow C
?b0 = ?b
 
C: category
F, G, G': Ff C
Λ: LNWFS C G
Λ': LNWFS C G'
τG: Ff C ⟦ G, G' ⟧
L: LNWFS C F
τ: Λ -->[ τG] Λ'
a: arrow C
arrow_mor11 (pr1 L (fact_R G a))
· (three_mor11
     (# F
        (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L Λ a
         :
         arrow C ⟦ fact_L F (fact_R G a),
         fact_R G (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper G F a) ⟧))
   · pr1
       (section_disp_on_morphisms F
          (# (fact_R G)
             (lnwfs_mor (L L⊗ Λ) (L L⊗ Λ') (F ⊗pre τG)
                a)
           · three_mor_mor12
               (section_nat_trans τG
                  (pr1
                     (L_monad (F ⊗ G') (pr1 (L L⊗ Λ'))
                        (pr2 (L L⊗ Λ'))) a))))) = 
?b

      
C: category
F, G, G': Ff C
Λ: LNWFS C G
Λ': LNWFS C G'
τG: Ff C ⟦ G, G' ⟧
L: LNWFS C F
τ: Λ -->[ τG] Λ'
a: arrow C
three_mor11 (# F (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L Λ a))
· pr1
    (section_disp_on_morphisms F
       (# (fact_R G)
          (lnwfs_mor (L L⊗ Λ) (L L⊗ Λ') (F ⊗pre τG) a)
        · three_mor_mor12
            (section_nat_trans τG
               (pr1
                  (L_monad (F ⊗ G') (pr1 (L L⊗ Λ'))
                     (pr2 (L L⊗ Λ'))) a)))) = ?f'

      use (pr1_section_disp_on_morphisms_comp F).
    
C: category
F, G, G': Ff C
Λ: LNWFS C G
Λ': LNWFS C G'
τG: Ff C ⟦ G, G' ⟧
L: LNWFS C F
τ: Λ -->[ τG] Λ'
a: arrow C
arrow_mor11 (pr1 L (fact_R G a))
· pr1
    (section_disp_on_morphisms F
       (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L Λ a
        · (# (fact_R G)
             (lnwfs_mor (L L⊗ Λ) (L L⊗ Λ') (F ⊗pre τG)
                a)
           · three_mor_mor12
               (section_nat_trans τG
                  (pr1
                     (L_monad (F ⊗ G') (pr1 (L L⊗ Λ'))
                        (pr2 (L L⊗ Λ'))) a))))) =
arrow_mor11
  (lnwfs_mor (L L⊗ Λ) (L L⊗ Λ') (F ⊗pre τG) a
   · disp_δ (lnwfs_L_monad_data (L L⊗ Λ')) a)

F, G, G': Ff C

Λ': LNWFS C G'
τG: Ff C ⟦ G, G' ⟧
L: LNWFS C F
τ: Λ -->[ τG] Λ'
a: arrow C
mor:= three_mor_mor12 (section_nat_trans τG a)
:
arrow C ⟦ fact_R G a, fact_R G' a ⟧: arrow C ⟦ fact_R G a, fact_R G' a ⟧
arrow_mor11 (pr1 L (fact_R G a))
· pr1
    (section_disp_on_morphisms F
       (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L Λ a
        · (# (fact_R G)
             (lnwfs_mor (L L⊗ Λ) (L L⊗ Λ') (F ⊗pre τG)
                a)
           · three_mor_mor12
               (section_nat_trans τG
                  (pr1
                     (L_monad (F ⊗ G') (pr1 (L L⊗ Λ'))
                        (pr2 (L L⊗ Λ'))) a))))) =
arrow_mor11
  (lnwfs_mor (L L⊗ Λ) (L L⊗ Λ') (F ⊗pre τG) a
   · disp_δ (lnwfs_L_monad_data (L L⊗ Λ')) a)

F, G, G': Ff C
Λ: LNWFS C G
Λ': LNWFS C G'
τG: Ff C ⟦ G, G' ⟧
L: LNWFS C F
τ: Λ -->[ τG] Λ'
a: arrow C
mor:= three_mor_mor12 (section_nat_trans τG a)
:
arrow C ⟦ fact_R G a, fact_R G' a ⟧: arrow C ⟦ fact_R G a, fact_R G' a ⟧
arrow_mor11
  (lnwfs_mor (L L⊗ Λ) (L L⊗ Λ') (F ⊗pre τG) a
   · disp_δ (lnwfs_L_monad_data (L L⊗ Λ')) a) =
arrow_mor11 (pr1 L (fact_R G a))
· pr1
    (section_disp_on_morphisms F
       (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L Λ a
        · (# (fact_R G)
             (lnwfs_mor (L L⊗ Λ) (L L⊗ Λ') (F ⊗pre τG)
                a)
           · three_mor_mor12
               (section_nat_trans τG
                  (pr1
                     (L_monad (F ⊗ G') (pr1 (L L⊗ Λ'))
                        (pr2 (L L⊗ Λ'))) a)))))

arrow_mor11
  (lnwfs_mor (L L⊗ Λ) (L L⊗ Λ') (F ⊗pre τG) a
   · disp_δ (lnwfs_L_monad_data (L L⊗ Λ')) a) = ?b

Λ': LNWFS C G'

τ: Λ -->[ τG] Λ'
a: arrow C
mor:= three_mor_mor12 (section_nat_trans τG a)
:
arrow C ⟦ fact_R G a, fact_R G' a ⟧: arrow C ⟦ fact_R G a, fact_R G' a ⟧
?b =
arrow_mor11 (pr1 L (fact_R G a))
· pr1
    (section_disp_on_morphisms F
       (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L Λ a
        · (# (fact_R G)
             (lnwfs_mor (L L⊗ Λ) (L L⊗ Λ') (F ⊗pre τG)
                a)
           · three_mor_mor12
               (section_nat_trans τG
                  (pr1
                     (L_monad (F ⊗ G') (pr1 (L L⊗ Λ'))
                        (pr2 (L L⊗ Λ'))) a)))))
 
C: category
F, G, G': Ff C
Λ: LNWFS C G
Λ': LNWFS C G'
τG: Ff C ⟦ G, G' ⟧
L: LNWFS C F
τ: Λ -->[ τG] Λ'
a: arrow C
mor:= three_mor_mor12 (section_nat_trans τG a)
:
arrow C ⟦ fact_R G a, fact_R G' a ⟧: arrow C ⟦ fact_R G a, fact_R G' a ⟧
pr21 (lnwfs_mor (L L⊗ Λ) (L L⊗ Λ') (F ⊗pre τG) a)
· arrow_mor11 (pr1 L (fact_R G' a))
· three_mor11
    (# F
       (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L Λ' a
        :
        arrow C ⟦ fact_L F (fact_R G' a),
        fact_R G' (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper G' F a) ⟧)) =
arrow_mor11 (pr1 L (fact_R G a))
· pr1
    (section_disp_on_morphisms F
       (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L Λ a
        · (# (fact_R G)
             (lnwfs_mor (L L⊗ Λ) (L L⊗ Λ') (F ⊗pre τG)
                a)
           · three_mor_mor12
               (section_nat_trans τG
                  (pr1
                     (L_monad (F ⊗ G') (pr1 (L L⊗ Λ'))
                        (pr2 (L L⊗ Λ'))) a)))))

    
C: category
F, G, G': Ff C
Λ: LNWFS C G
Λ': LNWFS C G'
τG: Ff C ⟦ G, G' ⟧
L: LNWFS C F
τ: Λ -->[ τG] Λ'
a: arrow C
mor:= three_mor_mor12 (section_nat_trans τG a)
:
arrow C ⟦ fact_R G a, fact_R G' a ⟧: arrow C ⟦ fact_R G a, fact_R G' a ⟧
Lnatmor:= nat_trans_ax (pr1 L) (fact_R G a)
  (fact_R G' a) mor: # (fact_L F) mor · pr1 L (fact_R G' a) =
pr1 L (fact_R G a)
· # (fact_L F ∙ fact_L F) mor
pr21 (lnwfs_mor (L L⊗ Λ) (L L⊗ Λ') (F ⊗pre τG) a)
· arrow_mor11 (pr1 L (fact_R G' a))
· three_mor11
    (# F
       (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L Λ' a
        :
        arrow C ⟦ fact_L F (fact_R G' a),
        fact_R G' (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper G' F a) ⟧)) =
arrow_mor11 (pr1 L (fact_R G a))
· pr1
    (section_disp_on_morphisms F
       (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L Λ a
        · (# (fact_R G)
             (lnwfs_mor (L L⊗ Λ) (L L⊗ Λ') (F ⊗pre τG)
                a)
           · three_mor_mor12
               (section_nat_trans τG
                  (pr1
                     (L_monad (F ⊗ G') (pr1 (L L⊗ Λ'))
                        (pr2 (L L⊗ Λ'))) a)))))

    
C: category
F, G, G': Ff C
Λ: LNWFS C G
Λ': LNWFS C G'
τG: Ff C ⟦ G, G' ⟧
L: LNWFS C F
τ: Λ -->[ τG] Λ'
a: arrow C
mor:= three_mor_mor12 (section_nat_trans τG a)
:
arrow C ⟦ fact_R G a, fact_R G' a ⟧: arrow C ⟦ fact_R G a, fact_R G' a ⟧
Lnatmor:= nat_trans_ax (pr1 L) (fact_R G a)
  (fact_R G' a) mor: # (fact_L F) mor · pr1 L (fact_R G' a) =
pr1 L (fact_R G a)
· # (fact_L F ∙ fact_L F) mor
Lnatmor11:= pr2
  (pathsdirprodweq
     (base_paths
        (# (fact_L F) mor
         · pr1 L (fact_R G' a))
        (pr1 L (fact_R G a)
         · # (fact_L F ∙ fact_L F) mor)
        Lnatmor)): (λ _ : pr11 (# (fact_L F) mor)
       · pr11 (pr1 L (fact_R G' a)) =
       pr11 (pr1 L (fact_R G a))
       · pr11 (# (fact_L F ∙ fact_L F) mor),
 pr21 (# (fact_L F) mor)
 · pr21 (pr1 L (fact_R G' a)) =
 pr21 (pr1 L (fact_R G a))
 · pr21 (# (fact_L F ∙ fact_L F) mor))
  (pr1
     (pathsdirprodweq
        (base_paths
           (# (fact_L F) mor
            · pr1 L (fact_R G' a))
           (pr1 L (fact_R G a)
            · # (fact_L F ∙ fact_L F) mor)
           Lnatmor)))
pr21 (lnwfs_mor (L L⊗ Λ) (L L⊗ Λ') (F ⊗pre τG) a)
· arrow_mor11 (pr1 L (fact_R G' a))
· three_mor11
    (# F
       (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L Λ' a
        :
        arrow C ⟦ fact_L F (fact_R G' a),
        fact_R G' (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper G' F a) ⟧)) =
arrow_mor11 (pr1 L (fact_R G a))
· pr1
    (section_disp_on_morphisms F
       (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L Λ a
        · (# (fact_R G)
             (lnwfs_mor (L L⊗ Λ) (L L⊗ Λ') (F ⊗pre τG)
                a)
           · three_mor_mor12
               (section_nat_trans τG
                  (pr1
                     (L_monad (F ⊗ G') (pr1 (L L⊗ Λ'))
                        (pr2 (L L⊗ Λ'))) a)))))

    
C: category
F, G, G': Ff C
Λ: LNWFS C G
Λ': LNWFS C G'
τG: Ff C ⟦ G, G' ⟧
L: LNWFS C F
τ: Λ -->[ τG] Λ'
a: arrow C
mor:= three_mor_mor12 (section_nat_trans τG a)
:
arrow C ⟦ fact_R G a, fact_R G' a ⟧: arrow C ⟦ fact_R G a, fact_R G' a ⟧
Lnatmor:= nat_trans_ax (pr1 L) (fact_R G a)
  (fact_R G' a) mor: # (fact_L F) mor · pr1 L (fact_R G' a) =
pr1 L (fact_R G a)
· # (fact_L F ∙ fact_L F) mor
Lnatmor11:= pr2
  (pathsdirprodweq
     (base_paths
        (# (fact_L F) mor
         · pr1 L (fact_R G' a))
        (pr1 L (fact_R G a)
         · # (fact_L F ∙ fact_L F) mor)
        Lnatmor)): (λ _ : pr11 (# (fact_L F) mor)
       · pr11 (pr1 L (fact_R G' a)) =
       pr11 (pr1 L (fact_R G a))
       · pr11 (# (fact_L F ∙ fact_L F) mor),
 pr21 (# (fact_L F) mor)
 · pr21 (pr1 L (fact_R G' a)) =
 pr21 (pr1 L (fact_R G a))
 · pr21 (# (fact_L F ∙ fact_L F) mor))
  (pr1
     (pathsdirprodweq
        (base_paths
           (# (fact_L F) mor
            · pr1 L (fact_R G' a))
           (pr1 L (fact_R G a)
            · # (fact_L F ∙ fact_L F) mor)
           Lnatmor)))
pr21 (lnwfs_mor (L L⊗ Λ) (L L⊗ Λ') (F ⊗pre τG) a)
· arrow_mor11 (pr1 L (fact_R G' a))
· three_mor11 (# F (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L Λ' a)) =
?b
C: category
F, G, G': Ff C
Λ: LNWFS C G
Λ': LNWFS C G'
τG: Ff C ⟦ G, G' ⟧
L: LNWFS C F
τ: Λ -->[ τG] Λ'
a: arrow C
mor:= three_mor_mor12 (section_nat_trans τG a)
:
arrow C ⟦ fact_R G a, fact_R G' a ⟧: arrow C ⟦ fact_R G a, fact_R G' a ⟧
Lnatmor:= nat_trans_ax (pr1 L) (fact_R G a)
  (fact_R G' a) mor: # (fact_L F) mor · pr1 L (fact_R G' a) =
pr1 L (fact_R G a)
· # (fact_L F ∙ fact_L F) mor
Lnatmor11:= pr2
  (pathsdirprodweq
     (base_paths
        (# (fact_L F) mor
         · pr1 L (fact_R G' a))
        (pr1 L (fact_R G a)
         · # (fact_L F ∙ fact_L F) mor)
        Lnatmor)): (λ _ : pr11 (# (fact_L F) mor)
       · pr11 (pr1 L (fact_R G' a)) =
       pr11 (pr1 L (fact_R G a))
       · pr11 (# (fact_L F ∙ fact_L F) mor),
 pr21 (# (fact_L F) mor)
 · pr21 (pr1 L (fact_R G' a)) =
 pr21 (pr1 L (fact_R G a))
 · pr21 (# (fact_L F ∙ fact_L F) mor))
  (pr1
     (pathsdirprodweq
        (base_paths
           (# (fact_L F) mor
            · pr1 L (fact_R G' a))
           (pr1 L (fact_R G a)
            · # (fact_L F ∙ fact_L F) mor)
           Lnatmor)))
?b =
arrow_mor11 (pr1 L (fact_R G a))
· pr1
    (section_disp_on_morphisms F
       (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L Λ a
        · (# (fact_R G)
             (lnwfs_mor 
                (L L⊗ Λ) 
                (L L⊗ Λ') 
                (F ⊗pre τG) a)
           · three_mor_mor12
               (section_nat_trans τG
                  (pr1
                     (L_monad 
                       (F ⊗ G') 
                       (pr1 (L L⊗ Λ')) 
                       (pr2 (L L⊗ Λ'))) a)))))

F, G, G': Ff C

Λ': LNWFS C G'

:
