 pr21 (# (fact_L F) mor)
 · pr21 (pr1 L (fact_R G' a)) =
 pr21 (pr1 L (fact_R G a))
 · pr21 (# (fact_L F ∙ fact_L F) mor))
  (pr1
     (pathsdirprodweq
        (base_paths
           (# (fact_L F) mor
            · pr1 L (fact_R G' a))
           (pr1 L (fact_R G a)
            · # (fact_L F ∙ fact_L F) mor)
           Lnatmor)))
pr21 (lnwfs_mor (L L⊗ Λ) (L L⊗ Λ') (F ⊗pre τG) a)
· arrow_mor11 (pr1 L (fact_R G' a)) = ?f'

F, G, G': Ff C

Λ': LNWFS C G'

            · pr1 L (fact_R G' a))
           (pr1 L (fact_R G a)
            · # (fact_L F ∙ fact_L F) mor)
           Lnatmor)))

· three_mor11 (# F (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L Λ' a)) =

· pr1
    (section_disp_on_morphisms F
       (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L Λ a

               (section_nat_trans τG
                  (pr1
                     (L_monad 
                       (F ⊗ G') 
                       (pr1 (L L⊗ Λ')) 
                       (pr2 (L L⊗ Λ'))) a)))))

C: category
F, G, G': Ff C
Λ: LNWFS C G
Λ': LNWFS C G'
τG: Ff C ⟦ G, G' ⟧
L: LNWFS C F
τ: Λ -->[ τG] Λ'
a: arrow C
mor:= three_mor_mor12 (section_nat_trans τG a)
:
arrow C ⟦ fact_R G a, fact_R G' a ⟧: arrow C ⟦ fact_R G a, fact_R G' a ⟧
Lnatmor:= nat_trans_ax (pr1 L) (fact_R G a)
  (fact_R G' a) mor: # (fact_L F) mor · pr1 L (fact_R G' a) =
pr1 L (fact_R G a)
· # (fact_L F ∙ fact_L F) mor
Lnatmor11:= pr2
  (pathsdirprodweq
     (base_paths
        (# (fact_L F) mor
         · pr1 L (fact_R G' a))
        (pr1 L (fact_R G a)
         · # (fact_L F ∙ fact_L F) mor)
        Lnatmor)): (λ _ : pr11 (# (fact_L F) mor)
       · pr11 (pr1 L (fact_R G' a)) =
       pr11 (pr1 L (fact_R G a))
       · pr11 (# (fact_L F ∙ fact_L F) mor),
 pr21 (# (fact_L F) mor)
 · pr21 (pr1 L (fact_R G' a)) =
 pr21 (pr1 L (fact_R G a))
 · pr21 (# (fact_L F ∙ fact_L F) mor))
  (pr1
     (pathsdirprodweq
        (base_paths
           (# (fact_L F) mor
            · pr1 L (fact_R G' a))
           (pr1 L (fact_R G a)
            · # (fact_L F ∙ fact_L F) mor)
           Lnatmor)))
pr21 (pr1 L (fact_R G a))
· (pr21 (# (fact_L F ∙ fact_L F) mor)
   · three_mor11
       (# F (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L Λ' a))) =
arrow_mor11 (pr1 L (fact_R G a))
· pr1
    (section_disp_on_morphisms F
       (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L Λ a
        · (# (fact_R G)
             (lnwfs_mor (L L⊗ Λ) (L L⊗ Λ') (F ⊗pre τG)
                a)
           · three_mor_mor12
               (section_nat_trans τG
                  (pr1
                     (L_monad (F ⊗ G') (pr1 (L L⊗ Λ'))
                        (pr2 (L L⊗ Λ'))) a)))))

τG: Ff C ⟦ G, G' ⟧

:

  (fact_R G' a) mor: # (fact_L F) mor · pr1 L (fact_R G' a) =

· # (fact_L F ∙ fact_L F) mor

  (pathsdirprodweq

         · # (fact_L F ∙ fact_L F) mor)

       · pr11 (pr1 L (fact_R G' a)) =

 pr21 (# (fact_L F) mor)

pr1

                (pr1
                   (L_monad (F ⊗ G') (pr1 (L L⊗ Λ'))
                      (pr2 (L L⊗ Λ'))) a)))))
 
C: category
F, G, G': Ff C
Λ: LNWFS C G
Λ': LNWFS C G'
τG: Ff C ⟦ G, G' ⟧
L: LNWFS C F
τ: Λ -->[ τG] Λ'
a: arrow C
mor:= three_mor_mor12 (section_nat_trans τG a)
:
arrow C ⟦ fact_R G a, fact_R G' a ⟧: arrow C ⟦ fact_R G a, fact_R G' a ⟧
pr1
  (section_disp_on_morphisms F
     (pr1 (# F (# (fact_L F) mor))
      · pr1 (# F (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L Λ' a)))) =
pr1
  (section_disp_on_morphisms F
     (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L Λ a
      · (# (fact_R G)
           (lnwfs_mor (L L⊗ Λ) (L L⊗ Λ') (F ⊗pre τG) a)
         · three_mor_mor12
             (section_nat_trans τG
                (pr1
                   (L_monad (F ⊗ G') (pr1 (L L⊗ Λ'))
                      (pr2 (L L⊗ Λ'))) a)))))

Λ': LNWFS C G'
τG: Ff C ⟦ G, G' ⟧
L: LNWFS C F
τ: Λ -->[ τG] Λ'
a: arrow C
mor:= three_mor_mor12 (section_nat_trans τG a)
:
arrow C ⟦ fact_R G a, fact_R G' a ⟧: arrow C ⟦ fact_R G a, fact_R G' a ⟧
arrow_mor00
  (pr1 (# F (# (fact_L F) mor))
   · pr1 (# F (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L Λ' a))) =
arrow_mor00
  (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L Λ a
   · (# (fact_R G)
        (lnwfs_mor (L L⊗ Λ) (L L⊗ Λ') (F ⊗pre τG) a)
      · three_mor_mor12
          (section_nat_trans τG
             (pr1
                (L_monad (F ⊗ G') (pr1 (L L⊗ Λ'))
                   (pr2 (L L⊗ Λ'))) a))))

· arrow_mor11 (pr1 Λ' a)
· three_mor11
    (# G'
       (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp Λ' F a
        :

        LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper G' F a ⟧)) =

  (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L Λ a

:

pr21 (disp_δ (lnwfs_L_monad_data Λ) a
      · # (pr1 (L_monad G (pr1 Λ) (pr2 Λ)))
          (lnwfs_mor Λ Λ' τG a))
· pr21 (lnwfs_mor Λ Λ' τG
          (pr1 (L_monad G' (pr1 Λ') (pr2 Λ')) a))
· three_mor11 (# G' (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp Λ' F a)) =

  (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L Λ a
   · (# (fact_R G)
        (lnwfs_mor (L L⊗ Λ) (L L⊗ Λ') (F ⊗pre τG) a)

          (section_nat_trans τG
             (pr1
                (L_monad (F ⊗ G') (pr1 (L L⊗ Λ'))
                   (pr2 (L L⊗ Λ'))) a))))

:

?b =

· (pr21 (# (pr1 (L_monad G (pr1 Λ) (pr2 Λ)))
           (lnwfs_mor Λ Λ' τG a))
   · (pr21 (lnwfs_mor Λ Λ' τG

C: category
F, G, G': Ff C
Λ: LNWFS C G
Λ': LNWFS C G'
τG: Ff C ⟦ G, G' ⟧
L: LNWFS C F
τ: Λ -->[ τG] Λ'
a: arrow C
mor:= three_mor_mor12 (section_nat_trans τG a)
:
arrow C ⟦ fact_R G a, fact_R G' a ⟧: arrow C ⟦ fact_R G a, fact_R G' a ⟧
arrow_mor11 (pr1 Λ a)
· (three_mor11
     (# G
        (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp Λ F a
         :
         arrow C ⟦ fact_L G a,
         LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper G F a ⟧))
   · pr11 (# (fact_R G)
             (lnwfs_mor (L L⊗ Λ) (L L⊗ Λ') (F ⊗pre τG)
                a)
           · three_mor_mor12
               (section_nat_trans τG
                  (pr1
                     (L_monad (F ⊗ G') (pr1 (L L⊗ Λ'))
                        (pr2 (L L⊗ Λ'))) a)))) =
pr21 (disp_δ (lnwfs_L_monad_data Λ) a)
· (pr21 (# (pr1 (L_monad G (pr1 Λ) (pr2 Λ)))
           (lnwfs_mor Λ Λ' τG a))
   · (pr21 (lnwfs_mor Λ Λ' τG
              (pr1 (L_monad G' (pr1 Λ') (pr2 Λ')) a))
      · three_mor11
          (# G' (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp Λ' F a))))

      
C: category
F, G, G': Ff C
Λ: LNWFS C G
Λ': LNWFS C G'
τG: Ff C ⟦ G, G' ⟧
L: LNWFS C F
τ: Λ -->[ τG] Λ'
a: arrow C
mor:= three_mor_mor12 (section_nat_trans τG a)
:
arrow C ⟦ fact_R G a, fact_R G' a ⟧: arrow C ⟦ fact_R G a, fact_R G' a ⟧
three_mor11 (# G (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp Λ F a))
· pr11 (# (fact_R G)
          (lnwfs_mor (L L⊗ Λ) (L L⊗ Λ') (F ⊗pre τG) a)
        · three_mor_mor12
            (section_nat_trans τG
               (pr1
                  (L_monad (F ⊗ G') (pr1 (L L⊗ Λ'))
                     (pr2 (L L⊗ Λ'))) a))) =
pr21 (# (pr1 (L_monad G (pr1 Λ) (pr2 Λ)))
        (lnwfs_mor Λ Λ' τG a))
· (pr21 (lnwfs_mor Λ Λ' τG
           (pr1 (L_monad G' (pr1 Λ') (pr2 Λ')) a))
   · three_mor11
       (# G' (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp Λ' F a)))

      (* cbn.
      unfold three_mor11.
      cbn. *)

      
C: category
F, G, G': Ff C
Λ: LNWFS C G
Λ': LNWFS C G'
τG: Ff C ⟦ G, G' ⟧
L: LNWFS C F
τ: Λ -->[ τG] Λ'
a: arrow C
mor:= three_mor_mor12 (section_nat_trans τG a)
:
arrow C ⟦ fact_R G a, fact_R G' a ⟧: arrow C ⟦ fact_R G a, fact_R G' a ⟧
τGnat:= base_paths
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (G (fact_L G' a))
        (G' (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper G' F a)))
     (id_right (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp Λ' F a) @
      ! id_left (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp Λ' F a))
     (section_disp_on_morphisms G
        (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp Λ' F a) ;; 
      pr1 τG (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper G' F a))%mor_disp)
  (pr1 τG (fact_L G' a) ;; 
   section_disp_on_morphisms G'
     (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp Λ' F a))%mor_disp
  (pr2 τG (fact_L G' a)
     (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper G' F a)
     (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp Λ' F a)): pr1
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (G (fact_L G' a))
        (G' (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper G' F a)))
     (id_right (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp Λ' F a) @
      ! id_left
          (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp Λ' F a))
     (section_disp_on_morphisms G
        (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp Λ' F a) ;; 
      pr1 τG (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper G' F a))%mor_disp) =
pr1
  (pr1 τG (fact_L G' a) ;; 
   section_disp_on_morphisms G'
     (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp Λ' F a))%mor_disp
three_mor11 (# G (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp Λ F a))
· pr11 (# (fact_R G)
          (lnwfs_mor (L L⊗ Λ) (L L⊗ Λ') (F ⊗pre τG) a)
        · three_mor_mor12
            (section_nat_trans τG
               (pr1
                  (L_monad (F ⊗ G') (pr1 (L L⊗ Λ'))
                     (pr2 (L L⊗ Λ'))) a))) =
pr21 (# (pr1 (L_monad G (pr1 Λ) (pr2 Λ)))
        (lnwfs_mor Λ Λ' τG a))
· (pr21 (lnwfs_mor Λ Λ' τG
           (pr1 (L_monad G' (pr1 Λ') (pr2 Λ')) a))
   · three_mor11
       (# G' (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp Λ' F a)))

     (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp Λ' F a)): pr1
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (G (fact_L G' a))
        (G' (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper G' F a)))
     (id_right (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp Λ' F a) @
      ! id_left
          (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp Λ' F a))
     (section_disp_on_morphisms G
        (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp Λ' F a) ;; 
      pr1 τG (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper G' F a))%mor_disp) =
pr1
  (pr1 τG (fact_L G' a) ;; 
   section_disp_on_morphisms G'
     (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp Λ' F a))%mor_disp
pr1
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (G (fact_L G' a))
        (G' (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper G' F a)))
     (id_right (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp Λ' F a) @
      ! id_left (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp Λ' F a))
     (section_disp_on_morphisms G
        (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp Λ' F a) ;; pr1 τG
                                             (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper
                                                G' F a))%mor_disp) =
?f'
C: category
F, G, G': Ff C
Λ: LNWFS C G
Λ': LNWFS C G'
τG: Ff C ⟦ G, G' ⟧
L: LNWFS C F
τ: Λ -->[ τG] Λ'
a: arrow C
mor:= three_mor_mor12 (section_nat_trans τG a)
:
arrow C ⟦ fact_R G a, fact_R G' a ⟧: arrow C ⟦ fact_R G a, fact_R G' a ⟧
τGnat:= base_paths
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (G (fact_L G' a))
        (G' (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper G' F a)))
     (id_right (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp Λ' F a) @
      ! id_left (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp Λ' F a))
     (section_disp_on_morphisms G
        (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp Λ' F a) ;; 
      pr1 τG (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper G' F a))%mor_disp)
  (pr1 τG (fact_L G' a) ;; 
   section_disp_on_morphisms G'
     (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp Λ' F a))%mor_disp
  (pr2 τG (fact_L G' a)
     (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper G' F a)
     (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp Λ' F a)): pr1
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (G (fact_L G' a))
        (G' (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper G' F a)))
     (id_right (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp Λ' F a) @
      ! id_left
          (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp Λ' F a))
     (section_disp_on_morphisms G
        (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp Λ' F a) ;; 
      pr1 τG (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper G' F a))%mor_disp) =
pr1
  (pr1 τG (fact_L G' a) ;; 
   section_disp_on_morphisms G'
     (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp Λ' F a))%mor_disp
pr21 (# (pr1 (L_monad G (pr1 Λ) (pr2 Λ)))
        (lnwfs_mor Λ Λ' τG a)) · 
?f' =
three_mor11 (# G (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp Λ F a))
· pr11 (# (fact_R G)
          (lnwfs_mor (L L⊗ Λ) (L L⊗ Λ') (F ⊗pre τG) a)
        · three_mor_mor12
            (section_nat_trans τG
               (pr1
                  (L_monad 
                     (F ⊗ G') 
                     (pr1 (L L⊗ Λ')) 
                     (pr2 (L L⊗ Λ'))) a)))

a: arrow C
mor:= three_mor_mor12 (section_nat_trans τG a)
:
arrow C ⟦ fact_R G a, fact_R G' a ⟧: arrow C ⟦ fact_R G a, fact_R G' a ⟧
τGnat:= base_paths
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (G (fact_L G' a))
        (G' (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper G' F a)))
     (id_right (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp Λ' F a) @
      ! id_left (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp Λ' F a))
     (section_disp_on_morphisms G
        (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp Λ' F a) ;; 
      pr1 τG (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper G' F a))%mor_disp)
  (pr1 τG (fact_L G' a) ;; 
   section_disp_on_morphisms G'
     (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp Λ' F a))%mor_disp
  (pr2 τG (fact_L G' a)
     (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper G' F a)
     (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp Λ' F a)): pr1
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (G (fact_L G' a))
        (G' (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper G' F a)))
     (id_right (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp Λ' F a) @
      ! id_left
          (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp Λ' F a))
     (section_disp_on_morphisms G
        (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp Λ' F a) ;; 
      pr1 τG (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper G' F a))%mor_disp) =
pr1
  (pr1 τG (fact_L G' a) ;; 
   section_disp_on_morphisms G'
     (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp Λ' F a))%mor_disp
pr1
  (section_disp_on_morphisms G
     (pr1 (# G (lnwfs_mor Λ Λ' τG a))
      · LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp Λ' F a))
· pr1 (pr1 τG (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper G' F a)) =
three_mor11 (# G (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp Λ F a))
· pr11 (# (fact_R G)
          (lnwfs_mor (L L⊗ Λ) (L L⊗ Λ') (F ⊗pre τG) a)
        · three_mor_mor12
            (section_nat_trans τG
               (pr1
                  (L_monad (F ⊗ G') (pr1 (L L⊗ Λ'))
                     (pr2 (L L⊗ Λ'))) a)))

τGnat:= base_paths

     (id_right (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp Λ' F a) @

  (pr2 τG (fact_L G' a)

     (id_right (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp Λ' F a) @

pr1
  (pr1 τG (fact_L G' a) ;; 
   section_disp_on_morphisms G'

                     (pr2 (L L⊗ Λ'))) a))) =
pr1

     (pr1 (# G (lnwfs_mor Λ Λ' τG a))
      · LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp Λ' F a))
· pr1 (pr1 τG (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper G' F a))

      · pr1
          (# G
             (lnwfs_mor (L L⊗ Λ) (L L⊗ Λ') (F ⊗pre τG)
                a))))
· pr11 (three_mor_mor12
          (section_nat_trans τG
             (pr1
                (L_monad (F ⊗ G') (pr1 (L L⊗ Λ'))
                   (pr2 (L L⊗ Λ'))) a))) =
pr1
  (section_disp_on_morphisms G
     (pr1 (# G (lnwfs_mor Λ Λ' τG a))
      · LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp Λ' F a))
· pr1 (pr1 τG (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper G' F a))


      
C: category
F, G, G': Ff C
Λ: LNWFS C G
Λ': LNWFS C G'
τG: Ff C ⟦ G, G' ⟧
L: LNWFS C F
τ: Λ -->[ τG] Λ'
a: arrow C
mor:= three_mor_mor12 (section_nat_trans τG a)
:
arrow C ⟦ fact_R G a, fact_R G' a ⟧: arrow C ⟦ fact_R G a, fact_R G' a ⟧
τGnat:= base_paths
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (G (fact_L G' a))
        (G' (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper G' F a)))
     (id_right (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp Λ' F a) @
      ! id_left (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp Λ' F a))
     (section_disp_on_morphisms G
        (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp Λ' F a) ;; 
      pr1 τG (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper G' F a))%mor_disp)
  (pr1 τG (fact_L G' a) ;; 
   section_disp_on_morphisms G'
     (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp Λ' F a))%mor_disp
  (pr2 τG (fact_L G' a)
     (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper G' F a)
     (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp Λ' F a)): pr1
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (G (fact_L G' a))
        (G' (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper G' F a)))
     (id_right (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp Λ' F a) @
      ! id_left
          (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp Λ' F a))
     (section_disp_on_morphisms G
        (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp Λ' F a) ;; 
      pr1 τG (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper G' F a))%mor_disp) =
pr1
  (pr1 τG (fact_L G' a) ;; 
   section_disp_on_morphisms G'
     (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp Λ' F a))%mor_disp
pr1
  (section_disp_on_morphisms G
     (pr1 (# G (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp Λ F a))
      · pr1
          (# G
             (lnwfs_mor (L L⊗ Λ) (L L⊗ Λ') (F ⊗pre τG)
                a)))) =
pr1
  (section_disp_on_morphisms G
     (pr1 (# G (lnwfs_mor Λ Λ' τG a))
      · LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp Λ' F a))

τG: Ff C ⟦ G, G' ⟧

  (pr2 τG (fact_L G' a)

  (transportf
     (mor_disp (G (fact_L G' a))
        (G' (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper G' F a)))
     (id_right (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp Λ' F a) @

pr1
  (pr1 τG (fact_L G' a) ;;

arrow_mor00
  (pr1 (# G (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp Λ F a))
   · pr1
       (# G
          (lnwfs_mor (L L⊗ Λ) (L L⊗ Λ') (F ⊗pre τG) a))) =
arrow_mor00
  (pr1 (# G (lnwfs_mor Λ Λ' τG a))
   · LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp Λ' F a)

  (pr1 τG (fact_L G' a) ;;

  (pr2 τG (fact_L G' a)
     (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper G' F a)
     (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp Λ' F a)): pr1

     (mor_disp (G (fact_L G' a))
        (G' (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper G' F a)))
     (id_right (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp Λ' F a) @

  (pr2 τG (fact_L G' a)

  (pr1 τG (fact_L G' a) ;; 
   section_disp_on_morphisms G'
     (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp Λ' F a))%mor_disp
arrow_mor11
  (pr1 (# G (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp Λ F a))
   · pr1
       (# G
          (lnwfs_mor (L L⊗ Λ) (L L⊗ Λ') (F ⊗pre τG) a))) =

   · LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp Λ' F a)

        
C: category
F, G, G': Ff C
Λ: LNWFS C G
Λ': LNWFS C G'
τG: Ff C ⟦ G, G' ⟧
L: LNWFS C F
τ: Λ -->[ τG] Λ'
a: arrow C
mor:= three_mor_mor12 (section_nat_trans τG a)
:
arrow C ⟦ fact_R G a, fact_R G' a ⟧: arrow C ⟦ fact_R G a, fact_R G' a ⟧
τGnat:= base_paths
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (G (fact_L G' a))
        (G' (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper G' F a)))
     (id_right (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp Λ' F a) @
      ! id_left (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp Λ' F a))
     (section_disp_on_morphisms G
        (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp Λ' F a) ;; 
      pr1 τG (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper G' F a))%mor_disp)
  (pr1 τG (fact_L G' a) ;; 
   section_disp_on_morphisms G'
     (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp Λ' F a))%mor_disp
  (pr2 τG (fact_L G' a)
     (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper G' F a)
     (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp Λ' F a)): pr1
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (G (fact_L G' a))
        (G' (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper G' F a)))
     (id_right (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp Λ' F a) @
      ! id_left
          (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp Λ' F a))
     (section_disp_on_morphisms G
        (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp Λ' F a) ;; 
      pr1 τG (LNWFS_lcomp_comp_helper G' F a))%mor_disp) =
pr1
  (pr1 τG (fact_L G' a) ;; 
   section_disp_on_morphisms G'
     (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp Λ' F a))%mor_disp
FτGa:= # F (three_mor_mor12 (section_nat_trans τG a)): three C
⟦ F (three_mor12 (section_functor G a)),
F (three_mor12 (section_functor G' a)) ⟧
arrow_mor11
  (pr1 (# G (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp Λ F a))
   · pr1
       (# G
          (lnwfs_mor (L L⊗ Λ) (L L⊗ Λ') (F ⊗pre τG) a))) =
arrow_mor11
  (pr1 (# G (lnwfs_mor Λ Λ' τG a))
   · LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L_lp Λ' F a)

        exact (pr1 (three_mor_comm FτGa)).
    
C: category
F, G, G': Ff C
Λ: LNWFS C G
Λ': LNWFS C G'
τG: Ff C ⟦ G, G' ⟧
L: LNWFS C F
τ: Λ -->[ τG] Λ'
a: arrow C
mor:= three_mor_mor12 (section_nat_trans τG a)
:
arrow C ⟦ fact_R G a, fact_R G' a ⟧: arrow C ⟦ fact_R G a, fact_R G' a ⟧
arrow_mor11
  (pr1 (# F (# (fact_L F) mor))
   · pr1 (# F (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L Λ' a))) =
arrow_mor11
  (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L Λ a
   · (# (fact_R G)
        (lnwfs_mor (L L⊗ Λ) (L L⊗ Λ') (F ⊗pre τG) a)
      · three_mor_mor12
          (section_nat_trans τG
             (pr1
                (L_monad (F ⊗ G') (pr1 (L L⊗ Λ'))
                   (pr2 (L L⊗ Λ'))) a))))
 
C: category
F, G, G': Ff C
Λ: LNWFS C G
Λ': LNWFS C G'
τG: Ff C ⟦ G, G' ⟧
L: LNWFS C F
τ: Λ -->[ τG] Λ'
a: arrow C
mor:= three_mor_mor12 (section_nat_trans τG a)
:
arrow C ⟦ fact_R G a, fact_R G' a ⟧: arrow C ⟦ fact_R G a, fact_R G' a ⟧
arrow_mor11
  (pr1 (# F (# (fact_L F) mor))
   · pr1 (# F (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L Λ' a))) = 
?b
C: category
F, G, G': Ff C
Λ: LNWFS C G
Λ': LNWFS C G'
τG: Ff C ⟦ G, G' ⟧
L: LNWFS C F
τ: Λ -->[ τG] Λ'
a: arrow C
mor:= three_mor_mor12 (section_nat_trans τG a)
:
arrow C ⟦ fact_R G a, fact_R G' a ⟧: arrow C ⟦ fact_R G a, fact_R G' a ⟧
?b =
arrow_mor11
  (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L Λ a
   · (# (fact_R G)
        (lnwfs_mor (L L⊗ Λ) (L L⊗ Λ') (F ⊗pre τG) a)
      · three_mor_mor12
          (section_nat_trans τG
             (pr1
                (L_monad (F ⊗ G') (pr1 (L L⊗ Λ'))
                   (pr2 (L L⊗ Λ'))) a))))

τG: Ff C ⟦ G, G' ⟧

τ: Λ -->[ τG] Λ'

mor:= three_mor_mor12 (section_nat_trans τG a)
:
arrow C ⟦ fact_R G a, fact_R G' a ⟧: arrow C ⟦ fact_R G a, fact_R G' a ⟧
pr211 (# F (# (fact_L F) mor)) =
arrow_mor11
  (LNWFS_lcomp_comul_L'_lp L Λ a
   · (# (fact_R G)
        (lnwfs_mor (L L⊗ Λ) (L L⊗ Λ') (F ⊗pre τG) a)
      · three_mor_mor12
          (section_nat_trans τG
             (pr1

                   (pr2 (L L⊗ Λ'))) a))))

      · three_mor_mor12
          (section_nat_trans τG
             (pr1

                   (pr2 (L L⊗ Λ'))) a)))) =
pr211 (# F (# (fact_L F) mor))

pr21 (# (fact_R G)
        (lnwfs_mor (L L⊗ Λ) (L L⊗ Λ') (F ⊗pre τG) a)
      · three_mor_mor12

Λ': LNWFS C G'

a: arrow C
arrow_mor00
  (lnwfs_mor (L L⊗ Λ) (L L⊗ Λ') (F ⊗pre τG) a
   · disp_ε (lnwfs_L_monad_data (L L⊗ Λ')) a) =
arrow_mor00 (disp_ε (lnwfs_L_monad_data (L L⊗ Λ)) a)
 apply id_left.

a: arrow C
FτGa:= # F (three_mor_mor12 (section_nat_trans τG a)): three C
⟦ F (three_mor12 (section_functor G a)),
F (three_mor12 (section_functor G' a)) ⟧
arrow_mor11
  (lnwfs_mor (L L⊗ Λ) (L L⊗ Λ') (F ⊗pre τG) a
   · disp_ε (lnwfs_L_monad_data (L L⊗ Λ')) a) = ?b
C: category
F, G, G': Ff C
Λ: LNWFS C G
Λ': LNWFS C G'
τG: Ff C ⟦ G, G' ⟧
L: LNWFS C F
τ: Λ -->[ τG] Λ'
a: arrow C
FτGa:= # F (three_mor_mor12 (section_nat_trans τG a)): three C
⟦ F (three_mor12 (section_functor G a)),
F (three_mor12 (section_functor G' a)) ⟧
?b =
arrow_mor11 (disp_ε (lnwfs_L_monad_data (L L⊗ Λ)) a)
 
C: category
F, G, G': Ff C
Λ: LNWFS C G
Λ': LNWFS C G'
τG: Ff C ⟦ G, G' ⟧
L: LNWFS C F
τ: Λ -->[ τG] Λ'
a: arrow C
FτGa:= # F (three_mor_mor12 (section_nat_trans τG a)): three C
⟦ F (three_mor12 (section_functor G a)),
F (three_mor12 (section_functor G' a)) ⟧
pr122 (pr2 (F (three_mor12 (section_functor G a))))
· pr211 FτGa =
arrow_mor11 (disp_ε (lnwfs_L_monad_data (L L⊗ Λ)) a)

    apply id_right.
Qed.

Definition LNWFS_tot_l_leftwhisker {Λ Λ' : total_category (LNWFS C)}
  (L : total_category (LNWFS C)) (τ : Λ --> Λ') :
  (L Ltot⊗ Λ) --> (L Ltot⊗ Λ'):=
    (_,, LNWFS_l_leftwhisker (pr2 L) (pr2 τ)).

Notation "l L⊗pre τ" := (LNWFS_l_leftwhisker l τ) (at level 50).
Notation "l Ltot⊗pre τ" := (LNWFS_tot_l_leftwhisker l τ) (at level 50).


C: category
L, Λ: total_category (LNWFS C)
L Ltot⊗pre identity Λ = identity (L Ltot⊗ Λ)


C: category
L, Λ: total_category (LNWFS C)
L Ltot⊗pre identity Λ = identity (L Ltot⊗ Λ)

  
C: category
L, Λ: total_category (LNWFS C)
pr1 (L Ltot⊗pre identity Λ) =
pr1 (identity (L Ltot⊗ Λ))

  (* cbn. *)
  
C: category
L, Λ: total_category (LNWFS C)
pr1 (L Ltot⊗pre identity Λ) = ?b
C: category
L, Λ: total_category (LNWFS C)
?b = pr1 (identity (L Ltot⊗ Λ))
 
C: category
L, Λ: total_category (LNWFS C)
identity (pr1 L ⊗ pr1 Λ) = pr1 (identity (L Ltot⊗ Λ))

  reflexivity.
Qed.


C: category
Λ, Λ', Λ'', L: total_category (LNWFS C)
τ: total_category (LNWFS C) ⟦ Λ, Λ' ⟧
τ': total_category (LNWFS C) ⟦ Λ', Λ'' ⟧
L Ltot⊗pre τ · τ' = (L Ltot⊗pre τ) · (L Ltot⊗pre τ')


C: category
Λ, Λ', Λ'', L: total_category (LNWFS C)
τ: total_category (LNWFS C) ⟦ Λ, Λ' ⟧
τ': total_category (LNWFS C) ⟦ Λ', Λ'' ⟧
L Ltot⊗pre τ · τ' = (L Ltot⊗pre τ) · (L Ltot⊗pre τ')

  
C: category
Λ, Λ', Λ'', L: total_category (LNWFS C)
τ: total_category (LNWFS C) ⟦ Λ, Λ' ⟧
τ': total_category (LNWFS C) ⟦ Λ', Λ'' ⟧
pr1 (L Ltot⊗pre τ · τ') =
pr1 ((L Ltot⊗pre τ) · (L Ltot⊗pre τ'))

  (* cbn. *)
  
C: category
Λ, Λ', Λ'', L: total_category (LNWFS C)
τ: total_category (LNWFS C) ⟦ Λ, Λ' ⟧
τ': total_category (LNWFS C) ⟦ Λ', Λ'' ⟧
pr1 (L Ltot⊗pre τ · τ') = ?b
C: category
Λ, Λ', Λ'', L: total_category (LNWFS C)
τ: total_category (LNWFS C) ⟦ Λ, Λ' ⟧
τ': total_category (LNWFS C) ⟦ Λ', Λ'' ⟧
?b = pr1 ((L Ltot⊗pre τ) · (L Ltot⊗pre τ'))
 
C: category
Λ, Λ', Λ'', L: total_category (LNWFS C)
τ: total_category (LNWFS C) ⟦ Λ, Λ' ⟧
τ': total_category (LNWFS C) ⟦ Λ', Λ'' ⟧
(pr1 L ⊗pre pr1 τ) · (pr1 L ⊗pre pr1 τ') =
pr1 ((L Ltot⊗pre τ) · (L Ltot⊗pre τ'))

  reflexivity.
Qed.


C: category
F, F', G, G': Ff C
τF: Ff C ⟦ F, F' ⟧
ρG: Ff C ⟦ G, G' ⟧
L: LNWFS C F
L': LNWFS C F'
Λ: LNWFS C G
Λ': LNWFS C G'
τ: L -->[ τF] L'
ρ: Λ -->[ ρG] Λ'
L L⊗ Λ -->[ τF ⊗prod ρG] (L' L⊗ Λ')


C: category
F, F', G, G': Ff C
τF: Ff C ⟦ F, F' ⟧
ρG: Ff C ⟦ G, G' ⟧
L: LNWFS C F
L': LNWFS C F'
Λ: LNWFS C G
Λ': LNWFS C G'
τ: L -->[ τF] L'
ρ: Λ -->[ ρG] Λ'
L L⊗ Λ -->[ τF ⊗prod ρG] (L' L⊗ Λ')

  exact ((τ L⊗post Λ ;; (L' L⊗pre ρ))%mor_disp).
Qed.

Definition LNWFS_tot_l_mor_comp {L L' Λ Λ' : total_category (LNWFS C)}
    (τ : L --> L') (ρ : Λ --> Λ') :
  (L Ltot⊗ Λ) --> (L' Ltot⊗ Λ') :=
    (_,, LNWFS_l_mor_comp (pr2 τ) (pr2 ρ)).

Definition LNWFS_tot_l_point (L : total_category (LNWFS C)) :
    LNWFS_tot_lcomp_unit --> L :=
  (_,, LNWFS_l_point (pr2 L)).


C: category
L, L': total_category (LNWFS C)
τ, τ': total_category (LNWFS C) ⟦ L, L' ⟧
(∏ f : arrow C, pr1 ((pr11 τ) f) = pr1 ((pr11 τ') f))
→ τ = τ'


C: category
L, L': total_category (LNWFS C)
τ, τ': total_category (LNWFS C) ⟦ L, L' ⟧
(∏ f : arrow C, pr1 ((pr11 τ) f) = pr1 ((pr11 τ') f))
→ τ = τ'

  
C: category
L, L': total_category (LNWFS C)
τ, τ': total_category (LNWFS C) ⟦ L, L' ⟧
H: ∏ f : arrow C,
pr1 ((pr11 τ) f) = pr1 ((pr11 τ') f)
τ = τ'

  
C: category
L, L': total_category (LNWFS C)
τ, τ': total_category (LNWFS C) ⟦ L, L' ⟧
H: ∏ f : arrow C,
pr1 ((pr11 τ) f) = pr1 ((pr11 τ') f)
pr1 τ = pr1 τ'

  
C: category
L, L': total_category (LNWFS C)
τ, τ': total_category (LNWFS C) ⟦ L, L' ⟧
H: ∏ f : arrow C,
pr1 ((pr11 τ) f) = pr1 ((pr11 τ') f)
pr11 τ = pr11 τ'

  
C: category
L, L': total_category (LNWFS C)
τ, τ': total_category (LNWFS C) ⟦ L, L' ⟧
H: ∏ f : arrow C,
pr1 ((pr11 τ) f) = pr1 ((pr11 τ') f)
pr11 τ ~ pr11 τ'

  
C: category
L, L': total_category (LNWFS C)
τ, τ': total_category (LNWFS C) ⟦ L, L' ⟧
H: ∏ f : arrow C,
pr1 ((pr11 τ) f) = pr1 ((pr11 τ') f)
f: arrow C
(pr11 τ) f = (pr11 τ') f

  
C: category
L, L': total_category (LNWFS C)
τ, τ': total_category (LNWFS C) ⟦ L, L' ⟧
H: ∏ f : arrow C,
pr1 ((pr11 τ) f) = pr1 ((pr11 τ') f)
f: arrow C
pr1 ((pr11 τ) f) = pr1 ((pr11 τ') f)

  exact (H f).
Qed.

End LNWFS_composition.

Notation "l L⊗ l'" := (LNWFS_lcomp l l') (at level 50).
Notation "l Ltot⊗ l'" := (LNWFS_tot_lcomp l l') (at level 50).
Notation "l L⊗pre τ" := (LNWFS_l_leftwhisker l τ) (at level 50).
Notation "l Ltot⊗pre τ" := (LNWFS_tot_l_leftwhisker l τ) (at level 50).
Notation "τ L⊗post l" := (LNWFS_l_rightwhisker τ l) (at level 50).
Notation "τ Ltot⊗post l" := (LNWFS_tot_l_rightwhisker τ l) (at level 50).

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.Displayed.Monoidal.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.Displayed.TotalMonoidal.

Section LNWFS_monoidal.

Context {C : category}.


C: category
disp_tensor (LNWFS C) Ff_monoidal


C: category
disp_tensor (LNWFS C) Ff_monoidal

  
C: category
WhiskeredDisplayedBifunctors.disp_bifunctor_data
  (WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctordata_from_bifunctor
     Ff_monoidal) (LNWFS C) (LNWFS C) (LNWFS C)
C: category
(λ DF : WhiskeredDisplayedBifunctors.disp_bifunctor_data
          (WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctordata_from_bifunctor
             Ff_monoidal) (LNWFS C) (LNWFS C)
          (LNWFS C),
 WhiskeredDisplayedBifunctors.is_disp_bifunctor
   Ff_monoidal DF) ?pr1

  
C: category
WhiskeredDisplayedBifunctors.disp_bifunctor_data
  (WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctordata_from_bifunctor
     Ff_monoidal) (LNWFS C) (LNWFS C) (LNWFS C)
 
C: category
∏ x y : Ff C,
LNWFS C x
→ LNWFS C y
  → LNWFS C
      (WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctor_on_objects
         (WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctordata_from_bifunctor
            Ff_monoidal) x y)
C: category
(λ Fob : ∏ x y : Ff C,
         LNWFS C x
         → LNWFS C y
           → LNWFS C
               (WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctor_on_objects
                  (WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctordata_from_bifunctor
                     Ff_monoidal) x y),
 (∏ (x y1 y2 : Ff C) (g : Ff C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧)
  (xx : LNWFS C x) (yy1 : LNWFS C y1)
  (yy2 : LNWFS C y2),
  yy1 -->[ g] yy2
  → Fob x y1 xx yy1 -->[
    WhiskeredBifunctors.leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
      (WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctordata_from_bifunctor
         Ff_monoidal) x y1 y2 g] Fob x y2 xx yy2)
 × (∏ (x1 x2 y : Ff C) (f : Ff C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
    (xx1 : LNWFS C x1) (xx2 : LNWFS C x2)
    (yy : LNWFS C y),
    xx1 -->[ f] xx2
    → Fob x1 y xx1 yy -->[
      WhiskeredBifunctors.rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
        (WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctordata_from_bifunctor
           Ff_monoidal) y x1 x2 f] Fob x2 y xx2 yy))
  ?pr1

    
C: category
∏ x y : Ff C,
LNWFS C x
→ LNWFS C y
  → LNWFS C
      (WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctor_on_objects
         (WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctordata_from_bifunctor
            Ff_monoidal) x y)
 exact (@LNWFS_lcomp C).
    
C: category
(λ Fob : ∏ x y : Ff C,
         LNWFS C x
         → LNWFS C y
           → LNWFS C
               (WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctor_on_objects
                  (WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctordata_from_bifunctor
                     Ff_monoidal) x y),
 (∏ (x y1 y2 : Ff C) (g : Ff C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧)
  (xx : LNWFS C x) (yy1 : LNWFS C y1)
  (yy2 : LNWFS C y2),
  yy1 -->[ g] yy2
  → Fob x y1 xx yy1 -->[
    WhiskeredBifunctors.leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
      (WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctordata_from_bifunctor
         Ff_monoidal) x y1 y2 g] Fob x y2 xx yy2)
 × (∏ (x1 x2 y : Ff C) (f : Ff C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
    (xx1 : LNWFS C x1) (xx2 : LNWFS C x2)
    (yy : LNWFS C y),
    xx1 -->[ f] xx2
    → Fob x1 y xx1 yy -->[
      WhiskeredBifunctors.rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
        (WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctordata_from_bifunctor
           Ff_monoidal) y x1 x2 f] Fob x2 y xx2 yy))
  (@LNWFS_lcomp C)
 
C: category
∏ (x y1 y2 : Ff C) (g : Ff C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧)
(xx : LNWFS C x) (yy1 : LNWFS C y1)
(yy2 : LNWFS C y2),
yy1 -->[ g] yy2
→ xx L⊗ yy1 -->[
  WhiskeredBifunctors.leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
    (WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctordata_from_bifunctor
       Ff_monoidal) x y1 y2 g] (xx L⊗ yy2)
C: category
∏ (x1 x2 y : Ff C) (f : Ff C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
(xx1 : LNWFS C x1) (xx2 : LNWFS C x2)
(yy : LNWFS C y),
xx1 -->[ f] xx2
→ xx1 L⊗ yy -->[
  WhiskeredBifunctors.rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
    (WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctordata_from_bifunctor
       Ff_monoidal) y x1 x2 f] (xx2 L⊗ yy)

      
C: category
∏ (x y1 y2 : Ff C) (g : Ff C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧)
(xx : LNWFS C x) (yy1 : LNWFS C y1)
(yy2 : LNWFS C y2),
yy1 -->[ g] yy2
→ xx L⊗ yy1 -->[
  WhiskeredBifunctors.leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
    (WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctordata_from_bifunctor
       Ff_monoidal) x y1 y2 g] (xx L⊗ yy2)
 
C: category
x, y1, y2: Ff C
g: Ff C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
xx: LNWFS C x
yy1: LNWFS C y1
yy2: LNWFS C y2
X: yy1 -->[ g] yy2
yy1 -->[ g] yy2

        assumption.
      
C: category
∏ (x1 x2 y : Ff C) (f : Ff C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
(xx1 : LNWFS C x1) (xx2 : LNWFS C x2)
(yy : LNWFS C y),
xx1 -->[ f] xx2
→ xx1 L⊗ yy -->[
  WhiskeredBifunctors.rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
    (WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctordata_from_bifunctor
       Ff_monoidal) y x1 x2 f] (xx2 L⊗ yy)
 
C: category
A, F, F': Ff C
γ: Ff C ⟦ A, F ⟧
α: LNWFS C A
L: LNWFS C F
L': LNWFS C F'
γγ: α -->[ γ] L
α L⊗ L' -->[
WhiskeredBifunctors.rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
  (WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctordata_from_bifunctor
     Ff_monoidal) F' A F γ] (L L⊗ L')

        exact (LNWFS_l_rightwhisker γγ L').
  
C: category
(λ DF : WhiskeredDisplayedBifunctors.disp_bifunctor_data
          (WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctordata_from_bifunctor
             Ff_monoidal) (LNWFS C) (LNWFS C)
          (LNWFS C),
 WhiskeredDisplayedBifunctors.is_disp_bifunctor
   Ff_monoidal DF)
  (@LNWFS_lcomp C,,
   (λ (x y1 y2 : Ff C) (g : Ff C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧)
    (xx : LNWFS C x) (yy1 : LNWFS C y1)
    (yy2 : LNWFS C y2) (H : yy1 -->[ g] yy2),
    xx L⊗pre H),,
   (λ (A F F' : Ff C) (γ : Ff C ⟦ A, F ⟧)
    (α : LNWFS C A) (L : LNWFS C F) (L' : LNWFS C F')
    (γγ : α -->[ γ] L), γγ L⊗post L'))
 abstract (
      repeat split; repeat intro; apply isaprop_lnwfs_mor_axioms
    ).
Defined.


C: category
disp_monoidal_data (LNWFS C) Ff_monoidal


C: category
disp_monoidal_data (LNWFS C) Ff_monoidal

  
C: category
∑ i : LNWFS C (monoidal_unit Ff_monoidal),
disp_leftunitor_data LNWFS_disp_tensor_data i
× disp_leftunitorinv_data LNWFS_disp_tensor_data i
  × disp_rightunitor_data LNWFS_disp_tensor_data i
    × disp_rightunitorinv_data LNWFS_disp_tensor_data
        i
      × disp_associator_data LNWFS_disp_tensor_data
        × disp_associatorinv_data
            LNWFS_disp_tensor_data

  
C: category
disp_leftunitor_data LNWFS_disp_tensor_data
  LNWFS_lcomp_unit
× disp_leftunitorinv_data LNWFS_disp_tensor_data
    LNWFS_lcomp_unit
  × disp_rightunitor_data LNWFS_disp_tensor_data
      LNWFS_lcomp_unit
    × disp_rightunitorinv_data LNWFS_disp_tensor_data
        LNWFS_lcomp_unit
      × disp_associator_data LNWFS_disp_tensor_data
        × disp_associatorinv_data
            LNWFS_disp_tensor_data

  
C: category
x: Ff C
xx: LNWFS C x
∏ a : arrow C,
lnwfs_mor
  (WhiskeredDisplayedBifunctors.disp_bifunctor_on_objects
     (WhiskeredDisplayedBifunctors.disp_bifunctordata_from_disp_bifunctor
        LNWFS_disp_tensor_data)
     (monoidal_unit Ff_monoidal) x LNWFS_lcomp_unit xx)
  xx (monoidal_leftunitordata Ff_monoidal x) a
· disp_δ (lnwfs_L_monad_data xx) a =
disp_δ
  (lnwfs_L_monad_data
     (WhiskeredDisplayedBifunctors.disp_bifunctor_on_objects
        (WhiskeredDisplayedBifunctors.disp_bifunctordata_from_disp_bifunctor
           LNWFS_disp_tensor_data)
        (monoidal_unit Ff_monoidal) x LNWFS_lcomp_unit
        xx)) a
· # (pr1
       (L_monad
          (WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctor_on_objects
             (WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctordata_from_bifunctor
                Ff_monoidal)
             (monoidal_unit Ff_monoidal) x)
          (pr1
             (WhiskeredDisplayedBifunctors.disp_bifunctor_on_objects
                (WhiskeredDisplayedBifunctors.disp_bifunctordata_from_disp_bifunctor
                   LNWFS_disp_tensor_data)
                (monoidal_unit Ff_monoidal) x
                LNWFS_lcomp_unit xx))
          (pr2
             (WhiskeredDisplayedBifunctors.disp_bifunctor_on_objects
                (WhiskeredDisplayedBifunctors.disp_bifunctordata_from_disp_bifunctor
                   LNWFS_disp_tensor_data)
                (monoidal_unit Ff_monoidal) x
                LNWFS_lcomp_unit xx))))
    (lnwfs_mor
       (WhiskeredDisplayedBifunctors.disp_bifunctor_on_objects
          (WhiskeredDisplayedBifunctors.disp_bifunctordata_from_disp_bifunctor
             LNWFS_disp_tensor_data)
          (monoidal_unit Ff_monoidal) x
          LNWFS_lcomp_unit xx) xx
       (monoidal_leftunitordata Ff_monoidal x) a)
· lnwfs_mor
    (WhiskeredDisplayedBifunctors.disp_bifunctor_on_objects
       (WhiskeredDisplayedBifunctors.disp_bifunctordata_from_disp_bifunctor
          LNWFS_disp_tensor_data)
       (monoidal_unit Ff_monoidal) x LNWFS_lcomp_unit
       xx) xx (monoidal_leftunitordata Ff_monoidal x)
    (pr1 (L_monad x (pr1 xx) (pr2 xx)) a)
C: category
x: Ff C
xx: LNWFS C x
∏ a : arrow C,
lnwfs_mor
  (WhiskeredDisplayedBifunctors.disp_bifunctor_on_objects
     (WhiskeredDisplayedBifunctors.disp_bifunctordata_from_disp_bifunctor
        LNWFS_disp_tensor_data)
     (monoidal_unit Ff_monoidal) x LNWFS_lcomp_unit xx)
  xx (monoidal_leftunitordata Ff_monoidal x) a
· disp_ε (lnwfs_L_monad_data xx) a =
disp_ε
  (lnwfs_L_monad_data
     (WhiskeredDisplayedBifunctors.disp_bifunctor_on_objects
        (WhiskeredDisplayedBifunctors.disp_bifunctordata_from_disp_bifunctor
           LNWFS_disp_tensor_data)
        (monoidal_unit Ff_monoidal) x LNWFS_lcomp_unit
        xx)) a
C: category
x: Ff C
xx: LNWFS C x
∏ a : arrow C,
lnwfs_mor xx
  (WhiskeredDisplayedBifunctors.disp_bifunctor_on_objects
     (WhiskeredDisplayedBifunctors.disp_bifunctordata_from_disp_bifunctor
        LNWFS_disp_tensor_data)
     (monoidal_unit Ff_monoidal) x LNWFS_lcomp_unit xx)
  (monoidal_leftunitorinvdata Ff_monoidal x) a
· disp_δ
    (lnwfs_L_monad_data
       (WhiskeredDisplayedBifunctors.disp_bifunctor_on_objects
          (WhiskeredDisplayedBifunctors.disp_bifunctordata_from_disp_bifunctor
             LNWFS_disp_tensor_data)
          (monoidal_unit Ff_monoidal) x
          LNWFS_lcomp_unit xx)) a =
disp_δ (lnwfs_L_monad_data xx) a
· # (pr1 (L_monad x (pr1 xx) (pr2 xx)))
    (lnwfs_mor xx
       (WhiskeredDisplayedBifunctors.disp_bifunctor_on_objects
          (WhiskeredDisplayedBifunctors.disp_bifunctordata_from_disp_bifunctor
             LNWFS_disp_tensor_data)
          (monoidal_unit Ff_monoidal) x
          LNWFS_lcomp_unit xx)
       (monoidal_leftunitorinvdata Ff_monoidal x) a)
· lnwfs_mor xx
    (WhiskeredDisplayedBifunctors.disp_bifunctor_on_objects
       (WhiskeredDisplayedBifunctors.disp_bifunctordata_from_disp_bifunctor
          LNWFS_disp_tensor_data)
       (monoidal_unit Ff_monoidal) x LNWFS_lcomp_unit
       xx) (monoidal_leftunitorinvdata Ff_monoidal x)
    (pr1
       (L_monad
          (WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctor_on_objects
             (WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctordata_from_bifunctor
                Ff_monoidal)
             (monoidal_unit Ff_monoidal) x)
          (pr1
             (WhiskeredDisplayedBifunctors.disp_bifunctor_on_objects
                (WhiskeredDisplayedBifunctors.disp_bifunctordata_from_disp_bifunctor
                   LNWFS_disp_tensor_data)
                (monoidal_unit Ff_monoidal) x
                LNWFS_lcomp_unit xx))
          (pr2
             (WhiskeredDisplayedBifunctors.disp_bifunctor_on_objects
                (WhiskeredDisplayedBifunctors.disp_bifunctordata_from_disp_bifunctor
                   LNWFS_disp_tensor_data)
                (monoidal_unit Ff_monoidal) x
                LNWFS_lcomp_unit xx))) a)
C: category
x: Ff C
xx: LNWFS C x
∏ a : arrow C,
lnwfs_mor xx
  (WhiskeredDisplayedBifunctors.disp_bifunctor_on_objects
     (WhiskeredDisplayedBifunctors.disp_bifunctordata_from_disp_bifunctor
        LNWFS_disp_tensor_data)
     (monoidal_unit Ff_monoidal) x LNWFS_lcomp_unit xx)
  (monoidal_leftunitorinvdata Ff_monoidal x) a
· disp_ε
    (lnwfs_L_monad_data

          (WhiskeredDisplayedBifunctors.disp_bifunctordata_from_disp_bifunctor
             LNWFS_disp_tensor_data)
          (monoidal_unit Ff_monoidal) x
          LNWFS_lcomp_unit xx)) a =
disp_ε (lnwfs_L_monad_data xx) a
C: category
x: Ff C
xx: LNWFS C x
∏ a : arrow C,

  (WhiskeredDisplayedBifunctors.disp_bifunctor_on_objects
     (WhiskeredDisplayedBifunctors.disp_bifunctordata_from_disp_bifunctor
        LNWFS_disp_tensor_data) x

        (WhiskeredDisplayedBifunctors.disp_bifunctordata_from_disp_bifunctor

        (monoidal_unit Ff_monoidal) xx
        LNWFS_lcomp_unit)) a
· # (pr1

          (WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctor_on_objects
             (WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctordata_from_bifunctor
                Ff_monoidal) x
             (monoidal_unit Ff_monoidal))
          (pr1

                (WhiskeredDisplayedBifunctors.disp_bifunctordata_from_disp_bifunctor
                   LNWFS_disp_tensor_data) x
                (monoidal_unit Ff_monoidal) xx

          (pr2
             (WhiskeredDisplayedBifunctors.disp_bifunctor_on_objects
                (WhiskeredDisplayedBifunctors.disp_bifunctordata_from_disp_bifunctor
                   LNWFS_disp_tensor_data) x
                (monoidal_unit Ff_monoidal) xx
                LNWFS_lcomp_unit))))
    (lnwfs_mor
       (WhiskeredDisplayedBifunctors.disp_bifunctor_on_objects
          (WhiskeredDisplayedBifunctors.disp_bifunctordata_from_disp_bifunctor
             LNWFS_disp_tensor_data) x
          (monoidal_unit Ff_monoidal) xx
          LNWFS_lcomp_unit) xx
       (monoidal_rightunitordata Ff_monoidal x) a)
· lnwfs_mor
    (WhiskeredDisplayedBifunctors.disp_bifunctor_on_objects
       (WhiskeredDisplayedBifunctors.disp_bifunctordata_from_disp_bifunctor
          LNWFS_disp_tensor_data) x
       (monoidal_unit Ff_monoidal) xx LNWFS_lcomp_unit)
    xx (monoidal_rightunitordata Ff_monoidal x)
    (pr1 (L_monad x (pr1 xx) (pr2 xx)) a)
C: category
x: Ff C
xx: LNWFS C x
∏ a : arrow C,
lnwfs_mor
  (WhiskeredDisplayedBifunctors.disp_bifunctor_on_objects
     (WhiskeredDisplayedBifunctors.disp_bifunctordata_from_disp_bifunctor
        LNWFS_disp_tensor_data) x
     (monoidal_unit Ff_monoidal) xx LNWFS_lcomp_unit)
  xx (monoidal_rightunitordata Ff_monoidal x) a
· disp_ε (lnwfs_L_monad_data xx) a =
disp_ε
  (lnwfs_L_monad_data
     (WhiskeredDisplayedBifunctors.disp_bifunctor_on_objects
        (WhiskeredDisplayedBifunctors.disp_bifunctordata_from_disp_bifunctor
           LNWFS_disp_tensor_data) x
        (monoidal_unit Ff_monoidal) xx
        LNWFS_lcomp_unit)) a
C: category
x: Ff C
xx: LNWFS C x
∏ a : arrow C,
lnwfs_mor xx
  (WhiskeredDisplayedBifunctors.disp_bifunctor_on_objects
     (WhiskeredDisplayedBifunctors.disp_bifunctordata_from_disp_bifunctor
        LNWFS_disp_tensor_data) x
     (monoidal_unit Ff_monoidal) xx LNWFS_lcomp_unit)
  (monoidal_rightunitorinvdata Ff_monoidal x) a
· disp_δ
    (lnwfs_L_monad_data
       (WhiskeredDisplayedBifunctors.disp_bifunctor_on_objects
          (WhiskeredDisplayedBifunctors.disp_bifunctordata_from_disp_bifunctor
             LNWFS_disp_tensor_data) x
          (monoidal_unit Ff_monoidal) xx
          LNWFS_lcomp_unit)) a =
disp_δ (lnwfs_L_monad_data xx) a
· # (pr1 (L_monad x (pr1 xx) (pr2 xx)))
    (lnwfs_mor xx
       (WhiskeredDisplayedBifunctors.disp_bifunctor_on_objects
          (WhiskeredDisplayedBifunctors.disp_bifunctordata_from_disp_bifunctor
             LNWFS_disp_tensor_data) x
          (monoidal_unit Ff_monoidal) xx
          LNWFS_lcomp_unit)
       (monoidal_rightunitorinvdata Ff_monoidal x) a)
· lnwfs_mor xx
    (WhiskeredDisplayedBifunctors.disp_bifunctor_on_objects
       (WhiskeredDisplayedBifunctors.disp_bifunctordata_from_disp_bifunctor
          LNWFS_disp_tensor_data) x
       (monoidal_unit Ff_monoidal) xx LNWFS_lcomp_unit)
    (monoidal_rightunitorinvdata Ff_monoidal x)
    (pr1
       (L_monad
          (WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctor_on_objects
             (WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctordata_from_bifunctor
                Ff_monoidal) x
             (monoidal_unit Ff_monoidal))

                LNWFS_disp_tensor_data) y z yy zz))) a =
disp_ε
  (lnwfs_L_monad_data
     (WhiskeredDisplayedBifunctors.disp_bifunctor_on_objects
        (WhiskeredDisplayedBifunctors.disp_bifunctordata_from_disp_bifunctor
           LNWFS_disp_tensor_data)
        (WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctor_on_objects
           (WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctordata_from_bifunctor
              Ff_monoidal) x y) z
        (WhiskeredDisplayedBifunctors.disp_bifunctor_on_objects
           (WhiskeredDisplayedBifunctors.disp_bifunctordata_from_disp_bifunctor
              LNWFS_disp_tensor_data) x y xx yy) zz))
  a
 exact (pr2 (LNWFS_l_assoc xx yy zz)).
  
C: category
x, y, z: Ff C

yy: LNWFS C y
zz: LNWFS C z
∏ a : arrow C,
lnwfs_mor
  (WhiskeredDisplayedBifunctors.disp_bifunctor_on_objects

· disp_δ
    (lnwfs_L_monad_data

C: category
disp_monoidal_laws LNWFS_disp_monoidal_data


C: category
disp_monoidal_laws LNWFS_disp_monoidal_data

  repeat split; (repeat intro; apply isaprop_lnwfs_mor_axioms).
Qed.

Definition LNWFS_monoidal : disp_monoidal (LNWFS C) Ff_monoidal :=
    (_,, LNWFS_disp_monoidal_laws).

Definition LNWFS_tot_monoidal : monoidal _ :=
    total_monoidal LNWFS_monoidal.

Definition Ff_monoidal : monoidal (Ff C) :=
    (_,, Ff_monoidal_laws).

End LNWFS_monoidal.

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monads.Monads.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.CategoriesOfMonoids.

Section LNWFS_monoid_is_NWFS.

Context {C : category}.
Local Definition LNWFSC := total_category (LNWFS C).



C: category
L: LNWFSC
R: monoid LNWFS_tot_monoidal L
monoid_data Ff_monoidal (pr1 L)


C: category
L: LNWFSC
R: monoid LNWFS_tot_monoidal L
monoid_data Ff_monoidal (pr1 L)

  
C: category
L: LNWFSC
R: monoid LNWFS_tot_monoidal L
Rμ:= pr1 R: total_category (LNWFS C)
⟦ WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctor_on_objects
    LNWFS_tot_monoidal L L, L ⟧
monoid_data Ff_monoidal (pr1 L)

  
C: category
L: LNWFSC
R: monoid LNWFS_tot_monoidal L
Rμ:= pr1 R: total_category (LNWFS C)
⟦ WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctor_on_objects
    LNWFS_tot_monoidal L L, L ⟧
RI:= pr2 R: (λ _ : total_category (LNWFS C)
       ⟦ WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctor_on_objects
           LNWFS_tot_monoidal L L, L ⟧,
 total_category (LNWFS C)
 ⟦ monoidal_unit LNWFS_tot_monoidal, L ⟧) (pr1 R)
monoid_data Ff_monoidal (pr1 L)


  
C: category
L: LNWFSC
R: monoid LNWFS_tot_monoidal L
Rμ:= pr1 R: total_category (LNWFS C)
⟦ WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctor_on_objects
    LNWFS_tot_monoidal L L, L ⟧
RI:= pr2 R: (λ _ : total_category (LNWFS C)
       ⟦ WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctor_on_objects
           LNWFS_tot_monoidal L L, L ⟧,
 total_category (LNWFS C)
 ⟦ monoidal_unit LNWFS_tot_monoidal, L ⟧) (pr1 R)
Ff C
⟦ WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctor_on_objects Ff_monoidal
    (pr1 L) (pr1 L), pr1 L ⟧
C: category
L: LNWFSC
R: monoid LNWFS_tot_monoidal L
Rμ:= pr1 R: total_category (LNWFS C)
⟦ WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctor_on_objects
    LNWFS_tot_monoidal L L, L ⟧
RI:= pr2 R: (λ _ : total_category (LNWFS C)
       ⟦ WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctor_on_objects
           LNWFS_tot_monoidal L L, L ⟧,
 total_category (LNWFS C)
 ⟦ monoidal_unit LNWFS_tot_monoidal, L ⟧) (pr1 R)
Ff C ⟦ monoidal_unit Ff_monoidal, pr1 L ⟧

  
C: category
L: LNWFSC
R: monoid LNWFS_tot_monoidal L
Rμ:= pr1 R: total_category (LNWFS C)
⟦ WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctor_on_objects
    LNWFS_tot_monoidal L L, L ⟧
RI:= pr2 R: (λ _ : total_category (LNWFS C)
       ⟦ WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctor_on_objects
           LNWFS_tot_monoidal L L, L ⟧,
 total_category (LNWFS C)
 ⟦ monoidal_unit LNWFS_tot_monoidal, L ⟧) (pr1 R)
Ff C
⟦ WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctor_on_objects Ff_monoidal
    (pr1 L) (pr1 L), pr1 L ⟧
 exact (pr1 Rμ).
  
C: category
L: LNWFSC
R: monoid LNWFS_tot_monoidal L
Rμ:= pr1 R: total_category (LNWFS C)
⟦ WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctor_on_objects
    LNWFS_tot_monoidal L L, L ⟧
RI:= pr2 R: (λ _ : total_category (LNWFS C)
       ⟦ WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctor_on_objects
           LNWFS_tot_monoidal L L, L ⟧,
 total_category (LNWFS C)
 ⟦ monoidal_unit LNWFS_tot_monoidal, L ⟧) (pr1 R)
Ff C ⟦ monoidal_unit Ff_monoidal, pr1 L ⟧
 exact (pr1 RI).
Defined.


C: category
L: LNWFSC
R: monoid LNWFS_tot_monoidal L
monoid_laws Ff_monoidal
  (LNWFS_tot_monoid_is_NWFS_monoid_data R)


C: category
L: LNWFSC
R: monoid LNWFS_tot_monoidal L
monoid_laws Ff_monoidal
  (LNWFS_tot_monoid_is_NWFS_monoid_data R)

  
C: category
L: LNWFSC
R: monoid LNWFS_tot_monoidal L
monoid_laws_unit_left Ff_monoidal
  (LNWFS_tot_monoid_is_NWFS_monoid_data R)
C: category
L: LNWFSC
R: monoid LNWFS_tot_monoidal L
monoid_laws_unit_right Ff_monoidal
  (LNWFS_tot_monoid_is_NWFS_monoid_data R)
C: category
L: LNWFSC
R: monoid LNWFS_tot_monoidal L
monoid_laws_assoc Ff_monoidal
  (LNWFS_tot_monoid_is_NWFS_monoid_data R)

  
C: category
L: LNWFSC
R: monoid LNWFS_tot_monoidal L
monoid_laws_unit_left Ff_monoidal
  (LNWFS_tot_monoid_is_NWFS_monoid_data R)
 
C: category
L: LNWFSC
R: monoid LNWFS_tot_monoidal L
law:= monoid_to_unit_left_law LNWFS_tot_monoidal R: monoid_laws_unit_left LNWFS_tot_monoidal R
monoid_laws_unit_left Ff_monoidal
  (LNWFS_tot_monoid_is_NWFS_monoid_data R)

    
C: category
L: LNWFSC
R: monoid LNWFS_tot_monoidal L
law:= monoid_to_unit_left_law LNWFS_tot_monoidal R: monoid_laws_unit_left LNWFS_tot_monoidal R
pr1
  (WhiskeredBifunctors.rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
     Ff_monoidal (pr1 L) (monoidal_unit Ff_monoidal)
     (pr1 L)
     (monoid_data_unit Ff_monoidal
        (LNWFS_tot_monoid_is_NWFS_monoid_data R))
   · monoid_data_multiplication Ff_monoidal
       (LNWFS_tot_monoid_is_NWFS_monoid_data R)) =
pr1 (monoidal_leftunitordata Ff_monoidal (pr1 L))

    exact (base_paths _ _ (base_paths _ _ law)).
  
C: category
L: LNWFSC
R: monoid LNWFS_tot_monoidal L
monoid_laws_unit_right Ff_monoidal
  (LNWFS_tot_monoid_is_NWFS_monoid_data R)
 
C: category
L: LNWFSC
R: monoid LNWFS_tot_monoidal L
law:= monoid_to_unit_right_law LNWFS_tot_monoidal R: monoid_laws_unit_right LNWFS_tot_monoidal R
monoid_laws_unit_right Ff_monoidal
  (LNWFS_tot_monoid_is_NWFS_monoid_data R)

    
C: category
L: LNWFSC
R: monoid LNWFS_tot_monoidal L
law:= monoid_to_unit_right_law LNWFS_tot_monoidal R: monoid_laws_unit_right LNWFS_tot_monoidal R
pr1
  (WhiskeredBifunctors.leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
     Ff_monoidal (pr1 L) (monoidal_unit Ff_monoidal)
     (pr1 L)
     (monoid_data_unit Ff_monoidal
        (LNWFS_tot_monoid_is_NWFS_monoid_data R))
   · monoid_data_multiplication Ff_monoidal
       (LNWFS_tot_monoid_is_NWFS_monoid_data R)) =
pr1 (monoidal_rightunitordata Ff_monoidal (pr1 L))

    exact (base_paths _ _ (base_paths _ _ law)).
  
C: category
L: LNWFSC
R: monoid LNWFS_tot_monoidal L
monoid_laws_assoc Ff_monoidal
  (LNWFS_tot_monoid_is_NWFS_monoid_data R)
 
C: category
L: LNWFSC
R: monoid LNWFS_tot_monoidal L
law:= monoid_to_assoc_law LNWFS_tot_monoidal R: monoid_laws_assoc LNWFS_tot_monoidal R
monoid_laws_assoc Ff_monoidal
  (LNWFS_tot_monoid_is_NWFS_monoid_data R)

    
C: category
L: LNWFSC
R: monoid LNWFS_tot_monoidal L
law:= monoid_to_assoc_law LNWFS_tot_monoidal R: monoid_laws_assoc LNWFS_tot_monoidal R
pr1
  (monoidal_associatordata Ff_monoidal (pr1 L) (pr1 L)
     (pr1 L)
   · WhiskeredBifunctors.leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
       Ff_monoidal (pr1 L)
       (WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctor_on_objects
          Ff_monoidal (pr1 L) (pr1 L)) (pr1 L)
       (monoid_data_multiplication Ff_monoidal
          (LNWFS_tot_monoid_is_NWFS_monoid_data R))
   · monoid_data_multiplication Ff_monoidal
       (LNWFS_tot_monoid_is_NWFS_monoid_data R)) =
pr1
  (WhiskeredBifunctors.rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
     Ff_monoidal (pr1 L)
     (WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctor_on_objects
        Ff_monoidal (pr1 L) (pr1 L)) (pr1 L)
     (monoid_data_multiplication Ff_monoidal
        (LNWFS_tot_monoid_is_NWFS_monoid_data R))
   · monoid_data_multiplication Ff_monoidal
       (LNWFS_tot_monoid_is_NWFS_monoid_data R))

    exact (base_paths _ _ (base_paths _ _ law)).
Qed.

Definition LNWFS_tot_monoid_projection
      {L : LNWFSC} (R : monoid (LNWFS_tot_monoidal) L) :
  monoid Ff_monoidal (pr1 L) :=
    (_,, LNWFS_tot_monoid_is_NWFS_monoid_axioms R).


C: category
L: LNWFSC
R: monoid LNWFS_tot_monoidal L
NWFS C (pr1 L)


C: category
L: LNWFSC
R: monoid LNWFS_tot_monoidal L
NWFS C (pr1 L)

  
C: category
L: LNWFSC
R: monoid LNWFS_tot_monoidal L
LNWFS C (pr1 L)
C: category
L: LNWFSC
R: monoid LNWFS_tot_monoidal L
RNWFS C (pr1 L)

  
C: category
L: LNWFSC
R: monoid LNWFS_tot_monoidal L
LNWFS C (pr1 L)
 exact (pr2 L).
  
C: category
L: LNWFSC
R: monoid LNWFS_tot_monoidal L
RNWFS C (pr1 L)
 
C: category
L: LNWFSC
R: monoid LNWFS_tot_monoidal L
monoid FFMonoidalStructure.Ff_monoidal (pr1 L)

    (* project monoid R down to Ff C *)
    exact (LNWFS_tot_monoid_projection R).
Defined.

End LNWFS_monoid_is_NWFS.
